name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: Medicaid cuts could cause millions of Americans to lose their health coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Please sign on now to protect Medicaid and every American’s access to healthcare today »
#
Peter,
**This week, out-of-touch politicians in DC announced their plan to cut over $880 million from Medicaid** — the program that provides life-saving health coverage for the elderly, pregnant women, and millions of other Americans — **as part of their “big, beautiful bill.”**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-petition-20250517?t=1&akid=8949%2E614464%2ErMTS5Z)
**[SIGN ON NOW: PROTECT MEDICAID](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-petition-20250517?t=2&akid=8949%2E614464%2ErMTS5Z)**
Let’s be clear: **Every American deserves access to the healthcare they need — and this proposal is a direct attack on the ability to access that care.**
These cuts would force rural hospitals and clinics to close, leaving people across the country without access to critical healthcare in their communities. They would leave patients in nursing homes — who are often already struggling to afford that care — stranded without many other options.
**Millions of Americans would lose their healthcare coverage — all so these greedy politicians can fund massive tax breaks for their billionaire buddies.**
So right now, we need people like you to speak out. We need to tell Congress that we won’t stand for any cuts to Medicaid or any attacks on our ability to access healthcare.
**That’s why we’re urgently asking:[Will you join our call to protect Medicaid and every American’s access to healthcare today? This is our chance to show real solidarity across the country on this issue, and we’d be so grateful for your help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-petition-20250517?t=3&akid=8949%2E614464%2ErMTS5Z)**
**[SIGN ON NOW: PROTECT MEDICAID](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-petition-20250517?t=4&akid=8949%2E614464%2ErMTS5Z)**
Thanks for all your help, Peter.
Heartland Patriots HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-email-footer?refcode=em20250517-8949-footer&t=5&refcode2=8949_614464_rMTS5Z&akid=8949%2E614464%2ErMTS5Z)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=6&akid=8949%2E614464%2ErMTS5Z). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
-It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. -It's Gary Sinise here... -I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/NkJpIatuG6_cuBStHgFGjZ2B6KAhWJrzVY5GfiPgGrkZrwwDFb0XXh4LIdwgLiuEUNmlnysG58RUPXys4nqhGTNWX7OowbNIZNLtrQxLUomkX18WpCeISpQqdLqGhEQo5NBLECEyhVgJn_NL6b8kQdrOemSpGJPben_D__UAyNQFLGcQh8s3XxXaThByM0-HS3b2IeRcNgFNf-XBlZv0M9tGo-321BgniL4ZB_rZmFbpNxvxQYJCr6E5UjiNNujoWcf4ykaNe7PAkyk3JMmUf5AQwMfu5iyEz80JoBBVPf4Ea1XfkYZs_sdHBW86BKhdcFWQVcSNCwP07Bf0eDLgn7jaeggs2iRR1y-yxzsyEwlbLyUbwBv1fhvOkTtcX9RFKfIqDTrVrOyp-rek1STcSqoD7w_pFarhArOCl7BuwiE6eJIrE3A9mneYpUJIsvK3M5Zf_uGa62H2VAGUzEkLv3mjMrU/k7riwAvv13xetrPPeVLLXiQw88zG3D3W/9)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life. It inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I am now back again this year as Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. as we celebrate the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps.
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/IAzwyrSbmVeEaFBoBmIDsxmPWZY9JRN-yt-9nCh0an5TTGw9KwyhZ0tXBsP5pvaAnuRbCb_ngQbTyQYnphqbAaVNuPo0tkD2plm8pPWDUK4hdzjfW9N3oeADCA-KfXRzT5Z-M77Ck0bW7B36D_uwREzhWV30sfAGm8hUQvx5fo7RAgh0KTTrZR2orAppuNbzHGWdmh1T8Yt9Oh-E1BEOKr1pUmS4tZelm4I94oUOFlPXChOScAPbygum8CRVHtP4F5_1ouYAhIRYd1NWwQhomg8DlQDJktAYnZaXHwCO8UKw1DCLfXhBsAxT-4Z2txmxf-ReJyRtpzroHnTZAg457EQSCF8k03gPCOxhHytM1vC6Yg4_6vgneKyd4CL9kO76uYKjXuoKYqcyeq2ZHH6vvPSOQYDqBj3GNXJfIx2KnVhjd4zQCGbrFX0Pcfv9r5mjm_TLQegmI-5nImRc6kara5q0L-k/1UU0j_U8cBC1OjeNBJ1B7ibaatZHyeAQ/9)
---
[**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/zMAO1CbI8_qxhOo7ob9aoUsTshzIc9TPfEK6xREpI4isaquER4on2V8xt-kDbxqaxW1rruokG8XRCKtfevx8t_d6bbCN6QAn99bnBz4KN8SiMXHTkG6zNVgbxNQloCsSpyvB2IVWZydQvISobLGoOgmNXALbU2hhoF4b6cVVEMzD8VqYE2WdtzdsBZzE92HULIhyF3hvPuWFQphrI0cP8-PgMAxQUgRR2TKE9gGqJXIt2X1Q2X_mSWe8IatUJUc0d79BS_Ss4p969U462IBnzYk1D20D1iKJwzxVD5MwZkHyA8Wd_BGM-xBUuZfW9qwpZ9XaU0csZ2Z9QRsFdDJSnm3jwGppTZzopOMOS595H13tjRhP6ED5rTAebVTvTRTDGwTQ7fOHpABJ-vg4Qpe0Jsr1loFwirZ3gQlLi4A90mFgqW8Z89WkMZp4GSEvlXgbKxB3O7YjkJaipRc6v6sV-tJWVlU/LrHepTUYLbvCqYjgpkaNGv5smHcZVzts/9) The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year, but its significance is miles apart. _Every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for in our effort to honor those who sacrificed for our country._ **American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded**** _entirely_****by private citizens like you.** [**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/jH4U8E2XNyZBq5eLFMOOQ5xETaThVc84i9UdVUyWB_MOBEQ--0jImrTUrO97XM1hVnO9vUxp8wGxA_8Owq6AyHsrC-haoDKdqCf10ThCiYJURcPpimRF5mGvNdMFdr0ToTHEwd15viZD3tIHp1-qoT_PRxzIze_Ew7UGcqoGGZgbmNXpjyMGTUlSVDjD7X_QMJ1K9xIV4Dx338liKI4BCLFeyAWrTwK07V2foUAWIJ7OKUpw0Z7kax2PEv3tvu7oectBx6-hgyH4kMMKppSKyYclRCdCz6AVc7QUGM-ELRYxlyg2REPjN33WafNKXOSoyfIZmZ_qsEG-_kwTg50x4ubfdQlC1oLbJC019cA6R6HnCi_xwnDXIzoe3gs8WFeZHgV1WK8qowPOJp4jcxKmO1xOop6cKv0kiOVmNI4-X53-PdDTu7wThZvSfpq3WgtMQNUgMS5TW_TG1805TULF2_HpCJI/O8YCbya4hk4zMsZktaDRjxDj8Ck84Iy3/9) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._ **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time.**
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/pM3bX3sdleqAbZArF8enM_MfhgZ1XEOISFSEiztj-v-0We4Wt_9210CRqzp_O6KrKZdo7dAO-Y0VX4xgU1jsSMU1t0Oc8R9WX1vEhcYrQlNzx9sZ8BLC1cM3o1xqJWc1J_IgkUYM6mme8TDf1VUy1z6xNKdppSDTufOm1x9bktRyhWUEqO9tkQa8hp2-C1ZuA5OJybaN-SYfRNT5AITMsugSzjB7oyoFpG_3JHvTc1WYvvO2U-jgrnlDSPLZwvLiNMsxIdf7-HEPlfJSQ-5sZFzxtahHVpzvTym-l6GfQFtPP32lLfYp-LC_R_yOee2dA7j8c95OcF1fdXUtuMtq68H91hwSM3F_MatHwA8To8u0vDFRwgltfuFICY5lhbfZJ7tAWs5GbXZ71OUB_60HhJbGnG6Tp_j0rczatoJ7U1tRmKOH9s_pYc2AZ7_ePbH17MYmSsYpvBe2E_HaReWwFMwrUCY/giatMnnn0ace_KJHBPWnNwPvINrdjeQh/9)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. [**Peter, thank you for your support of America 's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/1amsrUfy397RpG_MktNyLTF2l5r4r6IBJHPvO4tKBWVadUDTuNEBQS-DqWcxNo7Eqe1Lfdz5QGVq_HKU4musfF-Wz-yo0fiqYAyMhG_tJx37XRjZ-uMpbMc5C2R8OlwSZbaWAv48qvgzkJYaNrmJmUQzWP67oYknY2AoCg6IetPjv4WjsXmnRQJsRJnYfe3qjULsq94rAcTDFPkdNdYT3s1Bvwvl0shNYkfnJPKAAyV_9w6pg1T8Sfol8Wi91YygDkUaTbV8PC6VOvVfqOOw8ruZ7g48QScFPuWdJHTcTQodQ7x2f2v2_F7WPO9WdQcCfCfQyB5X1tfqNvGidRnPha20tqQIu2UHGcQ1hldsaiGxC-pTv8wv7RfSdcb1cvntaGCuwPfa29pdhQaaYDOG3Rdz4k9nQx4yKar2Uh214D8T9ME5DkFyYCiDn17hA6VVGGIqS-Ym_bhQAsQWbSTXf7HajSM/HwAuo5im7YI_PGFiukrd1SFfMDQztdiz/9) Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/UWDxesCPJhxYCmn44i_ELwPm0_pdC9vU04vA1mhUi8-fnnnoQdQgEurkWKN2jf14w3M9hM9cUSgwg_Xy94dJyQe-pu93SQp8mqGto_xHWkVLq_8cfwhbrOcpt_GxrHuxwNdtz7d42LwmtOiTUZKjt8D9UhJ8GiXyL1gPwYQiFEIWycvAP4oIlYp4zhceucus7oa0MHmv0FrWjHNZC4PnI4UlZ_QFH-Z5zY45Ci8WZic5QunHh7iCR5-_W8Brh7bNa75R27wqQyimucybXNu1nAjIUdLlIVEIs7KGuWgq0aeAJCvEkSRoE6IHxNIwgx0PFl0hAFjWsI9AeOkuQzpQhlZiksVfVww6MnHlM5YR6sHqH3p3EiKFFVUF9UUiXkve0b9MugRAqiWqnb6P8OLopY1nhJrgMyKQZBKBwfBBv3evBhmw6faZ8rYWWzpUCGe1bUQAFLhxfxop69KSsZQDsHdcubc/gxJmk0KdQ1Fj7FG5YMZNk2bMW3G3oawU/9)

name: Wes Moore
subject: 🏇Preakness
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=63%2E1086043%2ERv5jDH ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=63%2E1086043%2ERv5jDH ]Wes Moore for Governor

Hey folks!

Today’s the running of the Preakness Stakes — a proud Maryland tradition
celebrating its 150th anniversary this year.

It’s the final Preakness at the historic Pimlico Race Course after a
century and a half of horse racing history, and I’m looking forward to
seeing the races and the Baltimore community out in their best.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250517-1?refcode=em-20250517-1&refcode2=63_1086043_Rv5jDH&akid=63%2E1086043%2ERv5jDH ]Wes at Preakness

Last year, we approved a deal that will make Pimlico and the Park Heights
neighborhood the year-round home of thoroughbred racing, and ensure the
Preakness stays in Baltimore for decades to come. With the equine industry
making up a quarter of Maryland’s agricultural economy, it’s about
creating winners on and off the track.

Whether you’re at the race, watching at home, or enjoying your Saturday,
have a great weekend,
Maryland.

Elevate,

Wes

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250517-1?refcode=em-20250517-1&refcode2=63_1086043_Rv5jDH&akid=63%2E1086043%2ERv5jDH ]Donate ››

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.wesmoore.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=63%2E1086043%2ERv5jDH

name: Andrew Ollis, Kash Foundation
subject: Did Comey threaten the President?
body:

Patriot,

Former FBI Director James Comey posted a menacing message online. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j72OnTAUhJ_GdCD7mL8ULpIgVkp2UyRFlGp1sA8XZzFmbQPZt4-4Qrf95pNmBt062_FDseYLA5isiQyAyc8M4P3P4cL2131_yunbb5e_1z9cdabw9VJ3eMiLRu9ffj3fXvrn-NR16e3fz2MXDz19rPSQr9KCHNr5pE2XGSVHw8uMlGjKppJCSsgmBePQtpoPNdel1jSMojG60gMfpR7A1JlVwKHilWi5ABC8wFYgiRIllii1rlnJ7z0FOgpWo4jpwBC8d4X2LpvVlNIa78N6Bn2aKH_DOOWj3xaDyfqlCLTvhfYM-jjkxi-Y6JRlvyX3qtGtaG8Lk925o60Z1Cd3ZOzmmOwC7XHCQBdPFE4KvKw_vR5BXDj6LWhisovDRbRfEi2Jyc46vFEWlFkPO8821g0r-e1-6rywK_gfAAD__0cvjoI) Many people are interpreting “86” to mean remove or eliminate and “47” being President Trump.

When we started the Kash Foundation, we had a single mission in mind — expose the Deep State at all levels of the government.

**James Comey is one of the many Government Gangsters we’ve exposed over the years.**

The Kash Foundation was successful in exposing the Deep State. People know of their abuse and interference with our democracy.

However, our mission is not over.

[**Patriot****, please stand with us in bringing transparency and trust back to the government. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $100, or ANY amount you can contribute today toward our mission?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z81unDAQwPGnMTcQHpuvA4e2iEht0kN7qHqKZu1hcYMxsQ00bx-B0F5_85dmBu0ymeGjZdVXBjAaHRgAE18YwPvf3fr1n_3xlNL3PzZ9L3_a4pjCtyvd4BHPCp17-f18f-mfw1PXxbf_v_aNP_L4sdAjvpZmZNFMh1Zdolsx6Fwm1PJKVoXgQkAytgPetOJV3TSSS4HlUDdKFJwAm4aLWiemhRyKvOB1zgF4nmHNkbhEgRKFUiWT-bknQ0veKOQh7ui9czZTziZTO8a4hPOwnkEfR0rfMIzp4NZZYzRuzjxtW6Ycgz7cUu1mjHTEol-jfVVoFzT3mYnuuKMuGZSHW9JmtUx0nrYwoqfLI_lDIZdl87p7fnFwq1fERBdulyg3R5rjSR7vHpeRJ77Vy26myYSyYjK_n58df2wtfAYAAP__0r2POg)

The Kash Foundation's mission is to support educational and legal efforts needed to facilitate government transparency with the goal of creating a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens.

Focus Areas...
* Veterans, active duty military, and law enforcement financial assistance.

* Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover.

* Provide scholarships for Americans seeking tuition assistance for public, private, college, or other areas of education.

* Legal defense funds to support whistleblowers, defamed American citizens, and other governmental accountability efforts.

**Because Government Gangsters like James Comey hurt the reputation of our great institutions, I am personally calling on supporters to contribute to the Kash Foundation today to help us rebuild honor in our institutions. Your support will go toward assisting veterans, active duty military, and law enforcement.**

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=30e190666f594cf9adcb004f1586d379&_e=y3dc1-txW7-kDcSRe9NFoWeogOR_sTBnexSZF6aL4BVWT_KLCS3o-_C2L54HPdPeoPXP3boksilnP6dGEq4S937ZH3-mWXfmj9sw-AU0tCf5LwuFWmSwpC0WUWwfRyYQvsicud19iwuFIMtoCvS5e8AOi2RKiDeqIDVaUhBfCmw0mEFm79mjQw2JT4hEUPr8Fran4IA5FYVgnu9tkU7w7JMIxp5TNPzhVhdIFhLwx4olJB6ArI6Ob84hFwMKbN_iDpz9R-WUnm-mPEx5x-0r-LZjVaV0JivF-T83HxBD0U7TLRFVcIZj6s4rFwua384z8uQiCcsoBKyhGMHZMAY7fY2aWdSrfm8mfl91KfXaiww0PQB0H2Vlnp_InbovXIxKanj4qYE4eAx_74Ugp1qMAtsgeDSZNk0tBGXPQiiVByM%3D)

| | Peter, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.

| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=30e190666f594cf9adcb004f1586d379&_e=y3dc1-txW7-kDcSRe9NFoWeogOR_sTBnexSZF6aL4BVWT_KLCS3o-_C2L54HPdPeoPXP3boksilnP6dGEq4S937ZH3-mWXfmj9sw-AU0tCf5LwuFWmSwpC0WUWwfRyYQvsicud19iwuFIMtoCvS5e8AOi2RKiDeqIDVaUhBfCmw0mEFm79mjQw2JT4hEUPr8Fran4IA5FYVgnu9tkU7w7JMIxp5TNPzhVhdIFhLwx4olJB6ArI6Ob84hFwMKbN_iDpz9R-WUnm-mPEx5x-0r-DrL230S6TuC7xVAWwdIA8M_vT8wzNkddhroFO_OxqZ23zE9mycESUYsEVTCERT55TMuvjzrzV5YJmgu1YhRbOYvRrg9ImBabeInpI2wWQKkVDtR5R9DHSacWx3Nph8eGhmXtbWXpPip0sHlyFdipYY%3D)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=30e190666f594cf9adcb004f1586d379&_e=y3dc1-txW7-kDcSRe9NFoWeogOR_sTBnexSZF6aL4BVWT_KLCS3o-_C2L54HPdPeoPXP3boksilnP6dGEq4S937ZH3-mWXfmj9sw-AU0tCf5LwuFWmSwpC0WUWwfRyYQvsicud19iwuFIMtoCvS5e8AOi2RKiDeqIDVaUhBfCmw0mEFm79mjQw2JT4hEUPr8Fran4IA5FYVgnu9tkU7w7JMIxp5TNPzhVhdIFhLwx4olJB6ArI6Ob84hFwMKbN_iDpz9R-WUnm-mPEx5x-0r-BYrYlAyTBaKUs4mAHpWInhUEDwCM6ukqNi0uSmig7_0dGiuc1dz1tJlr5mjiRgty8DeXmQt56e5_asIGycfsg28vVfgq4CAi6f03L773GhEwJcv6pMzmMz_RSBk1pS5UUdir2jO5PXJHPZ_uPsVPng%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Friend – I’m counting on you right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign

| | | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8s1uhkmgug38mi643f9d2h522thml20k2lmc0fg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob5cdh2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5re4sb9so85fq5idbe8cbvh41gi8ep4pefe2c4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob5cdh2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. __[_**I 'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!**_](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjv2122o3rq2mjhqqtk8ma4ajbho7dmlmfphdhjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob5cdh2bs "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!")

name: Official Republican Communication [From Team Scalise]
subject: May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Get ready for your blood to boil!

| |
---
| | | **May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro!**

The Liberal Mob has declared all-out political war on the Trump Administration - and now they have a new target in the President's interim US Attorney in DC, Judge Jeanine.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu8h1vg2ejjah64q8knr4t113mpjdgd19qdpleso_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs "Jeanine pirro")
---

**[The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo12tb3oemmji2igve5oi736gvgktlfg4t34pm78_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs "The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed in a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:")**
* SNL debuted a DISGUSTING skit attacking her on Mother's Day
* A DNC operative called her an "EMBARRASSMENT"
* A prominent Liberal talking head called her a "LUNATIC"
* The Atlantic fired off a hit piece smearing her as a "PARTISAN HACK"
* The New Republic slammed her as "UNHINGED"

Judge Jeanine served as a District Attorney and has defended our values for decades. But her qualifications don't matter to the Liberal Mob.

They're going scorched earth against her anyway in a desperate attempt to:** 1)** eviscerate the reputations of Trump allies, **2) ** drive Republicans down at the polls, and ** 3) ** spin up Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

_It 's about power and money. Nothing else._

**That 's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for MAGA Patriots in moments like this. [So we're activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ltamdlm75uaaud41ci9jt2u9phjg0pgbag6ot0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs "So we’re activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.")**

We know it's ambitious.

But every dollar we collect will go DIRECTLY to help Republicans cut through the Liberal propaganda, fight back in battleground states, and broadcast the truth about President Trump and his closest allies.

If we falter, the consequences could be catastrophic: Congress could fall to the Democrats, handing them the power to impeach and remove scores of Trump officials, including the President himself.

**NOTHING would be worse for our plans to Make America Great Again. So we urgently need your help. Not next week, not next month ...**

RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW!

**This is the defining moment of the MAGA Movement -** **[will you rise to the challenge and join the fight?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvble3jsjur01q7vf8uh07g195jisl02ctncge90_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs "will you rise to the challenge and join the fight?")**
---
**[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkuapt079kjc4suoi4oe5jp5ovpldv3grammrjho_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zit6g55hm3maqv0e7pvdnuja8ho4m5in9mkbii7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu1l6v76h0aeq3mida4uari8tv76d9pboq5743e0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)**
---
- House GOP
_Sent via Team Scalise_

---
| |
* * *
---
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_

---

---

If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc6802bi6ij43pd2b79bo6fjq54f275fba456lv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ne76rgvgei665l5873sk6jisv7coutvjmb5eg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zodg44goqaiv2349q5efq8g0d6f3dholi5qp48g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zamc3qmtvrauvu7h04b48mfasvgnbie5cdgrelso_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Sen. John Kennedy
subject: A problem worse than a crawfish without seasoning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The truth is I can’t hold the line without you...

Friend,

I have a problem worse than a crawfish without seasoning.

_**The pink-haired, avocado toast-eating, wokesters in the Senate are doing everything they can to block us from keeping our promises to the American people.**_

**My Republican friends and I have been doing our best to keep them at bay, but the god 's honest truth is that we can't hold the line without the backing of loyal conservative crusaders like you.**

**[HOLD THE LINE](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn58n8l428i0f258v7cfhvkhppmji6r54uhmm6o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)**

Right now, our majority is thinner than a bayou breeze. Every vote is going to count until our next faceoff with the liberals in 2026.

I hate to ask, but the future of our nation is at stake. If Republicans don't have the $$ to win next year, we'll be on a one-way ticket back to the Socialism of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

Whatever you can spare to get us on track today - _**even if it 's only a few bucks**_ - would mean the world to me.

**[$25 TO HELP ME OUT](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0eeahcr5bjqp5nopne3diblirs9nr0vdba7fbmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)**

**[$50 TO HELP ME OUT](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo4koqmrbrhq0s19l7m0fv1phin7se2bgcra1ki0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)**

**[$100 TO HELP ME OUT](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za904hmjfn0nqpbu6n5gaj4f72ga8kp0u282hnl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)**

**[ANY $ TO HELP ME OUT](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcsjpuh88b7m5tt86bq3kncc0ha1lfg2qephgih0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)**

Thank you for taking the time to protect our majority. **I hope and pray the money from this email is enough to keep us afloat for another 2 years.**

Sincerely,

Senator John Kennedy

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9vg0r4sjtacsmthsc5h3uu20l1ctrtgqj0381ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm4ob1c3h2bs)

name: Fisico via Real American Reporting
subject: How To Stay Asleep All Night (Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed)
body:
Finally, fix your sleep

Tell me if this sounds familiar...

It's 2am and you're still staring at the ceiling...

You just can't seem to shut your brain off...

Your mind races a million miles an hour...

Maybe you can't stop thinking about money issues, health problems, or even something embarrassing you did or said...

Then, perhaps you finally DO fall asleep...

...only to jerk awake at 4am, knowing the next day you're going to feel tired, worn-out, and like a brain-dead zombie.

Does any of that ring a bell?

Well, just months ago... that was me...

I never slept more than 4 hours...

I felt exhausted, groggy, and dog-tired all the next day, downing pots of coffee to get through work...

And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife.

I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch.

And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything.

You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset."

Just [do this 20 minutes before you hop into bed...](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7710k8hc95umt2huvbfssd0ldt4prgjckvu19no_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj4cdh2bs)

And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones...

So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car...

Sleep through the ENTIRE night...

...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day.

Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute...

It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff...

Just [do this about 20 minutes before bedtime](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zf1l1pjga9q2vbq8juhk8m7962av6oqqt6u95uso_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj4cdh2bs) and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve.

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zpvefh31up473t1qhhck699rhtahcqufgmtrbv10_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj4cdh2bs)

==> [**Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed...)**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zolb736cjlo7bgunhi2tredgg528v4lu4mjilbh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj4cdh2bs)

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zaffhncoguvsi4os238c65nfvdvp8pv4h234gh9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs)
[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z01r08q1mj6s7el1e7f92ojp0v7gs7g63nbud3i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6ha4stsltvsvvkkm6i3bq5sf0j8saoj7tmjjmbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmcqn05jlhjvi6knl2iktu522vajj3mq6omcmcjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zoafl65a85hnu6i7anivqtocs1pgm62h64orgla8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd0fu2i1kn7are00qkg38lou5rmqgf6epllqin9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z250ad0tehh9dlrtl5eno54n3rpgj8t4d8u1q0i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaqm96higq6ivdnjjob7a75rosupumeq85uemlj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zimql12kg7gq962tdsoa79dvvi449ahfcip07v28_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg62g2cecno3er8vottrlq88k6bce72tp24uu4l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhmcpj2cdh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Friend – I’m counting on you right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign

| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkmmq8dsjn95lh2jurejmj6hsdlltptjdni06c1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm2oj6cph2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4on9b82q3g527khf4cg0j79vph4a6kcrejgjdso_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm2oj6cph2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. __[_**I 'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!**_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0cl28trii0v8dnlobepv317v5po7kgr5sp15070_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm2oj6cph2bs "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!")

My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Kind words from Mark Levin
body:
Honored and humbled. But let me be clear...

| **__A Personal Note from the Desk of Jim Jordan__**
---
Friend,
---
It was an honor to hear a great patriot like Mark Levin call me... _“truly one of the great Representatives.”_
---
But I know deep down... as hard as I fight every day, the GREATEST fighter in our country is _**YOU**_.
---
I recognize that every single one of our achievements and victories is _thanks to the Silent Majority of grassroots Americans like you who power our movement._
---
_Without your steadfast support, the MAGA movement would never have taken off and we’d all but certainly lost America to the Radical Left YEARS ago._
---
_But today, thanks to you, we are winning!_
---
Right now, we’re witnessing just how far the Left is willing to go to hold onto power for dear life.
---
They’re engaging in rampant legal warfare to try and bring down the Trump Administration, dismantle DOGE, stop deportations of illegal aliens, bring back DEI, and halt the agenda _YOU_ voted for.
---
**But the People’s House has stopped the Left dead in their tracks time and time again!**
---
Our _razor-thin_ House Majority truly is our last line of defense against the Left’s lawfare, which is why they’re outraising us 10:1 – _yes, you read that right: 10 to 1_ – to take the majority and silence our voices.
---
**In fact, Democrats have already introduced articles of impeachment in the House so that they can begin impeachment proceedings against President Trump if they seize power in the midterms.**
---
I transferred $2.5 MILLION from my own campaign to save our House majority in 2024. Protecting our majority mattered far more than my own re-election. And this time around, the stakes are just as high...
---
...That’s why I’m asking you to match my commitment to saving America by making a contribution of any amount you can.
---
_And if you cannot give at this time, don’t even think twice! All I ask is that you say a prayer for President Trump, the folks fighting hard at DOGE, and, of course, America._
---
[**Please make a contribution to MATCH my commitment to DEFEND our Majority and SAVE AMERICA.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlk2umtk1f4e0cit9kan776rg74a6t0jkkar2qd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm6o32chh2bs)

name: Sen. John Kennedy
subject: Our majority is thinner than a bayou breeze
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The truth is I can’t hold the line without you...

Friend,

I have a problem worse than a crawfish without seasoning.

_**The pink-haired, avocado toast-eating, wokesters in the Senate are doing everything they can to block us from keeping our promises to the American people.**_

**My Republican friends and I have been doing our best to keep them at bay, but the god 's honest truth is that we can't hold the line without the backing of loyal conservative crusaders like you.**

**[HOLD THE LINE](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkav50g136miabkgjch0akin47l1n7ofaegm4910_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm6o32c9h2bs)**

# **[A papacy begins: Pope Leo XIV calls for united Church at inaugural Mass](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Pope Leo XIV formally began his ministry as head of the 1.4 billion members of the universal Catholic Church with a Mass in St. Peter's Square on May 18, 2025. / Credit: Daniel Ibanez/CNA Vatican City, May 18, 2025 / 06:58 am (CNA). Pope Leo XIV on Sunday formally began his ministry as head of the 1.4 billion members of the universal Catholic Church, acknowledging divisions among the faithful with a call for fraternal communion and unity at his inaugural Mass.Addressing an estimated 150,000 people crowded into St. Peter’s Square and the surrounding streets, the 69-year-old pope, elected May 8, said, “I would like that our first great desire be for a united Church, a sign of unity and communion, which becomes a leaven for a reconciled world.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Kind words from Mark Levin
body:
Honored and humbled. But let me be clear...

| **__A Personal Note from the Desk of Jim Jordan__**
---
Friend,
---
It was an honor to hear a great patriot like Mark Levin call me... _“truly one of the great Representatives.”_
---
But I know deep down... as hard as I fight every day, the GREATEST fighter in our country is _**YOU**_.
---
I recognize that every single one of our achievements and victories is _thanks to the Silent Majority of grassroots Americans like you who power our movement._
---
_Without your steadfast support, the MAGA movement would never have taken off and we’d all but certainly lost America to the Radical Left YEARS ago._
---
_But today, thanks to you, we are winning!_
---
Right now, we’re witnessing just how far the Left is willing to go to hold onto power for dear life.
---
They’re engaging in rampant legal warfare to try and bring down the Trump Administration, dismantle DOGE, stop deportations of illegal aliens, bring back DEI, and halt the agenda _YOU_ voted for.
---
**But the People’s House has stopped the Left dead in their tracks time and time again!**
---
Our _razor-thin_ House Majority truly is our last line of defense against the Left’s lawfare, which is why they’re outraising us 10:1 – _yes, you read that right: 10 to 1_ – to take the majority and silence our voices.
---
**In fact, Democrats have already introduced articles of impeachment in the House so that they can begin impeachment proceedings against President Trump if they seize power in the midterms.**
---
I transferred $2.5 MILLION from my own campaign to save our House majority in 2024. Protecting our majority mattered far more than my own re-election. And this time around, the stakes are just as high...
---
...That’s why I’m asking you to match my commitment to saving America by making a contribution of any amount you can.
---
_And if you cannot give at this time, don’t even think twice! All I ask is that you say a prayer for President Trump, the folks fighting hard at DOGE, and, of course, America._
---
[**Please make a contribution to MATCH my commitment to DEFEND our Majority and SAVE AMERICA.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj9vp07b7lf41eujr6deci70sipl0ppbad1esnsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or4c1h2bs)
---

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeohcpkd6ei08d8748g16g32eu7nvc0ana3ifckg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or4c1h2bs)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9t2rqhnu4kqbl8elg9ahaelqle1ot0o47ie1f30_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or4c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlefo98oclmd72sct2eniarqfpicdgvgj1ak0tc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or4c1h2bs)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3sdr88879dq1ns6cdacr3mlrk7k028cjmjakutg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or4c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zefm1vgjb56ufkhshsu1n4rldno5kfpo3esd6nag_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or4c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg20ftlenrnb5tha7skbj5s6e7nvnro349g0sl8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or4c1h2bs)

Thank you and God Bless you,
---

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1otb15dkpgjmenbmj7gau5fgj915qoeonvb8g60_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd8bb8dobk2n6hro9o9mjvdiikv8ulfaha096u2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9h8t10h6ea92sqipvaf3ab5g5uurdvdupr63r0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8s958330n8md0hms87r205khrbrog2g0kf4k4k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbgm4cdkgc4ln221vul27um7gv7c1dda29cursbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za8tb2j779t8ac8a1k3h9toqnck2ufapms5j6smo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z40smfvgbfknl67tsdb8am59uceotofsn9pedd70_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuk97d0lb6vvoa3ftm55os1as6hvlgjflfndrva8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfv1lb4o2g90uhfq79d8lkntpg5ftagq98g653uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsbnmgmt07jteplfoeodkit2rp5nmip3hrncdtso_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2s55gaa1k2sh03k204496b71e4eh5okt5b8lquo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf077lo2r11d3faflolo7tjnd26922qb4mdrru90_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z07d4tc17m8usi20a0dcbjbork7tgqr074ssmkj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zstd5ov7jvuipq7or7t6qqf383an39o6pu0trba8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7clhm9or0cdh2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: Xavier Becerra
subject: $5 is all I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5fa50fa1-1834-4b62-a417-ce7434bebf39/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, I'm personally asking you to chip in a split donation of $5 to my campaign for governor in California and Blue Amp Action. If you're just hearing about my campaign for the first time, here's a couple quick things you should know about me and why I'm running:
* As California Attorney General, I took on the Trump administration 122 times and won most of them. As HHS Secretary, I fought to lower health care costs and prescription drug prices. That's the fight I'll bring as California's governor.
* I'm a lifelong Californian raised by blue-collar workers. Despite humble beginnings, my parents were able to own a home, send four kids to college or the military, and save enough to retire with dignity. That's the California Dream I'm fighting for – but I need your help.

[So how about it: Can I count on you to split just $5 – between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – to help my campaign get off to a strong start? Every dollar helps us build the strong grassroots movement we need to win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1f2d207-3a8f-41b2-a721-3209185a1eca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbeb22751-3ef5-44ee-944f-ed56739c93f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you so much for joining the fight for the future we all share.

Xavier Becerra

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f671f2f-2821-4f24-9430-7c81b2bdf02f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

# Sunday, May 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1980, Mt. St. Helens erupted in Washington, considered the most destructive volcano in U.S. history. The eruption caused a massive landslide on the north flank of the mountain and resulted in the loss of 57 lives. News footage of the eruption [can be seen here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcFuozwQx5-G3BwZG4Nz4AChab_kS6tqt9vdvaABj8Gpwalxg9inX5FX2LmM9JufRpr5v5_rMxhrxu4ZBsyDdvWI82QxBPS1QlB2Cc6PoBxOGm7Om4CtqxllglBBYlkrMHapk43KNSJDvsE8zpJMpGxH5abPQaRNJnhMRZNhkmgpgcJul8mUKi4k25h83UZFLGNKJRNbrlmDgDHskh3IjEUJRWWC89uLM2PoUdvF3dBvWzdsbN6HcJ0iXkTsELHDPM9b109b57uIHRrr7s0jfJixI-txRDsXoEPiNAk9ksF9jYFMgfRocZwI-q9rMG4kMCoCOqAfIPTbVg8RP3Sg6sl9-RYjXsURS1fQwnAF041GRbySTKaUphlbh42HO6TFWlWXVF398XZ5Ox7_i51Nz-X-4SiUPr48rnZr7_L-Mp_2xWWur1VZ9uX5wczF8IuyZ8MX6p--FdVBn-L_GyE7fnv58RtOkyjfP_zp-Pr5J-HF08_vj5-LbDmOZdm7_QLza3Gr6nJ-2PhcXWdjrZnSLEpoN4Cx9z-Gfwr_lrO_AQAA__9zKMH4). ## Tornado Outbreak Causes Mass Casualties
At least [23 people were killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb_G7hzBwxhTUGyTLttuaT3DI2YHmwjeJMrfjzyaP5jy6kpX95x_t-WGKafj_hd3chzLctCrZWKmugTCkN9c6oGhUIv4LDUx-bKAAD0IPch5CZjyexn74CIRkOrJSTMaPYEVc7-5KahV2zVEHHFWmoRdo1FGWkTy0WCf3LkmtJylEDPoi4qwEpJEO1qcDXSjoJC41Mv_kg7eKOZ3eVK9-LL32W3Mj9apPx1cO7ji4wQ4qzNUTj5TB9cfiOFFyBvVgbfPI1BtXOrehnsl5CHjB7UBQFkNAnDSq_DKeC8mr0dJaAxIA3114fFKOac2mW4U9x1T_r7Cv_L3dPAVAAD__9LXhJQ) in a tornado outbreak that swept across Missouri and Kentucky Friday night into Saturday. In London, Kentucky, at least 12 people have died, with Gov. Andy Beshear [warning the death toll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ_G7rAA44ALimvS5dorrU1Y4r1gNsLEPr_9KX_-N_jLGY1G882fy3QBSpTvv2FBXyNPGfc1Ya1YpoAQ0lG5ZAiMa4SNC1W88aSlHoQchHJTAErHZNrgI6LGvkWvrLHDSY_StbN3RvaytzgYe4rKKOjtKF20LiJGiKEl_26Tg3JKSqeHro_6ioAKRjOCs7oxEgNVLt1fplxnjOngDUt346VNfq71uTb9r0afG33e972L_G9HqPMn8jY_SrzZGn3-cIlvMMGvei0ID8EzsdggJTzEA3N93R6HWGhd-VVIUA4EGdriw3OnlGg92cbI-wKUvqbUH_23ef0_AAD__8xuiGc) is expected to rise as rescue efforts continue. The storm system also spawned tornadoes in Wisconsin, triggered a heat wave in Texas, and caused [a dust storm that enveloped Chicago](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OpDAQBOCngczImB9D4OCSyebSC1GP3eA-GTyye_CyT7-a1b7Bpp9KpVL9uy93oEDH9hd2NLzG5cCSAzJjWhyCCxfHdICLmFc4YyJGGxcl1SDkINppcUDhWvramRVRYVejaXWvh1HNcqq90WMP0mmQw2znzqLGhx3dasexA92PbU3m3SaHdmqlnNTQdKt6IGALcz_DpFXVS3TEMTX_Ix3scQ1XPDE1Nu51MJ75mavuT6VulbqVUpo1fnTKerKwxXfozQjsMVXq9uPCvTKLzDHtokA66NiEp82LQofLwqVL5EhBePiE5OIrC05wYqiTcc9CIVAeddXLbQcK30v4V_edRn0FAAD__zRwh5Q) on an otherwise sunny day.
## Inmates Escape New Orleans Jail
Ten inmates, including some facing murder charges, escaped from a New Orleans jail early Friday, [prompting a manhunt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2ynDAMx09jOhhZYDCFizR0L21KRg-LXe8YzNjaZbh9huQIr5Gan_T_-PM1f1GIYX_8po2drGne-SyRRTjPnsnHS1LeyScuK31SDsJLmhHQ1GBqbWdPIV5zV3m3MiO3FTs9dIPpcQRbPZ1feqYBmDSbbwsAg_fYLkRAeunRVsHd38BoqwEsmqZd8ZuJNY3dSHZA1QH7ICk3rxR2efIar_Th3Cxpq6J7ihxFtb8UTgqn8zybdyFJnq4bUDgVSflSON3J7kUS0q5wumUVTnAPPfwH6pQj017qF4VYc1no4DrsGwmXOvNCh7wze4WTbftRG6MB7tMqO3-cIcZQ-kF18NgoxH8G5Uetfhz-DQAA__8Uw4pF) that has led to the recapture of three inmates, while seven remain at large. Surveillance footage captured the inmates prying open one of the cell doors before sprinting across Interstate 10 and into a neighborhood. The [escape was only discovered](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2y2zAMhE9DdfCQ0K8LFWnUvbQpNbQJWnihCA8Jy-PbZ5QrvAYNdr_Z3T9f65fnxPnx2-80a5Q107smUqWyBvIhfVRK9kGoRn9IYaW7rGixB9uDm9bgOX3WrglzJEJqG5rd2I39gFc7NdtME3ZDe7VD6ANae4_D6Nqbs1PA-9gjNTyfNNu7yVk7YX9pI97Ik_PX7uqnEU1nKbBKuXwLZ90opo8cVC532Zs0b6rPatpfBheDS_48per5MricYIOLPY8bDS6vCmc_g8ubU4CDAwnUTd4VnIWDJVFW4Lx7pQoxEXF-QCyynz6QksjnCt-eE_ioVOBWyP89RfJSONiDCidS2CSRwaUpc3i-OSWuw2g6-9g9p__B9UdrHzP-CwAA__8SnpSE) during a routine morning headcount eight hours later. Orleans Parish Sheriff Susan Hutson said, _"We have the indication that these detainees[received assistance in their escape](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGK8yAURp_G7Ax6o4lZuPjhJ7vOZhhmGW70prUYLSotefuh8wqz_uDjnPN9WS8YYkjXDzzItj2viV41UmtUVk_o49lySegz1R2fuYRGLq8gQHOhuTSrxxDPVXXe7kRAQ0dWTmrSI8zCdDc7bNvmcDRK-mFDr92spJGjkm7WGoXpgn2_CS2NFMKA7ocdNkKSOKsZzQRMCfKh5dLfc0jtRns885NK7_LRRXtr7VHZ8I_BwmDBzb0N-mt-zwyWr08Gi5T8oMSpOnwQT_TiuUTCVPkdQ-Qupxo8FfIcy0GewVJbLicbluDZ8F-CNNMspqkr1j9eIcZQx4kpcT0wxF-O9qd4Tws_AQAA__8ES4J6) from inside our department.”_
## "Mr. Irrelevant" Signs Huge Contract With 49ers
The San Francisco 49ers [agreed to terms with quarterback Brock Purdy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAUBOCnwR0WHIN_Coo07jZtSgubw-5JMFjAruU8_ZXvK9z6k2ZG8-exPCwFis_fdkdTfVoiniVgrZgXh9aFq6YcrUtYvP2kTBW3tIAAzYXmclycpXAtqnHGIwJ2DRo5qEH3MImxeRmr-9V30sKo1Lquq5ukxMGBn7ybnHYNmTtNaDlKIUbQbedhRYvSTmqy4wBMCXRUU27_Jor1hT5c6YO53dLeBPOq9Sis-8VgZjCf59liOeKNDOboA4O51JQvBvPCYCbHYFZ32yC729I7b1h4pIi58DWn7R8_3tld3FO0gf5TfHLNL7SZQ6937tCGJht3nBQClX5gSjx3S-F7UP3Rix8DXwEAAP__UcGGnA) on a five-year, $265 million contract on Friday, including $181 million guaranteed. The former Iowa State quarterback becomes the[ seventh-highest-paid player](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnsTcs_BtsGBi6eEvXjhaBn4SWQAR_4vrtq1TqE3T8dNKddB-n7WRjivnybm9oKJQt494SEmHdPFqfDio1W1-wBfssNRK6sgEHybhko9q8jenYRO9NQAScejTjIhY5g-aqvxqttAI_i7P1AaWfxTTqSaCEeVzQK95H82rjclQj5wrkMAU4o8XRaqGtWqATHH2kUofPEjNdMaSjPLEOrtz6ZK5E99ZNbx2sHaz7vg8tvqIO1hxSB6vQWNtLuLc_snMt7ovdH9UfLFiHrLn6oJgP5kqmah0x_CbMLZbcV-Pve0wptnnpBL_cbEy_6_Svy54GfgIAAP__kO-BSA) in the NFL in terms of annual average value. In his first three seasons, he [won 23 of his 36 regular-season starts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQRL8GZ1jQBtsTEFzibC-90OoxzZpbDCPoHZ___jTzCxuUVMFTqfT-fKwfGFPMn7_xIMehrJnOloiZ6uoJfbq41Iy-UAv4LDUybWUFBVYqK_W8eozpWk3nXSACGjpyejKTHeGm5m53fhr0hl4ZbXCclb6b4A1MRNb6AHruonutKatnrdQMth8C3AlJ483ccJ5AGEU-cqn93xIz7xTSVZ5U-60cXXI786OJ4ZeARcDSHqVy6y_cS3kBApYckoAFK8ctkYBlL6c0N6pNYvbyXsv2JR_f1V-ycf3eviTKM-Z3PGGSZ-RdwmjlEVOKJUv6x5TbqymtlNVmGPudj9RV5x_nC2rjJIz6PDCm90v-kdqng_8BAAD__-AGjoM) and threw for 64 touchdowns and 27 interceptions. Selected with the last pick in the 2022 NFL Draft, Purdy earned the “Mr. Irrelevant” nickname, bestowed each year on the final pick of the seventh round.

subject: Learn economics with Art Laffer
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer," is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aU2O8763K0tuCBuu_W0qnw~~/AARclBA~/fcdAQ3P8d3LjALLUT0RqLTvy2K3RPUw_uT085XJaErY3k_eHo_tU57KeFEkLgULcW7-C3m0B5RKg00SQAYPXSYvB3hrZij67n1vj970xBrFnN5ATGAl1xx0n2v8X4xJj-qnNG6wRzIqEIsEi9DCDBGxWiRQhHIu69_EA1TpNQWimT-T0eVJIr6G8ZMmBkPe_yRI-cjnmbvJqpcEBV9WSEVmpFNJIhNXNyGeV7JpDAFDOVxjVrX99K-tZt0Crb7oVjXCXaYQBMphJw2s2nYBsWvZEe4L_h8-4dUcNIJyLfwtU2YK5uTjUrEz0ULLnqSowVEA63iw3zYNPL2EcbqyujI6qWszzmeewprZRywUiW_E~)

| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aU2O8763K0tuCBuu_W0qnw~~/AARclBA~/fcdAQ3P8d3LjALLUT0RqLTvy2K3RPUw_uT085XJaErY3k_eHo_tU57KeFEkLgULcW7-C3m0B5RKg00SQAYPXSYvB3hrZij67n1vj970xBrFnN5ATGAl1xx0n2v8X4xJj-qnNG6wRzIqEIsEi9DCDBGxWiRQhHIu69_EA1TpNQWimT-T0eVJIr6G8ZMmBkPe_yRI-cjnmbvJqpcEBV9WSEVmpFNJIhNXNyGeV7JpDAFDOVxjVrX99K-tZt0Crb7oVjXCXaYQBMphJw2s2nYBsWvZEe4L_h8-4dUcNIJyLfwtU2YK5uTjUrEz0ULLnqSowVEA63iw3zYNPL2EcbqyujI6qWszzmeewprZRywUiW_E~) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aU2O8763K0tuCBuu_W0qnw~~/AARclBA~/fcdAQ3P8d3LjALLUT0RqLTvy2K3RPUw_uT085XJaErY3k_eHo_tU57KeFEkLgULcW7-C3m0B5RKg00SQAYPXSYvB3hrZij67n1vj970xBrFnN5ATGAl1xx0n2v8X4xJj-qnNG6wRzIqEIsEi9DCDBGxWiRQhHIu69_EA1TpNQWimT-T0eVJIr6G8ZMmBkPe_yRI-cjnmbvJqpcEBV9WSEVmpFNJIhNXNyGeV7JpDAFDOVxjVrX99K-tZt0Crb7oVjXCXaYQBMphJw2s2nYBsWvZEe4L_h8-4dUcNIJyLfwtU2YK5uTjUrEz0ULLnqSowVEA63iw3zYNPL2EcbqyujI6qWszzmeewprZRywUiW_E~) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aU2O8763K0tuCBuu_W0qnw~~/AARclBA~/fcdAQ3P8d3LjALLUT0RqLTvy2K3RPUw_uT085XJaErY3k_eHo_tU57KeFEkLgULcW7-C3m0B5RKg00SQAYPXSYvB3hrZij67n1vj970xBrFnN5ATGAl1xx0n2v8X4xJj-qnNG6wRzIqEIsEi9DCDBGxWiRQhHIu69_EA1TpNQWimT-T0eVJIr6G8ZMmBkPe_yRI-cjnmbvJqpcEBV9WSEVmpFNJIhNXNyGeV7JpDAFDOVxjVrX99K-tZt0Crb7oVjXCXaYQBMphJw2s2nYBsWvZEe4L_h8-4dUcNIJyLfwtU2YK5uTjUrEz0ULLnqSowVEA63iw3zYNPL2EcbqyujI6qWszzmeewprZRywUiW_E~)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

## Five District Attorneys Sue AG Ken Paxton
Five county district attorneys [are suing Attorney General Ken Paxton](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhDAMhJ8mdKDE_KZIcQ3dXnslcoiBSFmySsyy-_YntrgXuMay5M8zo_m5TTf0we_rN97J8GuJ005nDsRMadrQB4vXmjMjk43HPtMWjwkktKVsSzVMDn14T03hjJVOq4KM6pu-7TrZ62Izaq4t1nq2BFYNerFymTtYtAbX9C3UhTeXmGzVoJRUqq-o7sh1GgftrFV1KxpJznNMFW_E9MK8hHd8UqrmeC-C2ZgfWdRfAkYB43me1Qfi5O2xUxXTKmC8PASM8hqqEzB-mBKZY9rpXa60U8JQOn89zvx3yWXAMx-es4CxSMY9Th-Cz10vGrne0YdPDP5feU8DvwEAAP__iKGFPQ) over a new rule they claim violates state and federal law. The rule, which mandates counties hand over nearly all documents requested by the attorney general's office, was implemented in April and applies to counties with populations over 400,000. In two separate lawsuits, the district attorneys claim the law cited by the new rule, Chapter 56, does not give Paxton the jurisdiction the rule creates. Paxton, however, called the rule a "straightforward, common-sense measure," and called the lawsuit "meritless." Both parties are awaiting further action by the court, and the second lawsuit is yet to be published. The first suit involving Bexar, Dallas, and Harris counties [can be found here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSgyAYhJ9GOxwgIlBQXGOXa690fuU3MkfEgd9o3v7GvMJ1X7G7s7s_9-EOIYb18Q1PdHTOaVjxKBGJMA8LhDjChaUQEI5pXydc0j5ILhXjigkzeAjxPbS1dyP3VtTohG616jqubb046AyANlYrLY2dlOXCwKxGQKvNNOs6uCuMK2GE4ELoBm8d-s6CsX4cxU1VLUcfKOWGFiQ8oczxnV6Ymyk96-gWoq1Ut69K9pXsj-No5nS214xLUMn-wkr2Hyvbcio47ZRyYWVH9osr2-CktDIPMUJhlOEVChvxhMwWyDkUNqV9pXednd-OEGMona5a_nhCiJ8W9L_vXk7-BQAA__8oDocy).
## SpaceX Gets Greenlight
The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) [approved SpaceX to launch 25 rockets](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAMhp-GdIzAGQIUFNek22uvjJzE2SCRgIDMZt7-xLzCNpYl__r0-f_3NX2hD_78_osHuXpvcTrppwSqlfK0ow8ztrWUipXmeJ0L7fGaQIDiQnFpphV9eE_PbnWzWK3syEn91GoYhLbd7kS_GaO0NQAI1gx2trih0RsCKdVD512DCSWNlEJK_aB-oHWwaOw6z7JX7Clo9TXmR92p0o1lC-_4ovxY4tEFt9eaCuv_MBgZjCXRUvN1hLhgaL-0FIOx3u0Yr7rzD4NT4AlLZDC2FIOxaTAYRRtSMxg3RI4p5fiiwkHxknChmwe8zmWnwhNl_ibMXXZr-vEh-DJo9hTfB_rwkau_q_Tl4H8AAAD__wg3ixY) per year, increasing the number from the previous amount of five per year. The increase is the latest development for SpaceX, following the incorporation of Starbase--voted on by residents of the soon-to-be city, most of whom are SpaceX employees. The FAA [is currently reviewing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u6yAUhFeDOyzA_wXFa9zltbe0DuYQkIix4DhOdn9lb-E2oylG3yfNz2N5QIhhe_6HF2r6uLRseJaIRJgXDyEauGopBIQmHduKPh2LEqrjouNyXCyE-F3aymoj7CQr1HJoh67vxTBVXrd27LC1xoFyAoVw0iKO2Dg7IKjJVUFfMNHJUUoh5VBj06PtJxgna4xsOtYKtIFSrskj4QeKi9_0xlyv6VVF7Yn2wpp_TM1Mzed51veIcjDHhnXKT6bmy8HULK6QPVNz2WHFD3cAPMKxrZ7Dvuf0hsgLQTZQkN8cpuYqa7ufIcZQ-oG14vmCEG87_e2zt1a_AQAA__9y3IHy) the company's newest rocket, Starship Flight 9, and has given approval for some modifications--stopping short of a full approval. Elon Musk stated his intent to be in Starbase next week to discuss the "game plan for Mars," as SpaceX is [set to begin crewed missions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAQRk9jOpDH_BgKF9vQZdst0RgPwZLBiJmE5Par7BW2-4pP70nv5zbdMKa4379xIyevJU87XZxIhM5pxZg8fiazoJDPj32mNT8mo01b6raEfgoY03tqiuC8DgMU5MA2tu06bYdidTgvfqkNWksN0GyWBULT1y3oPpjWz0V0H5huoQfQALaiuqPQDdgPwXuoW9VoClHyWclKQi_kJb3zk85qzluR3CpysKq_lBmVGa_rqrY344675D3mz0mZ0T847sSszIinxDmRMiMfONOrZMGT13iUG55cGm26Egbbd9Do6liP4nThuGJKkTurGn3fMKY_t_yv2NOZ3wAAAP__d1eBJQ) to the planet by 2028.
## Severe Weather Strikes
Parts of the state were hit with severe weather and golf ball-sized hail on Friday evening, with some residents [reporting hail up to 2.5 inches](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAYhJ8GOwygohYU19jttVeaX_ldyCEY-HfdffuL-wrXzWSS-TLzc5tv4IOP92_Y0dBrS3PEswQkwjw78GGBS5ZCQLikR1zRpceshOq46LgcZgs-vOe2smYRdpQVGtm3fae16MfKGYBVNrZdhs0OiLIXehs2oZttbdoOcay8ucpEJwcphZR9jY1Gq0cYRrsssulYK9B6Srkmh4QvKFt4pyfmek17FYwjOgprvpiamJrO86x_XxCv8LII5DAzNR0uUSr82sQLpbxzCzvckWc8Uia03Ee-YqQMgX8wTE1VNvY4fQi-6J614r6DDx8u_e-tp1F_AQAA__8ZHoGA) in diameter. Central Texas saw damaging winds and hail on Saturday, prompting weather alerts through this evening. Meteorologists warn of possible hail [up to 2 inches](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8mdEFJ-AkUKbahu9tuiQw2Q6RARolnMrz9inmF21m2fPR959_P_AM--PPxFw5y_NnifFLJgZgpzTv4sMA95szAtMTXudIeX7NRppOqk3qYEXy45rZCtygcdUVO29Z2fa_sWO1usH0D2qIageyGODTbttq2aZXFRrWq8u4OU50etFZa25qanrAfYRhxWXTTiVYReo6p5p2YPpC3cMU3pXqNRxXczvzMovkjzCTMVEqp1yXfFvddmOn7Isx0r4SZEEKALLeYWJaYeJeZ3pRIFgLeKcnbWhZ_YpYZ-JUQLnnAJbWVN6kwU5UcPosPwefeilY9DvDhS8O_6_DtzP8AAAD__0blh38) in diameter and strong, damaging winds today. You can see a video of some of the [large hail seen this weekend here.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL8GOiPbYDsULq6hy7VXogUvwdKCI3sTyN-fuF-47hWjGb35uY93iBT3xzds6Plc0rjjUQiZMY8rRJrgwlIYGKf02mdc02vUUhshjVC3MUCkz9jVwU8y9KpGr1znjLXS9fXqlbbGQABn7RxaazuzGNVOEuZ5VgpcHf1VJo26KSWVcg22FoPt4daHaVKtqTqJIXLKDa_IeEJZ6JPemJs5bTX5lflZqvar0kOlh-M4miWd3aVxBSo9XFjpgSA_UFxOhdOORSxAJAIQQRFLyiyOlHkVG3JOT8Kzzj48j0gUi3VVJx8bRPob5f9d9fb6NwAA__8cC4Bw)

The rule, which mandates counties hand over nearly all documents requested by the attorney general's office, was implemented in April and applies to counties with populations over 400,000. In two separate lawsuits, the district attorneys claim the law cited by the new rule, Chapter 56, does not give Paxton the jurisdiction the rule creates. Paxton, however, called the rule a "straightforward, common-sense measure," and called the lawsuit "meritless." Both parties are awaiting further action by the court, and the second lawsuit is yet to be published. The first suit involving Bexar, Dallas, and Harris counties . Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=204a358bee594e5297f147bfcabae777&_e=s7RT-i4iMPAlnqjY7J5Cru7iUJmcsKC4ozTd7sKqaz9ajlcZsOMINRJJeYysjfc4rQtrHCZ30e05CQexkn9nJORO4eE81pKkFrxxmUa5nRnFD2Z8d9lMG-WPfWq8FzYVegw3zhav2Kxgs0fynPQCZxS_wC2dpGR0xy77WAMsAyhn1D_tabUG6YC7l3ob5wqt3e2WaAFg4KBdtHrn8wNIJf22U3il31thpohPrAWKO1ie3LniRfcQ2LTFp5DosORli4KbHjfCmqz9kj7yx69sACPjwooJjs4hrBPh7rONt8b3ZOqXzMAI3C6jwjLhv2FJNkKF5T4bK1RcuRhYVhTVvQ%3D%3D)

name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: please read from top to bottom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.

| | | **☀️ **To each of Abigail's dear supporters, **🇺🇲**

We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom.
---
| | We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. _Our average gift last month was a hair under $30._

It adds up fast, but unfortunately, not everyone is in a position to give. And we completely understand that.
---
| | The fact is that our opponent knows we have momentum on our side, and Democrats nationwide view our race as a bellwether for 2026 (and beyond!). Moreover, Virginia has the only election this year where Democrats can flip a Governor’s seat blue.

_That's why the same far-right billionaire donors who sent Trump to the White House are pouring money into Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign._
---
| | Now, with the general election just weeks away, we have to ramp up our outreach to folks across the Commonwealth.

Our opponent is already paying for digital ads distorting Abigail's record, but it’s only going to get more intense. Setting the record straight is going to be expensive -- which is why our team set an ambitious fundraising goal for the month of May.
---
| | While it may not seem like much, if every person reading this email contributed even $5, we’d breeze past our goal and have enough resources to win.

[_**What do you say, Peter? clean_body: We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. | | | ☀️ To each of Abigail's dear supporters, 🇺🇲 We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom. | | We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. Our average gift last month was a hair under $30. It adds up fast, but unfortunately, not everyone is in a position to give. And we completely understand that. | | The fact is that our opponent knows we have momentum on our side, and Democrats nationwide view our race as a bellwether for 2026 (and beyond!). Moreover, Virginia has the only election this year where Democrats can flip a Governor’s seat blue. That's why the same far-right billionaire donors who sent Trump to the White House are pouring money into Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign. | | Now, with the general election just weeks away, we have to ramp up our outreach to folks across the Commonwealth. Our opponent is already paying for digital ads distorting Abigail's record, but it’s only going to get more intense. Setting the record straight is going to be expensive -- which is why our team set an ambitious fundraising goal for the month of May. | | While it may not seem like much, if every person reading this email contributed even $5, we’d breeze past our goal and have enough resources to win. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = | | 💪 Your support means so much at this critical moment of the race. ♥️ Together, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O.
