name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Your gut’s right—something’s off with Shapiro
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=134dbda21c&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Good government starts with accountability — even for Shapiro](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fc0b7c7b27&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By The Editors_
In 2023, Mike Vereb — a member of Governor Josh Shapiro’s cabinet and a longtime ally of the governor — was[ forced to resign](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=121676108d&e=b7b3eddce2) after a sexual harassment scandal. Only while he was in the mix to possibly be the vice-presidential candidate for Kamala Harris did Shapiro say he had[ no early knowledge of the incidents](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=419bb2b427&e=b7b3eddce2), and the mainstream press has not questioned him on this. Since then, _Broad + Liberty_ has been working to nail down the details of the investigation the administration allegedly conducted into Vereb. Our premise was very simple: when faced with charges of abuse in his own ranks, would he — his words — go after these kinds of cover-ups and abuses? Or would he protect the powerful and the institution they serve at the expense of the victim? When it was his turn to deal with abuse and institutional protection in his own domain, how did this governor respond? To be overly generous, the responses from his office have not built our confidence in the governor’s claims. The biggest problem in researching this question is that when we requested the emails Vereb’s accuser sent in her final week on the job, we were told that there were none. Further requests through the Office of Open Records and the courts produced an even more shocking truth: her entire account had been deleted. No archive, no nothing. Just gone. **Why It Matters.** Who ordered what and when? It’s impossible to say for sure when the governor keeps stonewalling. We can only speculate what the deleted records might have shown — and that’s the problem. When a public agency destroys records, it prevents accountability by design. That’s why the law treats it as a serious offense. We have no doubt they understand that the[ destruction of public records](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b3078dfe87&e=b7b3eddce2) is a crime in this state. There is no question records were destroyed. Someone destroyed them. Given the risks, why? It’s time for the man who once held Pennsylvania’s most powerful investigative post to turn that scrutiny on his own administration. The governor and the governor’s office cannot be allowed to simply destroy documents without consequence. Should that be the case, then Pennsylvania’s Right to Know Law is a tiger without teeth — it is no law at all.** ** **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2a42460bf8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Cyber charter students, the piñata in Harrisburg](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8bae2e7c74&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
There is a group of students in our state who have become a political piñata — the object attacked repeatedly, with those wielding the political “stick” wearing blindfolds choosing not to see the students they’re attacking.

Worse, the attackers encourage other parents also to attack these students, and their parents. These students already had their education funding cut for 2024-25 and 2025-26, yet some politicians want to take another financial whack at them. They are the only segment of students to have their funding cut for two years in a row.

Cyber charter students: they are Harrisburg’s tragic piñata.

**Why It Matters**. In a state with about two million K-12 students, cyber students account for just 70,000 — about 3.5 percent. More importantly, cyber students only receive about 68 percent of what is spent on local public school district students. In 2025-26, they are scheduled to get even less — about 66 percent — of what’s spent on their peers in school district schools. Yet some want more cuts.

District schools have never had more money to spend, have billions in reserve, and cyber students account for only 3.5 percent of all students. So why focus on them?

Cyber schools work for over 70,000 students — and more each semester. They’re accountable to parents and taxpayers as they’re regulated by the Pennsylvania Department of Education. They’re far less expensive. It’s a win-win-win. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d99ab6e536&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Shapiro silent on Save Women’s Sports Act](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3903570f73&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: New hope from Rome?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8b823b3988&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Sen. Jarrett Coleman: It’s time to end Covid penalties on small businesses](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e5109657ae&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Boraski declines Falls Twp. reelection bid, supports Loteckie; Lawson also running](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0a96493c8e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Two vastly different visions of what America is and should be](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0199dfd2d8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Latest report on officers killed in the line of duty](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1db408e45c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stephen Gambescia: Fields of pink](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d3e3a87681&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4._Broad + Liberty_ gets results!**
No one else in the Delaware Valley was writing about the Democrats’ shenanigans with the fake school board sample ballots. But after Beth Ann Rosica’s article on the subject, the cat was out of the bag. A short time later, [a local court approved a settlement with the Democrat-aligned PAC](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d7fff1d795&e=b7b3eddce2) that enjoined them from sending out any more fake mailers and required them to mail an apology and explanation to everyone who received one. It’s just another example of how a free and independent press can help to keep politicos honest.****
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c499ef1367&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
A year after Joe Biden challenged Donald Trump to a debate “any time, any place,” we are awash in news stories and books about how the 46th President of the United States was already deep into the state of mental decline that led to his disastrous debate performance, his withdrawal from the race, and the re-election of President Trump. One such is [featured in the _New Yorker_ this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1a64052135&e=b7b3eddce2), an excerpt of the forthcoming book by Jake Tapper and Alex Thompson. Democrats now blame Biden, but will they point the fingers at themselves, as well? A White House eager to lie about the President’s condition and a credulous corporate press that believed every word all led to a country not being run by the man elected to lead it. It’s a national scandal that goes beyond just one man.********
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

When a public agency destroys records, it prevents accountability by design. That’s why the law treats it as a serious offense. We have no doubt they understand that the is a crime in this state. There is no question records were destroyed. Someone destroyed them. Given the risks, why? It’s time for the man who once held Pennsylvania’s most powerful investigative post to turn that scrutiny on his own administration. The governor and the governor’s office cannot be allowed to simply destroy documents without consequence. Should that be the case, then Pennsylvania’s Right to Know Law is a tiger without teeth — it is no law at all. | | 2. By Guy Ciarrocchi There is a group of students in our state who have become a political piñata — the object attacked repeatedly, with those wielding the political “stick” wearing blindfolds choosing not to see the students they’re attacking. Worse, the attackers encourage other parents also to attack these students, and their parents. These students already had their education funding cut for 2024-25 and 2025-26, yet some politicians want to take another financial whack at them. They are the only segment of students to have their funding cut for two years in a row. Cyber charter students: they are Harrisburg’s tragic piñata. Why It Matters. In a state with about two million K-12 students, cyber students account for just 70,000 — about 3.5 percent. More importantly, cyber students only receive about 68 percent of what is spent on local public school district students. In 2025-26, they are scheduled to get even less — about 66 percent — of what’s spent on their peers in school district schools. Yet some want more cuts. District schools have never had more money to spend, have billions in reserve, and cyber students account for only 3.5 percent of all students. So why focus on them? Cyber schools work for over 70,000 students — and more each semester. They’re accountable to parents and taxpayers as they’re regulated by the Pennsylvania Department of Education. They’re far less expensive. It’s a win-win-win. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4.Broad + Liberty gets results! No one else in the Delaware Valley was writing about the Democrats’ shenanigans with the fake school board sample ballots. But after Beth Ann Rosica’s article on the subject, the cat was out of the bag. A short time later, that enjoined them from sending out any more fake mailers and required them to mail an apology and explanation to everyone who received one. It’s just another example of how a free and independent press can help to keep politicos honest. | | | 5\. What we're reading A year after Joe Biden challenged Donald Trump to a debate “any time, any place,” we are awash in news stories and books about how the 46th President of the United States was already deep into the state of mental decline that led to his disastrous debate performance, his withdrawal from the race, and the re-election of President Trump. One such is , an excerpt of the forthcoming book by Jake Tapper and Alex Thompson. Democrats now blame Biden, but will they point the fingers at themselves, as well? A White House eager to lie about the President’s condition and a credulous corporate press that believed every word all led to a country not being run by the man elected to lead it. It’s a national scandal that goes beyond just one man.**** | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. But don't get too comfortable, folks. When Democrats panic, they're like a bad cook in the kitchen - they start throwing everything at the wall and hoping something sticks. So, here's the deal. The GOP is closing up shop on voter verification records TONIGHT, and we still haven't heard from you. We've had Tim Scott, Tom Cotton, Ted Cruz, Bernie Moreno, and Kellyanne Conway all on the phone, wondering where you are. It's like your grandma calling to ask why you haven't visited in a while - except instead of guilt-tripping you into eating more mashed potatoes, they're asking you to verify your voter profile! So, what's it gonna be? Are you in, or are you out? Complete the Official 2025 Voter Verification Questionnaire now, and let's show the Democrats what we're made of! body:
I’ve had it.
The Democrats’ effort to destroy our way of life ENDS NOW!

|
---
| | | Friend,

**As a mom of four, a small business owner, and a proud defender of our Second Amendment rights, I'm fed up with the Democrats' attempts to undermine our values and destroy our way of life. And I know you are too.**

I've just gotten my hands on a __**[confidential memo](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=88d880d0510d4ab7babb7e5960c51879&_e=FwxcNP91FNK_7Qs8TVxMPRzTyT3it7krZJVNcZtJhuZF_qlaaB2QuZaYUSCrZEemADqs30LL85rGF7QNx51QES4ZeXFg2RX1TilDF3i8Ara5VLs61WH7wAGRnEh7MUGE-SO1Ifh7ONx6JX3jqIz8P1FRqCldj4zmqdzbCJgm5Pq0Nv0D9wKos0Z0FL5RWySj0pWdZc5laqA9z4HJXX34Q13V2iyetf1zNz0FJGV2QH7Mf0Py8-MBiT2rF1hif6GalQYUzmmdrSqMUEep2ZtH6svSD6iUfTSpgLPqC-ZQxncE0DiIOSL4lf27PbVr7u_TY4RB06i3hJnyY4aJRY_pqcRlLe0DHes686xsr0R1J5K4UdLu_2oQGjK6u38DNwCbhb55ziRnVo17Y_dcSysgQXSM-PrJbffpsDOo7znRcSg%3D "confidential memo")**__ from the _Democrats' top strategists,_ and it's worse than we thought. They're planning to unleash a **$100 MILLION** war chest to **TAKE DOWN** our House Majority and **IMPOSE** their socialist agenda on America.

_But I've got a message for them:_**Not on my watch.** As a member of the House Freedom Caucus and a proud representative of Colorado's rural communities, I'm used to fighting for what's right, even when the odds are against us.

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=88d880d0510d4ab7babb7e5960c51879&_e=FwxcNP91FNK_7Qs8TVxMPRzTyT3it7krZJVNcZtJhuZF_qlaaB2QuZaYUSCrZEemADqs30LL85rGF7QNx51QES4ZeXFg2RX1TilDF3i8Ara5VLs61WH7wAGRnEh7MUGE-SO1Ifh7ONx6JX3jqIz8P1FRqCldj4zmqdzbCJgm5Pq0Nv0D9wKos0Z0FL5RWySj0pWdZc5laqA9z4HJXX34Q13V2iyetf1zNz0FJGV2QH7Mf0Py8-MBiT2rF1hif6GalQYUzmmdrSqMUEep2ZtH6ip_RLGarb8tAhNTA6OmOU44gjE9l_puOt4RJBJ4ygz6FbLB_JX-eea5SRZLQrY8s8guKHeSLUSolR_p1vkMC-x7iF-ibxeZ2nOCSJoGRu4iwqnZ2UGNi9j4XiaL3GBdeqY4950K-Ed5xLT_HrYidC4%3D "DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY")
---

That's why I'm launching a _daring_ campaign to _[DEFEND THE HOUSE](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=88d880d0510d4ab7babb7e5960c51879&_e=FwxcNP91FNK_7Qs8TVxMPRzTyT3it7krZJVNcZtJhuZF_qlaaB2QuZaYUSCrZEemADqs30LL85rGF7QNx51QES4ZeXFg2RX1TilDF3i8Ara5VLs61WH7wAGRnEh7MUGE-SO1Ifh7ONx6JX3jqIz8P1FRqCldj4zmqdzbCJgm5Pq0Nv0D9wKos0Z0FL5RWySj0pWdZc5laqA9z4HJXX34Q13V2iyetf1zNz0FJGV2QH7Mf0Py8-MBiT2rF1hif6GalQYUzmmdrSqMUEep2ZtH6sRLGVaVn3U8hsYQ8-Az_BD1bmvqIcKSV6NZndBzHwvH1D6xviF3XS2wxPG0DBPywUe3oxkIiHPjHIKl5ka6EHux3FS647EHcvVTGoj-fd_U_v2n8SeOX-w4pQZTH5TPkl98rzQ-pSXcTg5wx3ITyOU%3D "DEFEND THE HOUSE")_ and send the Democrats packing. clean_body: I’ve had it. The Democrats’ effort to destroy our way of life ENDS NOW! | | | | Friend, As a mom of four, a small business owner, and a proud defender of our Second Amendment rights, I'm fed up with the Democrats' attempts to undermine our values and destroy our way of life. And I know you are too. I've just gotten my hands on a "confidential memo" from the Democrats' top strategists, and it's worse than we thought. They're planning to unleash a $100 MILLION war chest to TAKE DOWN our House Majority and IMPOSE their socialist agenda on America. But I've got a message for them:Not on my watch. As a member of the House Freedom Caucus and a proud representative of Colorado's rural communities, I'm used to fighting for what's right, even when the odds are against us. | | | "DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY" That's why I'm launching a daring campaign to "DEFEND THE HOUSE" and send the Democrats packing. I need your urgent support to fuel our grassroots efforts and mobilize conservative voters. I know that every contribution, no matter the size, will be a crucial blow to the Democrats' plans. "Will you join me in this fight and make a secure online contribution today?" | | | "SHOW THE DEMOCRATS WE MEAN BUSINESS" This is our moment to RISE UP and TAKE BACK our country. As a fellow patriot and defender of our values, I know I can count on you to stand with me in this fight. Let's do this! Let's WIN THE HOUSE and SECURE A BRIGHTER FUTURE FOR AMERICA IN 2026. Sincerely, Lauren Boebert | | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Kamala Harris
subject: My decision
body:
Here is the truth:

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em2505018-1&refcode2=601_2563979_LOKJv0&akid=601%2E2563979%2ELOKJv0)
---
Good morning, Peter.
While I've tried not to personally send a ton of fundraising emails since the last election, I want to take a few minutes to tell you about how I've decided to approach this moment in time and why your support is so important in this struggle.
Here is the truth:
Some people are describing what’s been happening in recent months as absolute chaos. And of course, I understand why.
It’s certainly true with those tariffs. Tariffs that -- as I predicted -- are clearly inviting a recession. But Peter, please, let us not be duped into thinking everything is chaos.
What we are witnessing is a swift implementation of an agenda that has been decades in the making.
An agenda to slash public education, to shrink government and privatize its services, all while giving tax breaks to the wealthiest among us.
It’s an agenda... a narrow, self-serving vision of America... where they punish truth tellers, favor loyalists, profit from their power, and leave everyone else to fend for themselves.
I know a lot of folks are wondering what’s going to guide us through this moment... How are we all going to chart the course?
There is only one answer -- and that is together. Everyone doing whatever it is they can: volunteering, organizing in your community, running for office, and more...
But donations are critical too. Especially to the Democratic National Committee. They are leading so much of the good work being done to fight back against this administration's agenda and to elect a Democratic House and Senate. So please:
[**Make a contribution to the Democratic Party today. Make it a generous one -- $5 or more if you can afford it. But the point is that lots of donations will add up fast when we're in this together. **](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em2505018-1&refcode2=601_2563979_LOKJv0&akid=601%2E2563979%2ELOKJv0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution immediately._

clean_body: Here is the truth: Good morning, Peter. While I've tried not to personally send a ton of fundraising emails since the last election, I want to take a few minutes to tell you about how I've decided to approach this moment in time and why your support is so important in this struggle. Here is the truth: Some people are describing what’s been happening in recent months as absolute chaos. And of course, I understand why. It’s certainly true with those tariffs. Tariffs that -- as I predicted -- are clearly inviting a recession. But Peter, please, let us not be duped into thinking everything is chaos. What we are witnessing is a swift implementation of an agenda that has been decades in the making. An agenda to slash public education, to shrink government and privatize its services, all while giving tax breaks to the wealthiest among us. It’s an agenda... a narrow, self-serving vision of America... where they punish truth tellers, favor loyalists, profit from their power, and leave everyone else to fend for themselves. I know a lot of folks are wondering what’s going to guide us through this moment... How are we all going to chart the course? There is only one answer -- and that is together. Everyone doing whatever it is they can: volunteering, organizing in your community, running for office, and more... But donations are critical too. Especially to the Democratic National Committee. They are leading so much of the good work being done to fight back against this administration's agenda and to elect a Democratic House and Senate. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution immediately. | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you for reading this message and for doing what you can to help fight back. ## **[Stop Religious Discrimination Against Faith-Based Charter Schools](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=673b354dd9c84a68a161cefcf638f858&_e=DoDLeevfStq9zIITBrlwOZdukHec94cRrJ1CmRb74FJ_mJ_lXM_YGbD1fkM2tzVSwuAYvKIiYtwMZyrnWLbO9a-ljL9lbfONpAzWXR7i1Z-g_Vuys5DfedGWozW-va2SlrI8UxqDfe1HXB_bU3YgqS10UFU6eSy7vOGB7X_o6lLVUqJjxdHaO4LP3U_4BVlhXbieTxQ-juJL9ldAMM8FmCuEpgIb5K4CGm6y1r8T9zSEDaBLt_PEiQbPTkuQbO2FMoW8cVGuD56zBwJ2vt28a3WSfyPf-TNn_rTft4tLQAMGXIcIu9AgqwXkku3mS6gVend7BE5azL9Uwn5YYB9m-vopua785LDNewqb1c1BfuRKhTc3N9eQg024WAZHbS6H)**
Oklahoma actively discriminates against religion in its charter-school program.

St. Isidore of Seville Catholic Virtual School wants to be part of Oklahoma's charter-school program, and they're just as qualified as any non-religious charter school.

But because St. Isidore is religious, Oklahoma's Attorney General sued to force the Board to cancel St. Isidore's contract after the Board accepted its application. And the Oklahoma Supreme Court sided with the Attorney General.

That's why we're proud to defend the Board all the way to the Supreme Court.

We'll argue _Oklahoma Statewide Charter School Board v. Drummond_ this spring.

We're standing up to religious discrimination in Oklahoma to protect religious freedom in states across the country.

And we'd love for you to join us.
[ Give Now](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=673b354dd9c84a68a161cefcf638f858&_e=DoDLeevfStq9zIITBrlwOZdukHec94cRrJ1CmRb74FJ_mJ_lXM_YGbD1fkM2tzVSwuAYvKIiYtwMZyrnWLbO9a-ljL9lbfONpAzWXR7i1Z-g_Vuys5DfedGWozW-va2SlrI8UxqDfe1HXB_bU3YgqS10UFU6eSy7vOGB7X_o6lLVUqJjxdHaO4LP3U_4BVlhXbieTxQ-juJL9ldAMM8FmCuEpgIb5K4CGm6y1r8T9zRpmUYlnWanixHfF0_735StTJNOKL9-3spJll4RtZHjm0duMheDayM-Cr4W3RK0eVh0TOBkWsIRz7MaLOd6cWk-nVRvoOq4dAH6TTALS3qzzSbKhpia7Xo1URxpo-U7pbN4OfEqf9f1lj-uB5sMI_Ey)

1️⃣ **_South Carolina:_ DLCC announces new special election spotlight candidate **
This week, DLCC announced 24-year-old Keishan Scott as a Spotlight candidate ahead of his special election for the South Carolina House on June 3rd. [If Keishan wins this race, he will not only be South Carolina’s youngest lawmaker but also one of the youngest Democratic state legislators in the country → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pDSRZN6vSOQk-5GlHZI639dqh5tRqupSpnEu0bavDqjjuBwtlT_lWRBSV-EgvtK9ae6DepZgTFwO7Rzj641nDnxy9xhtb2DARf5hxasaDWzJAFqyCPpWsphwCoRRqSsWQbZhqFd6rsPA_G2S6IUl3ES1Q8yCdtwk3GlZWh4Qb7nAo0vCXgaffDagaY9U6VDkrTWniCYylTA06w3bQVjhVqbu_pd8811fOnoLdYjgLAQSQ4vXfiiBbS7GhNoOZwO1F5NrM1Z_Fl5KIJE11Majb5yhHdCPRh8QlXkQ4HjsIuz0IIUdxTZgoyhE_smVxPcCkjN7SmfvVo6FnC-DXaTjbkEz2JyslVpo5WA1YXB64Y-VOh2GA8WWht8dvcwWi5L9VcYmCOKA0PtoECo1VCRcI2TogE_9RYTEe757dh0T87l2Gsq65iyfcQ8m0HnbtTIbgHHqyzBmWu-_DKDukM2ANDq4_OEUO9jjDjVhngPxBmewpCc40weYTWhh5rbO9Qe-h6RDir32t8qmPaZjpoRs0zV78iljwZsWVUkoFF6_ra_l1kC-JOoGrtAme7S4IEauwCkt88yqyu2eUoAoXSguZLAZieecaZFvNaueZcGFBfB0g/4gl/Mze8uYnEQR27RjlBy6z7-A/h1/h001.u9Vwdr-VKJPeFGbXyR9dRYrfKfkgX0gc0-qhIdQ3wDo)

Even after Missourians voted to enshrine abortion access in their state constitution last November, Republican lawmakers took action this week to push another abortion ban to the ballot. [Democrats filibustered to fight back, but the GOP is proving they’ll do everything in their power to roll back reproductive freedoms → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMUSRL5hUWNGnk36awU64yJQMPfGCbiMIeV6uyYYSHpjQy7pi67NlbrHNIfqM1bPC339GsWsGGrh8EpGkNqzLZG6WmJjWUji98Cy9vU5rWyF0n8UT9G3sHTt1e-TGFpdLNBHAmPZMGVZKvrSA030XOpQJ1X8rij8nlM6Wj8SXfFGtFYf-8NFQWXgxPc8jJ64TUR-kTFHJLWlkeMYjlwnHR6lTSq4cho7Vud1zkvApVl8hriwn9w3nSrRd7Ep7MxuZHDQ6E5fmV8iQCGFEXb-Mr8NC_J6-QM05fniq4-9ulR0UEE3eBwXXVIS6AG45fh_WIUVuH4gcCCBG7yDcJH0_FzUIU6H5eiLBsh-Lm2pcMGyhAcvZ6YF4jRxnkFOF5hP4KrU_v2ekFksL-8-CSggfK8NXc6tcOqWOd1dLXf2x-6KF0cxs2Weyd1HEOGszoSZj4nNKrSugr4apdA0m6oMfZe1vyn2huXwyInNSfCpi2YTRtY-8Ondwk8mrE956dPDsDT-VGeujmOcddldtjHx97_eMNcegtadhTZ8UGdNa_OhscTbTvZvh6_psNwTY2NzQFtz3o7wuqcM87uHKEyNQAMA/4gl/Mze8uYnEQR27RjlBy6z7-A/h2/h001.5i6kAsmVDmjrkhZGdjNwvmumQUo7cWlJpswoN4OAIbg)

As chaos reigns in Washington, the DLCC is bringing expertise from across the country to strategize and build Democrats’ foundation of power in the states. These incoming board members will serve essential roles in fighting extremism and delivering on the issues voters care most about. [Read more here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pDSRZN6vSOQk-5GlHZI639dOCkIO7C3ZMr5zdV4KaW-Snw0RHZ7BBs5vzcUBO29p9EjJZ_jv6IfSsqObqKyoUo5-3HX9vT5dvyQk2Xc29c0FavC-sSe_3YSCz6E5hgaepuphUpDVhoG9oeS1Yj9PVHx1-ALEF496Mrd4jrHEZX_ec7rmsyERCzNmfbiqRgInZP9JzfJPXZmKzk9pZo5rTE3UMMOxkoHMlJLfCcGYp5gpV4aMInHoBafA0dfX00kE_c8O_b2Hv9DyrM3oxxuzpyit6woc57HdW5FpCGVkf9TmjWySRdWapazGxtfBBCnjyoqlxiEOtQo7OTqflPBKkVd-S0-PO4NXN3vr8K4wytynLjo27klO5i5fy3OQ6AmpGiHlmaoioOWvTZhHuSdP_fzKvUoHMCY2BaOI2KA7CbWNB6vrXijgzLVmrjUhMXAtDYxQ5WnwstlVv8ixfcauin_-Z0sc_weEp5WgP46pA3V9TbheBTWo7qjls6t58KwOAiEIuix18jIe7rDZIW6dR9EbekcC3zTJtWYdrR0QtdlYTHkFy35v2ML6Asjkv1pj4kvfsjURgTuTg7XOhzKkpYItER4ydrotyiq7aZlKpIk5Q/4gl/Mze8uYnEQR27RjlBy6z7-A/h3/h001.pLiRtkEXxA7Frt3pF_YiLdrFUqid4yx3MBXFibZqpAw)

These incoming board members will serve essential roles in fighting extremism and delivering on the issues voters care most about. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. ## A Star Rises, Inspiring Israel and America – RedState
In a dazzling display of talent and resilience, Israel’s Yuval Raphael secured a remarkable second-place finish at the 69th Eurovision Song Contest held in Basel, Switzerland, on May 15, 2025. Her performance of “New Day Will Rise” captivated audiences worldwide, earning Israel the audience vote with an impressive 297 points. After decades of partnering with the U.S. government to serve refugees, The Episcopal Church ended the relationship this week, because the Trump administration asked them to serve refugees whose plight contradicts the woke Left’s grand narrative. Peter, there are many important reasons to consider making [**a $15 donation to All On The Line today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107917469/546255955/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AnythingNOR_email_20250518-AOTL-Tier1-AnythingNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250518-AOTL-Tier1-AnythingNOR_&utm_campaign=AnythingNOR&express_lane=true&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2NGIxMjY0LWYwMzMtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nZAmRtmyDLbZE3qXumMB9j0MfV5vNRcFvutjpfglWuA=)
What if we reminded you that the House of Representatives just recently passed the SAVE Act, one of the most dangerous threats we’ve seen to voting rights in decades — threatening to make it harder for millions of military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, working-class Americans, married women, and more to exercise their right to vote?
What if we reminded you that the last 2024 race was just certified — _more than six months after Election Day!_ — because far-right extremists in North Carolina tried again and again to overturn the results of a free and fair election?
And what if we reminded you that our affiliate is currently involved in court cases in 5 states — Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Louisiana, and Texas — that could decide the makeup of up to 7 legislative districts and 8 congressional districts where we must ensure fair representation?
**Peter, the fair maps movement is pushing back against anti-democracy forces across the country. All On The Line volunteers fought to uphold the will of the people in North Carolina, and this team is mobilizing to stop the SAVE Act in the Senate and continue to root out gerrymandering.**
**[Knowing this, will you contribute to All On The Line now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107917470/546255956/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AnythingNOR_email_20250518-AOTL-Tier1-AnythingNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250518-AOTL-Tier1-AnythingNOR_&utm_campaign=AnythingNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2NGIxMjY0LWYwMzMtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nZAmRtmyDLbZE3qXumMB9j0MfV5vNRcFvutjpfglWuA=)**

clean_body: Please help power the movement for fair maps in the critical months ahead. | Peter, there are many important reasons to consider making = What if we reminded you that the House of Representatives just recently passed the SAVE Act, one of the most dangerous threats we’ve seen to voting rights in decades — threatening to make it harder for millions of military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, working-class Americans, married women, and more to exercise their right to vote? What if we reminded you that the last 2024 race was just certified — more than six months after Election Day! — because far-right extremists in North Carolina tried again and again to overturn the results of a free and fair election? And what if we reminded you that our affiliate is currently involved in court cases in 5 states — Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Louisiana, and Texas — that could decide the makeup of up to 7 legislative districts and 8 congressional districts where we must ensure fair representation? Peter, the fair maps movement is pushing back against anti-democracy forces across the country. All On The Line volunteers fought to uphold the will of the people in North Carolina, and this team is mobilizing to stop the SAVE Act in the Senate and continue to root out gerrymandering. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We know that not everyone follows the ins and outs of the work that goes into strengthening and creating a more representative democracy. That's why we rely on people like you — people who are deeply engaged and who understand how these questions of fairness in our democracy affect us all — to fund this work. body:
Only a few hours left to submit

|

**Peter, you are receiving this message because you have not completed our poll about Elon Musk’s proposed buyout of MSNBC!**

**Here’s the problem, Peter:** Trump gave Musk unrestricted access to Americans' private data and the power to cut critical federal programs like Social Security.

If Elon Musk buys MSNBC, he could build a right-wing media monopoly – **giving him control of both the federal government and the media.**

We think an unelected billionaire shouldn’t have this much power in a democracy, but we need to hear from top Democrats like you:

The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings? _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a3e02a3725434ff094e2de205ec9d966&_e=hyfK1EE5D8mI2sPertzKRB2_y0ktdzuMJW1GGm7cfzFxJbvl4jGoDGYGwmgJ5BlMSmKh316HX0OZnGd4PakDWHPuedXi9j5Tab9S6gtOiKJepSn58DNd_LdPz33H5M9lRBc45Dtf8Cd44A2b_r_9EX4CVM98LIfn70e8CYzWKLsBxjLFkbuEEtkgN74XG6E2rCtzik0tWo-vY8dIPAXYEUIsN0aH8PPsvPIQWP2VXD9vsstoL4vfmiWcZCS6B7SmOTZaO6kHbstth98vSfaNfNJ2KH9Nzyqh4cqqOCZyHmrsOLditgjBecr0PPTiTzl2ngrv6stuzK6Rg7OXySJB004QZAbWW9V1Qgx-mMqdPj8%3D)**

subject: He’s the Left’s worst nightmare
body:

Peter,

It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and **I need your immediate attention on something.**

Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026.

Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority.

**Peter, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy.**

Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time.

Peter, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, _this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left._

**[Will you join me in supporting Senator Lindsey Graham as he fights hard to keep South Carolina Red and maintain the strong Conservative Senate majority he helped build?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=791f1bf32918408ab66c49e53659681c&_e=4uTZqK4BULurIBV8RKe2N_2mrGkvwezcf6M6Ga1cMrf6U5CwzMGWwF1KBtXZciOGabZWEW4ZJc-FpSu2bd8xt16saFHwfVm6pgiLY_UKDMXNQbKEKBLt3JX0zuMZEJrXf4MUtu9VTXKd7CkLMnboHDMzA819XgBDKPfyoTRwyX1BiYE1cEi5B2k5G-HTsTWMxHOysNCkJN8N72Fp0dYK6rSidGb0deOjO3MQJUUp6ZQZ8cwZtUyXkxaaLAmaKIZ1NRbGunmV-shEi-CpT93C1CEwJqVgY2P_R5si3L2pjq18xhk8OSAs41Y6Cvsw2s2fVPAdSuk1rNk5JM9QZB-Of2sbnqihvkCAqhPy4L_MrzgTkyGZrF5_YFYXHcG-gTkmaD5NNQl3N5ClXZ3sRuFNV5D58gF3CPcRqTgTptZQOgk%3D)**

Peter,

It's Tim Sheehy here - former Navy SEAL, proud Montanan, and now your new voice in the United States Senate.

I've served in combat, built a business from the ground up, and now I'm in Washington to help restore what makes America great.

_But as I 'm sure you can imagine, the Democrats are throwing up roadblocks at every turn._

Luckily, I know something they don't. I know we have a powerful team behind us. We have folks like you who believe in this country and are ready to stand up when it matters most.

clean_body: Peter, It's Tim Sheehy here - former Navy SEAL, proud Montanan, and now your new voice in the United States Senate. I've served in combat, built a business from the ground up, and now I'm in Washington to help restore what makes America great. But as I 'm sure you can imagine, the Democrats are throwing up roadblocks at every turn. Luckily, I know something they don't. I know we have a powerful team behind us. We have folks like you who believe in this country and are ready to stand up when it matters most. If you're willing to do whatever it takes to achieve President Trump's beautiful vision for our nation's future, this message is for you. Thank you and may God bless you, Tim Sheehy United States Senator Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Peter, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82ed0443ad61485090a84cea5d1c13be&_e=gkxFgcxYRZX4ipnHWeYmFSgT7kx1Bo3_fj8TXC_QCm-UF2ujuASLjVnpuRZai9G5vfcSzi13lFC8F6P7LDuStGkR8eti-1XYSc2i7Jz-zjIeERUmO95-hPv5lf_y42oPsbT0Aq-udePO4NES076CLeHnICg4xexCPsBzHB2RvMUV41g-vK5Z_D-KiEkJBl335E4cnyVXek6g3__cvfYKtpT-bUkB8JzvdPbAz53F_NQcKNt4-9vC4iNb8XmyAMEni3D0qKMMeDM8ew61W2gWqiIqWjiUdGcQxUYWemW8yJFdfXhEskSpvlSuu7XNo-iaG8paSTBvvVN5GOd2Go8IK5sipgwhHJAqqHr1dRXmmQs3Dnm1UV5l9Ehf7ckjZq785f9eqVVs7cxLQMa4eU5WDdLHDpBUgYrMctDRknknBXc%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82ed0443ad61485090a84cea5d1c13be&_e=gkxFgcxYRZX4ipnHWeYmFSgT7kx1Bo3_fj8TXC_QCm-UF2ujuASLjVnpuRZai9G5vfcSzi13lFC8F6P7LDuStGkR8eti-1XYSc2i7Jz-zjIeERUmO95-hPv5lf_y42oPsbT0Aq-udePO4NES076CLeHnICg4xexCPsBzHB2RvMUV41g-vK5Z_D-KiEkJBl335E4cnyVXek6g3__cvfYKtpT-bUkB8JzvdPbAz53F_NQcKNt4-9vC4iNb8XmyAMEnin_jg88Ma3rJgKH-7l15Q33A6SXP_acwdTDPwYqfc2CJ_3ExF3pXXbY2ZAXBxznytpngDhhwBDyp9V0XVbA-0S3r5Y84atw-DS_3-Y_vkHUjxWrLu1AMSUQF7hdWij7yxywPxphV2i5gUVNXsAqGKp5RdLvDmZnYafCIS-sohaU%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82ed0443ad61485090a84cea5d1c13be&_e=gkxFgcxYRZX4ipnHWeYmFSgT7kx1Bo3_fj8TXC_QCm-UF2ujuASLjVnpuRZai9G5vfcSzi13lFC8F6P7LDuStGkR8eti-1XYSc2i7Jz-zjIeERUmO95-hPv5lf_y42oPsbT0Aq-udePO4NES076CLeHnICg4xexCPsBzHB2RvMUV41g-vK5Z_D-KiEkJBl335E4cnyVXek6g3__cvfYKtpT-bUkB8JzvdPbAz53F_NQcKNt4-9vC4iNb8XmyAMEn0I-V9ir3irox4TIxqPRI-7nJcOzRqjxcKbPmvR0VxzHSensYxiyk_zU_JY7QUq2rfzfbQh6eGt15Q4nTzO-lzfYHliKtC3OZZm2eH54EoZKuBoTJbycWmI6Vk2Ck9n5ndjQD99306e6Qi7UPk_9tF5mnc53zMRnA-YFvro0J70s%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82ed0443ad61485090a84cea5d1c13be&_e=gkxFgcxYRZX4ipnHWeYmFSgT7kx1Bo3_fj8TXC_QCm-UF2ujuASLjVnpuRZai9G5vfcSzi13lFC8F6P7LDuStGkR8eti-1XYSc2i7Jz-zjIeERUmO95-hPv5lf_y42oPsbT0Aq-udePO4NES076CLeHnICg4xexCPsBzHB2RvMUV41g-vK5Z_D-KiEkJBl335E4cnyVXek6g3__cvfYKtpT-bUkB8JzvdPbAz53F_NQcKNt4-9vC4iNb8XmyAMEnSuir1AhICWGeYGaHCP8jdG_xCxJYSiv5I8v0hmqEfNa2KL6-BNKLS89PK-CggA-GlASgn3gwsZuV7rK8Tz-9ztHvXEz04UCfzASsJVkALYwTq3J9zPFYgT2qCbMppeFqek_EH2nXFUAqZ65YLJzyy1nmVCH0Z5VRu5TpTv1MVhI%3D)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Peter, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: On my 18th birthday, I joined the Marines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23SXP4eE4Lx8DulIkH-341T6tnCtNFRgn301nXs19LvCgP-AK0L0fktGcKvo7MytUXlNQ8o_DneQ7KqOcs0iip5vc7T7-YGCjoQ_mSH0RXh8wjI8V1m3wDUhTu9hHudwwFhBA2m5npR5tsevepVukLgC9tNPEabHDwBz_NFmE15F7)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23doW5if-uOnalXk4xZwLSoNRg7FyCT0F8qKdOZpaQjfOUlwOItL5Gfjp4bPEbK3vvgJpva5Mou6odpL8s2oH3KZ2cdfp3Ep1PNJXkO0GnGkdlRjQp_vryxGuSe-SfbDeV1CPF723d5KYrNItKbqf5x7p2MON7J6JG2eVlS3Enu6e)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23a0GvfnO6DK9tUNswRMvo6Sr6rI1tmBAPFXuIt5pUaszUokj_iGAd5mQzkoSQDFJ2LpTLtJzeF279w_dcAnMbz7k1Tklnj5janp7mNHE8Ar78npmRpMPn91VuFm0XDqb-n0cAPRP39hJQ1m98QjRabKCtXQLpRB0hXpEQGgAHjih)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23SuS7d5TTIB_3wRWfi_WnIqPZTb-GtQ_-G_RIMSFV7EsIFO3akKyHHroLeWtmsfkEyTbaNDi6WwVDM5WVfZGV7tIGj7T-c_RNtJjz6hD_xyYzXar8wTpPc-9asK9ngqvsDqS9lBmtnNoBRDV_r4F6_I-ZhcwF68HwfXF0eBQ3nMF)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23V9jLKjwQbdbNYQSODk0A5UvtuZD4R1miZnQUkuix2QBeGns99ujwlVW_kavB4swhrHK9hcaZjW4Vgb-BHP2jWjlxpaUm6bDqW1OxfTshzzm-ulmD3ft-qjze0WBoooMdy15q1YXt84b5vTArz1Q1dv7fGJM0yxW4hxKf65xMVo1)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23RO1codYKM27YaAbWok6kCNmovhtIwmhyJ25_EpSXK31ge2iufOYv0wXUju8IuMJ6afcFrDWT5EICMOpTWlqq2a1Rq94T1y5t35ZH8FfCW4jDqnfBIgzRf5Ontl3OWdun_dqWvimaxkG9PD5ER_Y6waCT-vqhG6BzvByzlRgsJUM)
So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod.

The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and _**[I’m hopeful that if you don’t donate today, you’ll allow me to earn your support in the coming months.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23RFF0NgvyBBHgeqejiv4LszrOCXTsdKWlE46AI42oHsYNJkjCGG3U9onNPQ8A8PX03XyU-P_6Cb4BSbvbrD-igIXf6VkuxaEEaPdchkTng2V2F_n1YlYWp4A_wmaBb_w0vpwVb__55yT5UkcfW03O1kx8N_eIWHCPFqiY2yioX70) **_

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23fp2aClBUFU9XSwlMZUodogG1lPf22S60TfjrGOFZ118XEv8J4JxNxjDB2vHTuUdr6Q6tvuqAdY4RtskcVaUzwBD33S8tLWZVTojrPKnOxiSrgGK5QT2Se8KFkdVTpfTsvEUsh7u7stb-SsD50KZ8_Qq9dumJoOpRvAsOeVgmsx7)

I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet.

_**[I'd be so grateful if you could chip in $5, $10, or even $50 right now.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23TJfW2CBboFSaSWss7-CKDZD5rcEZO7SVQgma9ohsE2Nz2ej3XqDLdCPYb5V-FcdDxsqA0x-gY89eouxE9ozzXywoCKXEg6RHMCtmcHFERqBWi_fDc2OSzPqLxUCh9YdXyINSZvF2RztwTh7gMbsimc2LKb9AjdBFLcgYs1y3AWz)**_

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ecaf084522d4b66b7141dc17d90d1f5&_e=dN4P3V_PmZEb4QaOLcadzqG_2htLJP9MgVNVknYTx6V6_J2vkWxVsSiA1739X9ZU-Wuaf12r5_h_tqrxq6ScrHANFdh-skmzTCab5git9MmOQMrtpppF1-nAfN3AZX1npgxes4ClJ3n10cXPKl8CrNVQiNhVWlkm6kmwpKIno2gzq7XktoCTttdjliQQMD0C_0P-LkBuTfoAIl5tnueTjEurXHr53Li0T_SGF43kLgDbz8iv5OGeZGwZ8tzkmvnzBh4q9trR4irmPmzfUhK23dvES03QZOzMQGZ1Z6grS_Ot5uHzxM0ehMQS0q9sUU_QFgLoAcS-5vZCbG_niY331q6JxjM13XJL7xtt5eDShi08KmoYgMbOFX3r7qyifO0lHWwNBOBnCHxK-EAwO-2aMWFGiYJOpI2QwrSW7AGa5WcAv0OKxetFYkQvUCe_bFKV)

And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

# [My five-year whistleblowing anniversary](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=163719997&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzE5OTk3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1NzkyNjAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDE3MTI2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.UkGCsdrGDvPTNPP8Z9p5ivv2M3ybrqV4hLkE7k2VhrI)
May 18
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=163719997&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzE5OTk3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NzU3OTI2MCwiZXhwIjoxNzUwMTcxMjYwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.89DBOIfBQcaCnSIGciXaqC5HDNNlG-hf2C8UDiefWlc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=163719997&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzE5OTk3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1NzkyNjAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDE3MTI2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.UkGCsdrGDvPTNPP8Z9p5ivv2M3ybrqV4hLkE7k2VhrI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=163719997&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzE5OTk3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1NzkyNjAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDE3MTI2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.UkGCsdrGDvPTNPP8Z9p5ivv2M3ybrqV4hLkE7k2VhrI)
---
| | [](https://substack..4hEVkfoOB9r9b_mx6aWUa2YfKTjtGY-eiFr0gXxEL3k?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/my-five-year-whistleblowing-anniversary?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Five years ago today, I got a call from my boss telling me I was being offered a resignation package in lieu of termination.
I asked why.
"It is the decision of the deputy secretary," the HR representative said.
It was a Monday and my first day off in months. I was on my way to see my parents who had lost their home a few weeks prior in a massive, EF-4 tornado.
Late Friday afternoon, just a few days prior, I had asked my boss about how I could file a whistleblower complaint about orders I received to publish false data about the COVID-19 pandemic.
I wrote a [detailed piece about the public and legal war I've been fighting ever since then last year.](https://substack.com/redirect/4d85373f-0f02-4456-9dd8-fa128b0f1a26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I haven't shied away from the difficulties of being thrust into the public spotlight, or the risks to whistleblowers who challenge powerful men.
I've done my best to [provide advice](https://substack.com/redirect/f08388f3-976a-41ee-b924-0fcaf424164b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for those who face similar predicaments.
[Save 50% off one full year of Mesoscale](https://substack.com/redirect/f119c941-3bf9-41e3-9ce4-4d55657c3f4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Though I had always made good trouble when the situation called for it, I never imagined I'd be on a national or even international stage for it.
Reflecting on the fifth anniversary, I am grateful for all of those who stood by me when things got rough.
In 2023 and 2024, I was in a very bad place on this anniversary.
This year, I'm just starting my new job with a UN-backed NGO that's helping save corals from the impacts of climate change.
I'm in a great place now -- as I was in 2021 and 2022 -- but I don't know how long that will last.
The journey for whistleblowers is tumultuous and unpredictable. You live your life constantly waiting for something new and terrible to happen to you.
You become accustomed to a life of fleeting moments of happiness within the larger, darker storm. Especially when your lawsuit is still ongoing and the power you challenged hasn't taken their foot off the gas for years.
As I begin traveling the world for this new project, I'm going to continue to bring you exclusive research and investigations. I'll be meeting with both foreign leaders and people in communities on the front lines of climate change.
I will continue to speak for those who are ignored and silenced.
And I hope you will continue with me, as you have been, for whatever comes next.
My deepest and heartfelt thanks,
Rebekah

Hello Patriot,

I’m sure you’d agree that we can’t count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

I’ve been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I’m not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future.

_But that doesn’t mean we can’t kick the radicals out of education_. There’s been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: **The Goldwater Institute**.

Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers’ unions and the U.S. Department of Education.

The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater’s legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards.

[Before I tell you more about why the Goldwater Institute is so incredibly successful, I must ask for your immediate help.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuQXZY8Bw4LApSg-rVqp6aPcUGXsIbjEmtoHNv185Qrl-843ee9IukxkeLRFnAjAaHQgA4W8E4P6xW7_-s-_fTx_V4_10r37aMl3h26Fu8JJnJf_-ePvtz914Dmz6tS5_Pu8be-nxseBLPkJztNJMiYou0y0fNC0ybJkoRCmahkM2tk3NNZMgS6z7XvWS1ZwJWVFdF0CHSmWmBQolLVnNihIYzZtGi6EfKK1KXtOmJwV95uTSojdKshB36b1zNlfOZlM7xriEZ7ELgUtAtXrM5YzaxWQQuNzcpHcZ0Z_MHKKJa8Rk9ieponFzeuSXNdqrknaR5jYT3qVOtCFQJW5Rm9US3nncwig9HjyiTxRoIeh19-zAwa1eIeFd6A-i3BxxjoR3ET_jdTLzf5b5Vi-7mSYTKkEKenuuTJu2Fr4CAAD__7Ink7A) To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you.

[Will you please donate $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to support the Goldwater Institute. >>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuQXZY4PDgcOmKD2sWqnqod1TZOwhuMWY2CZs_v3KEcr1m2_03lNumezwaIk8EYDRmkgACH8jALePzYX1n3v_fvioH--HW_3TVfkK33b1Di951urvj7ff4dSNp8imX-vy5_N2Zy89PRZ8yXtoiU7ZKVPZFablg6GiwJZJISvZNByKsRWUMYTjsdeDqWnNJJOohBa0QjWYWhW2BQoVrdiRiQoYLZvGyKEfKK0rfqRNTwR95pTKYbBasZg2FYL3rtTeFVM7prTEZ7EzgXNEvQYs1YzGp2wQOF_9ZDaVMBzsHJNNa8Js9gelk_VzfuTnNbmLVm5R9joT3uVOtCFQZ-7Q2NUR3gW8x1EF3HnCkClQIellC2zH0a9BI-Fd7Hei_ZxwToR3CT_TZbLzfyhCa5bNTpONtSSCXp8r86Z7C18BAAD__6iVk7E)

Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I’m asking you for support on their behalf.

The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation.

The Goldwater Institute doesn’t engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives.

[Please support the Goldwater Institute with a donation of any amount today. >>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuQWZscFw4LApSg-rVqp6aPcUGXsIbjEmtoHNv185Qrl-843ee9IukxkeLRFnAjAaHQgAYW8E4P6xW7_-s-_fTx_V4_10r37aMl3h26Fu8JJnJf_-ePvtz914DsX0a13-fN634qXHx4Iv-QjN0UozJSq6TLds0JRn2BaCi1I0DYNsbKEehJJa9FCzoecDcg5VrVAMFa2bWmSmBQolLYu64CUUNG8aLYZ-oLQqWU2bnnD6zMmlRW-ULELcpffO2Vw5m03tGOMSnsUuBC4B1eoxlzNqF5NB4HJzk95lRH8yc4gmrhGT2Z-kisbN6ZFd1mivStpFmttMWJc60YZAlbhFbVZLWOdxC6P0ePCIPlGgXNDr7osDB7d6hYR1oT-IcnPEORLWRfyM18nM_1nmW73sZppMqATh9PZcmTZtLXwFAAD__6-gk6w)

The reason Goldwater’s school choice movement is so successful isn’t simply because legislation is passing in legislatures... It’s because they DEFEND those bills in the courts.

The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers’ unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute’s team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents.

Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. **Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation**. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both.

Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education:
* Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests.
* Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity."
* Woke professors label basic math as “racist."

**You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system.**

The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education.

This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join.

[Please consider supporting the Goldwater Institute this month. clean_body: | | Hello Patriot, I’m sure you’d agree that we can’t count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge. I’ve been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I’m not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future. But that doesn’t mean we can’t kick the radicals out of education. There’s been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: The Goldwater Institute. Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers’ unions and the U.S. Department of Education. The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater’s legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards. To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you. Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I’m asking you for support on their behalf. The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation. The Goldwater Institute doesn’t engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives. The reason Goldwater’s school choice movement is so successful isn’t simply because legislation is passing in legislatures... It’s because they DEFEND those bills in the courts. The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers’ unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute’s team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents. Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both. Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education: Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests. Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity." Woke professors label basic math as “racist." You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system. The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education. This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join. Once you complete your gift, the Goldwater Institute will be in touch with you on how to stay updated. Can I count on you to be the first new donor? Please consider this both a personal and urgent favor to the Goldwater Institute and me. For liberty, Congressman Andy Biggs The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Roger Stone called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption... In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
#
Trump’s longtime political advisor, Roger Stone, just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
You heard me right.
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption — making millions of dollars from his own crypto coins — and I co-sponsored a bill to make it illegal for the President, the Vice President, administration officials, and members of Congress to do the same.
In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
When I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our democracy, I will do everything I can to stop the blatant corruption in Washington.
Guys like Donald Trump and Roger Stone are only looking out for themselves. And it’s clear they’re scared of the attention we’re bringing to them and their corrupt deeds.
I’ll be honest with you, though. If Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and now Roger Stone are all lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back.
So please: [**Please, if you can afford it, split a donation between my campaign and The Long Run as we take on the corruption in Washington and fight back against the Trump Administration. It adds up fast when lots of people are chipping in.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-kelly.j9iZht&refcode=em250518-1-nor-exp&t=1&akid=5554%2E196590%2EfCsyF3)

Trump’s longtime political advisor, Roger Stone, just called for me to be charged with treason and executed. You heard me right. I called out Trump for his blatant corruption — making millions of dollars from his own crypto coins — and I co-sponsored a bill to make it illegal for the President, the Vice President, administration officials, and members of Congress to do the same. In response, they sent Roger Stone after me. When I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our democracy, I will do everything I can to stop the blatant corruption in Washington. Guys like Donald Trump and Roger Stone are only looking out for themselves. And it’s clear they’re scared of the attention we’re bringing to them and their corrupt deeds. I’ll be honest with you, though. If Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and now Roger Stone are all lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks for sticking with me. Means a lot to have you by my side. Mark

Friend, Since Trump began his second term, Americans have mobilized in unprecedented numbers—from protests to town halls across our nation. Our communities are organizing, not only to fight back against these harmful policies, but to build a better and more inclusive future. Our allies are also pushing back in the courts, with Trump losing more than 90% of his court cases. Even Trump-appointed judges are blocking his agenda. I’ve also been fighting back against Trump’s agenda in Congress. **Resistance on all these fronts has led to wins like the reinstatement of student visas and the release of students such as Mohsen Mahdawi, Rumeysa Ozturk, and Badar Khan Suri**. **I will keep holding the Trump administration accountable, fighting for our rights, and defending the life-saving programs that millions of families rely on.** In yesterday’s email, I shared some of the ways I’m resisting in Congress, including questioning Trump’s officials in Congressional committees and leading Congressional letters to the Trump administration, demanding restoration of federal funding and an end to illegal deportations and detentions. I’m also leading legislation to expand our civil rights, support unhoused people, and uplift marginalized Americans. [**Could you chip in today to fuel the fight against Trump and Musk’s agenda in Congress? \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, May 17, 2025
Subject: fighting back against Trump
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Our resistance has power. After we pushed in Congress, on the streets, and in the courts, more than 1,000 student visas have been reinstated and some detained students have been released—including Rumeysa Ozturk, Dr. Badar Khan Suri, and Mohsen Mahdawi.
I will keep pushing to free them all and to defend our constitutional rights to free speech and due process.
Upon his release, Mohsen told Trump, “I’m not afraid of you.” These victories for our movements and our rights show that our pressure is working and we cannot back down.
**Every week, I have been resisting and exposing the truth about how Trump is abusing his power. Using the power of the letterhead, introducing and cosponsoring bills, joining amicus briefs, and using all the tools available to us to fight back against Trump’s illegal abuses of power.**
During Trump’s first term, I led the movement to impeach him—twice. I will continue to be one of the loudest voices in Congress resisting Trump’s agenda. Please read on to learn more about how I’m resisting.
[**Will you chip in to my campaign to grow our resistance movement? Together, we’ll keep fighting back against Trump and Musk’s agenda, and fighting for the government that we deserve.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JMFi-oVeDw3Bo3PQYaIpTTxt1Ch1Gj3T8d5hkzJ_D4pcnR711o_tSmk_Q-k-CTck5lc8KmuF1eNSVmW7pxngZh9u51sx-KphfAFHpqLWc-lO5u1f4C6j2lEF1I2Ts-_4EBNja7OzpmtEDfs02J5kPssQQ55P9AtyBV-O3MR4C7DPrUv1cRZK-kQrIdfRtOBWj6KPxLdS5zUO0UPgBxJLKAZijSlvT2f604lIC49zXqcie5Kl03oZ6AAYM0xKmKemqtldhTNFR79QuMk4V4vZAg-IEgp9K5_0rASDKYdTlgYo/4gl/eN-0MIkEQEaPHb_byASwpQ/h8/h001.zXrK0eYaHatjmJBS9wGIUCxp6PruoIzH32bCbENfqDA)
