Here are some ways I’m fighting back against Trump and Musk in Congress:
* **I led the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending a letter to Trump demanding that his administration immediately restore all Head Start funding.** After sending our letter, we saw immediate improvements to help Head Start centers access their funding. But Trump continues to threaten this vital early education program, so I led another letter demanding answers from the Department of Health and Human Services about the proposed closure of some Head Start offices.

* **In the Financial Services Committee, I introduced an amendment to prevent any budget that cuts programs for working families and the poor to pay for billionaire tax breaks.**

* **In the House Oversight Committee,** **I motioned to subpoena Elon Musk to testify before Congress** and explain why a billionaire that nobody voted for is apparently in charge of our government.

* **I’m demanding Customs and Border Protection (CBP) stop separating families, secretly detaining people, and using CBP facilities for long-term detention.** I visited a local CBP detention facility where hundreds of people have been detained in the past few months, simply for making a wrong turn on the Ambassador Bridge from Detroit into Canada.

* **I’m pushing my colleagues** **to defend vital services like Medicaid and SNAP** , including Republican Congressman John James who represents a neighboring district. We only need a few Republicans to vote against cuts, so my team and I have called and sent postcards to James’ constituents to push him on this. He refuses to hold town halls, so I accepted his constituents’ invitation to join a community town hall where I helped answer questions from 300 residents.

* **I reintroduced legislation to expand civil rights protections for marginalized communities and to help unhoused young people with direct cash assistance.**

* After the Trump administration proposed gutting the office that upholds our fair housing laws,**I questioned the Acting Inspector General for the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)** and called on him to move with urgency in investigating this administration.

* **I’m supporting legislation** to protect immigrants’ right to counsel, to revoke the _Alien Enemies Act_ which Trump wants to use to deport and detain U.S. citizens, to block cuts to Medicaid and food assistance, and more.

* **I’ve joined my colleagues in signing onto letters** demanding DHS stop the transfer of U.S. residents to the notorious CECOT prison camp in El Salvador, calling on FEMA to resume funding for the Emergency Food and Shelter Program, urging the DHS Inspector General to investigate systemic abuse and due process violations, defending consumer protections, condemning Trump’s corrupt market manipulation and insider trading, opposing the closure of Social Security Administration field offices and threats to Meals on Wheels, urging protections for national parks, opposing attacks on transgender Americans, and demanding the Department of Education continue programs that support English learners and also rescind its threat to defund schools with DEI programs.

* As a proud Arab American Congresswoman representing one of the largest Arab American communities in our country,**I reintroduced a resolution to recognize April as Arab American Heritage Month** and uplift the culture, history, and contributions of Arab Americans. Our stories matter, now more than ever: They cannot erase us.

* **I introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block billions in Trump’s planned weapons transfers to the Israeli military**. I also reintroduced historic legislation to recognize the ongoing Nakba against Palestinians.

* My team and I are **training progressives who want to run for office** and supporting young people who want to be involved in their communities. We’re also **holding Know Your Rights workshops** and trainings on union organizing.

We can’t give into cynicism. Our communities are hurting, but we are not backing down.
[**Will you chip in today to keep up the pressure against the Trump administration?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JYWgL1T88OpWGaXefUwoVKCuhHC8mfzdkV35dn47He7foSdLCyr2f9PGVF2IaCnqFP70SJBrkM-wO_F-ZpYsSGdCA0tgylR3d0fZ4twWsUvjRBF6zaz668fIzqtGG13wrC7qVkQzvvvfNenYbLUnssOKh11VAxE-8Ep2C36-xgvyoot3wCKNYcY5GMHQ34_NGvhYUCxNL7mHAB82nrOogPoXK8Nxqc8nA2keMz3GnNRIc8z8fVECgBUlUeeFD67rpSew5g_uFVRq5SRbxCUn5D-nEzjmDCiSrKSA6iotWjRU/4gl/eN-0MIkEQEaPHb_byASwpQ/h10/h001.tTqr_cNOE3W_UglTa5x0GBijtlYqNUGAxaaJrZB7PaQ)

clean_body: Here are some ways I’m fighting back against Trump in Congress. | | | Friend, Since Trump began his second term, Americans have mobilized in unprecedented numbers—from protests to town halls across our nation. Our communities are organizing, not only to fight back against these harmful policies, but to build a better and more inclusive future. Our allies are also pushing back in the courts, with Trump losing more than 90% of his court cases. Even Trump-appointed judges are blocking his agenda. I’ve also been fighting back against Trump’s agenda in Congress. Resistance on all these fronts has led to wins like the reinstatement of student visas and the release of students such as Mohsen Mahdawi, Rumeysa Ozturk, and Badar Khan Suri. I will keep holding the Trump administration accountable, fighting for our rights, and defending the life-saving programs that millions of families rely on. In yesterday’s email, I shared some of the ways I’m resisting in Congress, including questioning Trump’s officials in Congressional committees and leading Congressional letters to the Trump administration, demanding restoration of federal funding and an end to illegal deportations and detentions. I’m also leading legislation to expand our civil rights, support unhoused people, and uplift marginalized Americans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Please feel free to read more from yesterday’s email about what my team and I are up to. With you in the fight against fascism and for a better future, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, May 17, 2025 Subject: fighting back against Trump To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Our resistance has power. After we pushed in Congress, on the streets, and in the courts, more than 1,000 student visas have been reinstated and some detained students have been released—including Rumeysa Ozturk, Dr. Badar Khan Suri, and Mohsen Mahdawi. I will keep pushing to free them all and to defend our constitutional rights to free speech and due process. Upon his release, Mohsen told Trump, “I’m not afraid of you.” These victories for our movements and our rights show that our pressure is working and we cannot back down. Every week, I have been resisting and exposing the truth about how Trump is abusing his power. Using the power of the letterhead, introducing and cosponsoring bills, joining amicus briefs, and using all the tools available to us to fight back against Trump’s illegal abuses of power. During Trump’s first term, I led the movement to impeach him—twice. I will continue to be one of the loudest voices in Congress resisting Trump’s agenda. Please read on to learn more about how I’m resisting. Here are some ways I’m fighting back against Trump and Musk in Congress: I led the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending a letter to Trump demanding that his administration immediately restore all Head Start funding. After sending our letter, we saw immediate improvements to help Head Start centers access their funding. But Trump continues to threaten this vital early education program, so I led another letter demanding answers from the Department of Health and Human Services about the proposed closure of some Head Start offices. In the Financial Services Committee, I introduced an amendment to prevent any budget that cuts programs for working families and the poor to pay for billionaire tax breaks. In the House Oversight Committee, I motioned to subpoena Elon Musk to testify before Congress and explain why a billionaire that nobody voted for is apparently in charge of our government. I’m demanding Customs and Border Protection (CBP) stop separating families, secretly detaining people, and using CBP facilities for long-term detention. I visited a local CBP detention facility where hundreds of people have been detained in the past few months, simply for making a wrong turn on the Ambassador Bridge from Detroit into Canada. I’m pushing my colleagues to defend vital services like Medicaid and SNAP , including Republican Congressman John James who represents a neighboring district. We only need a few Republicans to vote against cuts, so my team and I have called and sent postcards to James’ constituents to push him on this. He refuses to hold town halls, so I accepted his constituents’ invitation to join a community town hall where I helped answer questions from 300 residents. I reintroduced legislation to expand civil rights protections for marginalized communities and to help unhoused young people with direct cash assistance. After the Trump administration proposed gutting the office that upholds our fair housing laws,I questioned the Acting Inspector General for the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) and called on him to move with urgency in investigating this administration. I’m supporting legislation to protect immigrants’ right to counsel, to revoke the Alien Enemies Act which Trump wants to use to deport and detain U.S. citizens, to block cuts to Medicaid and food assistance, and more. I’ve joined my colleagues in signing onto letters demanding DHS stop the transfer of U.S. residents to the notorious CECOT prison camp in El Salvador, calling on FEMA to resume funding for the Emergency Food and Shelter Program, urging the DHS Inspector General to investigate systemic abuse and due process violations, defending consumer protections, condemning Trump’s corrupt market manipulation and insider trading, opposing the closure of Social Security Administration field offices and threats to Meals on Wheels, urging protections for national parks, opposing attacks on transgender Americans, and demanding the Department of Education continue programs that support English learners and also rescind its threat to defund schools with DEI programs. As a proud Arab American Congresswoman representing one of the largest Arab American communities in our country,I reintroduced a resolution to recognize April as Arab American Heritage Month and uplift the culture, history, and contributions of Arab Americans. Our stories matter, now more than ever: They cannot erase us. I introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block billions in Trump’s planned weapons transfers to the Israeli military. I also reintroduced historic legislation to recognize the ongoing Nakba against Palestinians. My team and I are training progressives who want to run for office and supporting young people who want to be involved in their communities. We’re also holding Know Your Rights workshops and trainings on union organizing. We can’t give into cynicism. Our communities are hurting, but we are not backing down. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing alongside me as we resist together. The way to fight fascism is by continuing to advocate and speak truth to power. Let’s continue rising up against this fascist government. With you in this fight, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Team DASS
subject: Trump’s $400 million gift from Qatar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill [#]
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-web-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-web-2025?refcode=em-header]
This is unbelievable, friend.

Donald Trump just declared that he’d gladly accept a $400 million plane from the authoritarian regime of Qatar.

Not only is he going to use it as the next Air Force One, but he’s also taking the plane with him when he leaves office in 2029.

Let’s be clear: this isn’t just unethical. It’s unconstitutional:

“No Title of Nobility shall be granted by the United States: And no Person holding any Office of Profit or Trust under them, shall, without the Consent of the Congress, accept of any present, Emolument, Office, or Title, of any kind whatever, from any King, Prince, or foreign State. ”
-Foreign Emoluments Clause of the United States Constitution

We’ve seen this before. From crypto “meme-coins” to Mar-a-Lago pay-to-play, Trump’s message is clear: if you’re rich, powerful, he’s for sale.

Enough is enough.

Congress must act now to block what amounts to a $400 million bribe to the president of the United States.

Add your name now to demand immediate action and defend the Constitution from Trump’s blatant corruption. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/qatar-plane-petition-51425]

SIGN [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/qatar-plane-petition-51425]

Thank you,

Team DASS
Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.
Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda.

body:

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d27d2618641844718ba6b8c6e450466a&_e=BvyaFVYe-pDVEcxXnlkCR-ZDzXiNjN9Ie7qZ1fxRMsppQFgy9pt9B8rcqECS5E9ijgN9Oc1GG8bvAJRfCRNShkAn9KyBkS5_DgUmL6S3q-Bb4xB-VRsBMx3gmwSaQE6nyLjLXdP1w1ARCRijoe9npgP2MQ6EAJVqWEqUPJjejU2Tf1mBoAfE8tb2l553z37Doj8Tkg8bdc3t15pzHhpxysbl68zTWezaxiaAtMS9CCge2X7S5eyVrUp9LFfJyJVe8_VszbJSXd2_oc7z18OM-jnpanNDXyG8jvMRoxhO4tEQkxeaBn3t6r3981aCNKpbO44ybLAq963K-W2uY2qQXF7GHrJ5q1nZTfYtNSSJuz437Yu5qrU90rbehWxP6bxtk64lxeoiipyWKT4vAkINSAyOl9EmNYyrXh91NbQ5xM0%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d27d2618641844718ba6b8c6e450466a&_e=BvyaFVYe-pDVEcxXnlkCR-ZDzXiNjN9Ie7qZ1fxRMsppQFgy9pt9B8rcqECS5E9ijgN9Oc1GG8bvAJRfCRNShkAn9KyBkS5_DgUmL6S3q-Bb4xB-VRsBMx3gmwSaQE6nyLjLXdP1w1ARCRijoe9npgP2MQ6EAJVqWEqUPJjejU2Tf1mBoAfE8tb2l553z37Doj8Tkg8bdc3t15pzHhpxysbl68zTWezaxiaAtMS9CCge2X7S5eyVrUp9LFfJyJVe8_VszbJSXd2_oc7z18OM-hWb3VGZHxWrgkfr20rRkujo5ZXtcuxSFzT44URuvtbWGQN8zb7UskqnLYKh6kLyfJTQbWMNP448vcgfViQdZ1-SQf3tcn_5mzXhLLfR0S9ih0dnhODlYkM1YGDTbhU0tPMdfdqpGlsCIrMk50dhrKk%3D)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d27d2618641844718ba6b8c6e450466a&_e=BvyaFVYe-pDVEcxXnlkCR-ZDzXiNjN9Ie7qZ1fxRMsppQFgy9pt9B8rcqECS5E9ijgN9Oc1GG8bvAJRfCRNShkAn9KyBkS5_DgUmL6S3q-Bb4xB-VRsBMx3gmwSaQE6nyLjLXdP1w1ARCRijoe9npgP2MQ6EAJVqWEqUPJjejU2Tf1mBoAfE8tb2l553z37Doj8Tkg8bdc3t15pzHhpxysbl68zTWezaxiaAtMS9CCge2X7S5eyVrUp9LFfJyJVe8_VszbJSXd2_oc7z18OM-pGpNgKycSAVcDS3i3C7JBYr7xwQ_agVBDxIDLg74O47dynpPV4gjPYPESvakcoqSMuO20PGuk1HsR5KZ2derazUzhaDISjgp_-TWeuhNUC6ILkSaQJ69TikktrEULJlQKbjOD-rLNJDy7uvc3FPiiY%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

clean_body: The greatest armed conflict in human history A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: I’m honored to endorse this working class champion for Congress:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I’m supporting Donavan McKinney for Congress, who’s running to represent
the congressional district next to mine.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250518-rt-dm?refcode=em20250518-36684&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36684_1203867_kbwWa6&akid=36684%2E1203867%2EkbwWa6 ]Photo of Donavan McKinney with his wife and two children
Here's Donavan with his family

Working at Michigan’s largest healthcare union and serving in Michigan’s
State House, Donavan has led fights to secure workers’ rights, get big
money out of politics, and ensure access to clean air and water. Like me,
he grew up in the shadows of corporate polluters in Detroit, and he’s
fighting to replace the lead pipes that poison our children.

We’re demanding a democracy that’s of, by, and for the people, where the
federal government stops spending so much taxpayer money on war crimes and
prisons, and instead invests in our communities’ urgent needs.

Donavan knows how quickly we need to act because he has lived through
struggles such as housing and food insecurity. He puts the people first,
and if elected to Congress, Donavan will provide working class
representation for one of the poorest congressional districts in the
country.

This is quite a contrast to his opponent, a self-funded incumbent who
spent over $17 million of his own wealth to bankroll his own Congressional
campaigns. This incumbent also takes money from corporate PACs, and last
year spent more taxpayer money than any other member of Congress on
self-promoting ads.

Meanwhile, Donavan isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, and he has
led policies to challenge corporate influence in politics. We need him in
Congress, and he needs grassroots support to get there.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250518-rt-dm?refcode=em20250518-36684&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36684_1203867_kbwWa6&akid=36684%2E1203867%2EkbwWa6 ]Will you join me in supporting Donavan McKinney for Congress by
splitting a contribution between Justice Democrats, his campaign, and mine
today? Together, we’ll push for a government of, by, and for the people,
not the billionaires.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250518-rt-dm?refcode=em20250518-36684&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36684_1203867_kbwWa6&akid=36684%2E1203867%2EkbwWa6 ]Split $5

Donavan said: “I’m running for my baby boys, because the block you live on
shouldn’t determine how far you go. I’m running for you, because I know we
deserve better.”

We do deserve better, and we deserve representatives who actually fight
for their communities.

Donavan is a true public servant, and while in office he has secured real
wins for the people—including over $600 million to replace lead pipes and
more than $10 million in community violence intervention programs.

In Congress, he will keep fighting for public education, public transit,
changes to our racist criminal legal system, affordable housing, universal
healthcare, and more.

He’ll also be a partner in the fight for a universal basic income. I’ve
led policies to send monthly direct payments to individuals and families,
and as more Americans are struggling to pay bills and stay housed, we need
more Congressional support for transformative anti-poverty programs.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250518-rt-dm?refcode=em20250518-36684&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36684_1203867_kbwWa6&akid=36684%2E1203867%2EkbwWa6 ]Will you help me and Donavan McKinney fight for the society we all
deserve by chipping into our campaigns for Congress today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250518-rt-dm?refcode=em20250518-36684&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36684_1203867_kbwWa6&akid=36684%2E1203867%2EkbwWa6 ]Split a Donation

Thank you for having our backs and keeping up the fight for a better
future. We’ll keep fighting together.

In solidarity,

Rashida

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250518-36684-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36684_1203867_kbwWa6&akid=36684%2E1203867%2EkbwWa6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36684%2E1203867%2EkbwWa6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Rob Sand
subject: a big tent ⛺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We’re going to win this race by building the biggest tent we possibly can
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88593?refcode=em20250518-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8942%2E614464%2EE0fJ0D)
Peter, I’ve been blown away by the massive outpouring of support I’ve received since announcing I’m running for governor in Iowa. At the risk of sounding corny, it really is inspiring.
_But this race is a marathon, not a sprint, so if we’re going to flip the script here in Iowa and elect me as Iowa’s next governor, we need to build a sustainable grassroots movement._
I’ve _*literally*_ made a career of going after partisan insiders, so although we know they’re going to do whatever they can to defeat me, we’ve got something they don’t:
**_This grassroots team of supporters that are craving change in Iowa._**
My team set a goal to bring in 20,000 Founding Donors the first week of this campaign, and doing so would send a clear message that we’ve got that extra umph we need to win a fiercely competitive race like this one.
**[We’ve got a massive opportunity here, because with Gov. Reynolds not running,_this is anyone’s race._ That’s why I’m personally asking for your help, Peter: Will you pitch in $10 split between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to become a Founding Donor today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88593?refcode=em20250518-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8942%2E614464%2EE0fJ0D)**
**[Donate $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88593?refcode=em20250518-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8942%2E614464%2EE0fJ0D)**
**[Other amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88593?refcode=em20250518-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8942%2E614464%2EE0fJ0D)**
You might be asking yourself, “how much of an impact can my $10 actually have?”
Peter, I’m so glad you asked.
As we’ve seen in multiple special elections already this year, Iowans are eager for change.
Iowa Democrats overperformed by over 20 points in three special elections – the top 3 overperformances in the nation!
We’re going to win this race by building the biggest tent we possibly can, and to do that, we must reach out to Iowans in-person and across digital channels to communicate with folks who might not otherwise hear from us.
**_So it’s not just your $10, Peter. Your support inspires others to give, and so forth. You know, pay it forward and all._**
**[So please, before you close out of this email, will you consider splitting a donation to join my team as a Founding Donor? This race won’t be easy, but when we all join together, we can achieve incredible things!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88593?refcode=em20250518-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8942%2E614464%2EE0fJ0D)**

clean_body: We’re going to win this race by building the biggest tent we possibly can Peter, I’ve been blown away by the massive outpouring of support I’ve received since announcing I’m running for governor in Iowa. At the risk of sounding corny, it really is inspiring. But this race is a marathon, not a sprint, so if we’re going to flip the script here in Iowa and elect me as Iowa’s next governor, we need to build a sustainable grassroots movement. I’ve literally made a career of going after partisan insiders, so although we know they’re going to do whatever they can to defeat me, we’ve got something they don’t: This grassroots team of supporters that are craving change in Iowa. My team set a goal to bring in 20,000 Founding Donors the first week of this campaign, and doing so would send a clear message that we’ve got that extra umph we need to win a fiercely competitive race like this one. You might be asking yourself, “how much of an impact can my $10 actually have?” Peter, I’m so glad you asked. As we’ve seen in multiple special elections already this year, Iowans are eager for change. Iowa Democrats overperformed by over 20 points in three special elections – the top 3 overperformances in the nation! We’re going to win this race by building the biggest tent we possibly can, and to do that, we must reach out to Iowans in-person and across digital channels to communicate with folks who might not otherwise hear from us. So it’s not just your $10, Peter. Your support inspires others to give, and so forth. You know, pay it forward and all. Your support means the world to me and my team, Peter, so thank you. —Rob Sand | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

body:
Trump wants to force her silence
| Elizabeth Warren just wrote a SCATHING op-ed for Fox News slamming Trump’s attacks on Social Security: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90194?t=6&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj) **The MAGA mob is FUMING — Trump will do anything to force her silence!**

[**We need 500 local Democrats to stand with Warren in her fight: Donate $3 to add your signature to our thank you card! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90194?t=7&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90194?t=8&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj)
---
TO: Senator Elizabeth Warren
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Warren,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge to save Social Security!**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are TERRIFIED of strong Democrats like you — that’s why you’re at the top of their revenge list.

Please know that millions of Americans have your back. I REFUSE to stand idly by and let my hard-earned Social Security be stolen by MAGA billionaires!

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to destroy Social Security — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90194?t=9&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90194?t=10&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19882%2E878179%2E4csEHj)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81b0e9be-9baa-48eb-8ba7-b741e9e0bac0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: This hasn’t happened since 2008

body:
You may or may not remember how close the 2008 Minnesota Senate race was, but here are a few reasons why you should know. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPd07EJtVphObID8TgN6UCAq8-ipYpX0HSX4AKp0fRlHHBJ62LmT2MiNxfQ1VYg4VxgY8hajBthn0LX3xbdb_BTEEd_NMzpevsJxG8MTjLno6P_z8MylboMBOGiwZPU_VOFT7gu4UJXItaPXk4zUCgLc%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPTmjCBTLx1cUmATRDCdQux3boKDFD1X1Q-C6RiWy3X1wPn0gFOxax-JyEWskk0soa0PK-YoPwtZay0MkCidaYqnHMhBIKOhEqDrT8Gdp9Z835ZzrXfPK0gbb73WBWGRhb61xnp1dn6O1tm9b_EPbkbY%3D)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPZ8Qi94-F41tMS69IgMmfQ7jjQe_nwmUUktwPp4UDGBeNy7cMs5rLxGU6kDFmxVqDUEqSShyZDLFjdXMKmtqAbCGy623Y8q9C-V_kJA6G1bqfT8Kn1le9r2gIv8thvkLW_e-YzPbKAfNKgcfkbS38x8%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPctGRQ7pAUvD1IIBXpOZxOOM0OIFc0rMoyZMwGnTm_f3ajj8RteSdVs3N-uO9YM8WW8H-bTNZrDJCSn1uFOVPuLcVBIw2Qx33xEczqxt1pPeMXKDVkbkBDSh-37-muXKnjxHt_2YqBWkDtFLvtZnZqw%3D)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPSA3WJ_1ykFOcYr3tDuIks-OvKzI3OthR4HSW8Z1PBm46A0015WZQx-m8xEMrIFLmLtbVSL6DJ8gdn6mzLtaZxyY5pI8snZ_KbehhcDBDZ8Cfe2k4Xos5ZWjYXcMKFpxs3Qpua0oL48miKqB9OrmJcw%3D)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPfOboY3adRuzqGuV9LLPrXscjv2EJ-a6OklouFsbNMfmiNpClOfH2vb8dptA04MeqEAWiFR3c6HdbXt0Ro1Rclbt9scDZqHOeM2ORqWAeUfUzEZDMU5lx1zReqqpY4tOky6VQcoozXwKkQ5NdT89W3s%3D)
So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod.

The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and _**[I’m hopeful that if you don’t donate today, you’ll allow me to earn your support in the coming months.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPVOyxJ4WIJe6Nt00mm3YKdzgf2jbAbtP6IS8TVKZGG2vnLJZzI6rmRhkxmBd2DJ07awjElEF4--80ZR9f1j2xmbPB0S_B1iQfz6CVdwc859TIPdDJp8UkzeMnObSotLJ-NndxJZmljtJYfJxfyjbMdU%3D) **_

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPVaGyu1G74bWBMQ_RFmLB8T7o0VGwPfDWMwfh66c3H4dhihDQZuel5aVR1YDiEIFvNaVzJphRqPD2N4LVl6u1vu4g8RjgOLJAta1z0YufSBZqb0Mlo18jWHXW9KgqTRF-KkpAGpVBoa3KFCOzfMFumE%3D)

I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet.

_**[I'd be so grateful if you could chip in $5, $10, or even $50 right now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d92f48b19df84786ac3063c4eec6d3f2&_e=2IyvFw4ek-1IiGlZBkmz8yT_S1wtf8WxE5L_IoX1saYwEvbm7ExJ6ZQ8h2PFBcboA23kcHLMfu50UItsWX4HR1faMwlafLR6Ug5izdK5WR4o4ntEVj7UTsIty1JZ6Zs9PLAMgIsLi4zOCG2_alv2hI3my1eiPqp2mp7BTG99ypExiKXtKvX61R6uw2Lmw0bV6_eXIp-ttZ7_MeTqEoRughJbAX81WF_xHxmj9Inep2wmLSCRmpSBw2NozMMg8gpWd4kMa2aq49sqbcFOm73jPdmXu7ck1VnwXIxEW4ekhzCKFcPvOaH3W0A4W0sWVAS0fmlb78040GbeGhtkr8LLuSuZJahvQYvAwz33HkRDFYDZrHcQ7ed8c1Jrxh3FV4LqVa5JPs7Qza0MiHADQTZP6-A9TiIZPiTxVBW7Yt4JAXI%3D)**_

Let’s break it down.
Since Donald Trump appointed Lee Zeldin to lead the Environmental Protection Agency, the EPA has become almost unrecognizable — a shell of the agency that once protected our public health and environment.
Here’s just a fraction of what Zeldin’s EPA has done:
❌ Zeldin launched **the most consequential environmental protection rollback in U.S. history:** 31 sweeping actions to deregulate power plants, oil drilling, car emissions, and toxic air standards.
❌ He proposed **slashing two-thirds of the EPA’s budget** — crippling its ability to monitor pollution and hold corporate polluters accountable.
❌ And just last week, Zeldin announced plans to **gut federal protections against PFAS — hazardous chemicals in our drinking water** that are linked to cancer, heart disease, and birth defects.
Zeldin himself called the climate movement a “religion” and bragged that his goal was to drive “a dagger straight into [its] heart.”
When someone in charge of our clean air and water talks like that, you know exactly where their loyalties lie, and it’s not with the people. **That’s why we’re asking for your input — to make it clear that we see what’s happening, and we won’t sit this one out.**
**Before the end of today, will you take a quick moment to grade Lee Zeldin’s EPA?**

clean_body: They’re poisoning our water. What grade does that deserve? | 🔴 LIVE POLL 🔴 What grade would you give Lee Zeldin’s Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)? | Let’s break it down. Since Donald Trump appointed Lee Zeldin to lead the Environmental Protection Agency, the EPA has become almost unrecognizable — a shell of the agency that once protected our public health and environment. Here’s just a fraction of what Zeldin’s EPA has done: ❌ Zeldin launched the most consequential environmental protection rollback in U.S. history: 31 sweeping actions to deregulate power plants, oil drilling, car emissions, and toxic air standards. ❌ He proposed slashing two-thirds of the EPA’s budget — crippling its ability to monitor pollution and hold corporate polluters accountable. ❌ And just last week, Zeldin announced plans to gut federal protections against PFAS — hazardous chemicals in our drinking water that are linked to cancer, heart disease, and birth defects. Zeldin himself called the climate movement a “religion” and bragged that his goal was to drive “a dagger straight into [its] heart.” When someone in charge of our clean air and water talks like that, you know exactly where their loyalties lie, and it’s not with the people. That’s why we’re asking for your input — to make it clear that we see what’s happening, and we won’t sit this one out. Before the end of today, will you take a quick moment to grade Lee Zeldin’s EPA? | What Is In This Newsletter?

* Do facts matter

* (Re) Introducing ourselves

---
| |
---
| Hello,
We could not be more excited for all that lays ahead. Thank you for your continuing support!
We filed for 501(c)(4) nonprofit status under the name Rural Americans United for Inclusive Democracy. This designation gives us greater flexibility in our programming, access to new funding opportunities and resources, and a reduced reporting and administrative burden.
We're transforming our communications platform to a more robust system that enables us to better connect and grow. As we settle into the new platform we hope you will forgive our tests and trials.
We're also actively working with and interviewing agencies that can help us develop more powerful strategies for promoting democratic values across rural Washington State. Over 80% of our neighbors in rural, Central and Eastern Washington have never heard a pro-democratic message! Please read to the bottom of this newsletter so we can reintroduce our Directors and Advisory Board members.
---
| |
---
---
| |
---
|
## 📰 Do Facts Matter
---
|

### 🧠 Why Understanding Matters

I once studied under a professor who was a stickler for truly grasping concepts. He said, "If you can't describe a thing without using the name of the thing, you probably don't understand the thing." That lesson stuck with me. Now, as we face the relentless dismantling of our democracy and rule of law under 47, it's critical that we do understand--deeply and clearly--what we're fighting for.

### ⚖️ The Facts Divide

If there's one stereotype that holds up, it's this: Democrats are obsessed with facts. MAGA, on the other hand, seems to have no use for them. This puts democrats at a disadvantage. While we're buried in research crafting careful rebuttals, the conversation has already moved on--and often the "truth" has been redefined without us. MAGA's strategy is simple: make bold, often outrageous claims without regard for the truth. This forces Democrats onto the defensive, tasked with disproving falsehoods instead of driving the narrative.That's a strategic failure we must correct.

### 🧭 The Role of Facts in Debate

When I walk into a room, I want to be armed with the facts--cold, reliable, in my back pocket. But I also know that spitting out facts in the heat of a fiery exchange rarely moves hearts or minds. The facts are there for me--to make sure my statements won't come back to bite me.
MAGA will lie, double down, and escalate. But as Democrats who believe in truth, civility, and respect, our words should ring true because they are true.

### 📌 Habeas Corpus, Latin Everyone Should Know.

There are terms being thrown around today--like habeas corpus--that many people aren't familiar with. And yet, we must understand them. These aren't just academic ideas. They are essential tools in a democracy. Knowing what they mean gives us the confidence to speak up, push back, and defend our values in every conversation that matters.

## 🏛️ What Is Habeas Corpus?

Habeas corpus is a legal right that protects people from being imprisoned without justification. It allows you to ask a court to decide whether your detention is lawful.
If the government can't explain why you're being held, the court can order your release.
It's one of our strongest safeguards against abuse of power.

# 📖 Abraham Lincoln Did What?

In 1861, Abraham Lincoln suspended habeas corpus to allow the military to arrest suspected Confederate sympathizers without immediate court review.
When Chief Justice Roger Taney ruled this unconstitutional--arguing only Congress had that authority--Lincoln ignored the decision. The clash sparked a major debate about presidential power during national emergencies, one that still echoes today.

### 📅 Modern Example: Guantanamo Bay

After 9/11, the U.S. detained hundreds at Guantanamo Bay without charge. The Bush administration claimed these detainees had no legal right to challenge their imprisonment because they were held outside U.S. soil.
But in 2008, the Supreme Court ruled in Boumediene v. Bush that habeas corpus does apply. Even in wartime, even at Guantanamo, the right to challenge unlawful detention still stands.

### 🛡️ Why This Still Matters

Habeas corpus might sound technical--but it's anything but abstract. It's a firewall against tyranny. And in turbulent political times, those firewalls are the first targets.
If we don't understand these terms, we risk losing the protections they represent.
So yes, facts matter. They anchor us to truth, law, and justice. And the better we understand those facts--like what habeas corpus really means--the better equipped we are to protect democracy.

|
### Doug White
Director
Doug is a fourth-generation farmer from Yakima, Washington, with a global career in project management. He's led large international teams, navigating complex goals and diverse perspectives to deliver projects on time and under budget. Doug brought those skills home when he ran for Congress, uniting Central Washington Democrats into a coordinated campaign for the first time. He raised more money than any candidate in district history, forced unprecedented spending from his opponent, and led the first bilingual campaign and forums in the region. Now, Doug focuses on building lasting political infrastructure. He believes strong organization--not just elections--is the key to lasting democratic success.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Maricela Sanchez, MD
Director
Maricela is a dedicated advocate for rural prosperity and community health. Born to a Mexican immigrant family in the Yakima Valley, she worked alongside her family as a migrant farm laborer--an experience that shaped her commitment to agriculture, education, and equity. She earned a degree in American Ethnic Studies from the University of Washington and taught through Teach for America in Los Angeles. Driven to make a broader impact, she went on to earn her medical degree from Stanford and completed her anesthesiology training at Columbia University. Now practicing at Kadlec Regional Medical Center in Richland, WA, Dr. Sanchez also serves on the Pasco City Council and the board of Heritage University. Her leadership bridges healthcare, education, and sustainable development in service to rural communities.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Shirley Grossman
Advisory Board Member
Shirley was a founding organizer of the Donkey Club in Eastern Washington. The Donkey Club is a pro-democratic values organization second in size only to the Spokane Democratic Party. Her connections up and down Congressional District 5 have proven instrumental in launching the Granny Caravan: Unity Road Tour. She is a consistent fundraiser for Rural Americans United and has started a legacy in honor of her late daughter Eve, with all proceeds going to Rural Americans United. Despite her exuberant spirit, Shirley faces deep challenges in her personal life. She has lost both her husband and a daughter and speaks of the prejudices she faces as a member of the Jewish faith.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Soneya Lund
Advisory Board Member
Soneya is a community leader and small business owner based in Yakima, Washington. As a former City Councilperson and Deputy Mayor, she combines her background in business and public service to address local challenges--especially housing insecurity and homelessness. She serves on multiple boards and committees, including the Yakima Planning Commission, Justice Housing Board, and the Yakima County Homeless Coalition Executive Committee. A graduate of Leadership Yakima and active member of the Rotary Club, Soneya is committed to building a stronger, more inclusive Yakima through advocacy, collaboration, and direct service.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Paul Tabayoyon
Advisory Board Member
Paul Tabayoyon is the Executive Director of APIC-Yakima (Asian Pacific Islander Coalition of Yakima) and a lifelong resident of Yakima, Washington. With a background in industrial automation and project management, Paul returned to school to earn a Bachelor of Applied Science in Integrated Energy Management from Central Washington University in 2019, building on earlier studies at Perry Tech and Yakima Valley College. Paul brings a systems-thinking approach to community advocacy, focused on equity, sustainability, and access to opportunity. He's committed to improving lives by expanding educational and civic engagement across Yakima's diverse communities.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Odalys Gonzalez
Advisory Board Member
Odalys is a community outreach coordinator for UFCW Local 21. She is known for her active community engagement, often at protests, marches, and community events supporting democratic values. Her passion for community education is commendable. Odalys' work to empower workers and establish fair compensation and respect for their contributions is important. She is unrelenting in her defense of workers.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Joshua Hastings
Advisory Board Member
Joshua (he/him) is an IT consultant, nonprofit leader, and LGBTQ+ advocate based in Yakima, WA, with roots in Wapato on the Yakama Reservation. His career spans roles at Microsoft, Kelley Blue Book, and Yakima Valley Farm Workers Clinic, with expertise in technology, digital communications, and design. As President and co-founder of Yakima Pride, Joshua has advanced LGBTQ+ advocacy across Central Washington. He also serves on the Advisory Board of Rural Americans United, where he brings a strong focus on inclusive representation, community empowerment, and digital strategy.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Kim Lehrman
Advisory Board Member
Kim is a dedicated educator, community leader, and advocate for inclusion based in Pasco, WA. Raised on a first-generation cattle and alfalfa farm in the Tri-Cities, she brings a unique rural perspective to her roles as a teacher, mother of four, and Vice Chair of the Pasco Planning Commission. With degrees in Agriculture Science and Educational Leadership, Kim has taught welding, agriculture, and CTE courses across local high schools. She has also been active in youth sports, school district planning, and civic engagement campaigns. Now an art instructor at Chiawana High School, Kim champions equity, safety, affordable housing, and community-driven development across Pasco.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Jayce Wright
Advisory Board Member
Jayce (he/him/his) born and raised in East Pasco, spent 10+ years in Seattle, have been back in the TriCities for nearly 10 years. Background working with at-risk, homeless, and LGBT+ youth, with work experience in and with schools and partnering non-profits. Director of Communications for our new and local NAACP Chapter 1135-B. Committed to community improvement and servant leadership. Believer in continued education/training and the powers of collaboration. Love to explore what great minds can create together! Soulja for the cause.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Ivy Murumbei
Advisory Board Member
My name is Ivy. I graduated from Southridge High School in 2024 through the Running Start program and am now pursuing a bachelor's degree in political science. I was born in Kitengela, Kenya, and moved to Dallas, Texas, when I was five. About four years ago, my family relocated to the Tri-Cities. Being from a developing country comes with challenges, but I've learned to embrace those experiences and carry the lessons with me. Kenya taught me the power of community, the value of gratitude, and the responsibility we have to one another. I believe uplifting those in need--locally and globally--is not a burden, but a privilege we should all strive to fulfill.
---
| | | |
---
|
### Bertha Alicia Garza
Advisory Board Member
Bertha Alicia has a dedicated career in community-based and grass-rooted organizations. Bertha Alicia Garza is the founder of La Oficina (CSC Yakima) a grass-rooted Business Resource Center. Prior to starting Centro de Servicios Comunitarios (CSC Yakima), she was employed for over a decade with a non-profit organization bringing youth college outreach and after-school programs to Central Washington school districts. She had co-founded a local business center where she was dealing with many Hispanic families that needed her assistance. As the CEO and founder of CSC Yakima, Bertha Alicia brings expertise in program development and management, strategic planning, and organizational development. Bertha Alicia is bilingual and bicultural and is extensively involved in minority leadership efforts in her community over the past 20 years. She strives to build alliances, break barriers, and culturally inclusive practices that create positive relati
---
| | | |
---
|
### Ana Ruiz-Kennedy
Advisory Board Member
Ana is a seasoned business liaison, community advocate, and recent candidate for Washington's Legislative District 14. With a background in marketing, financial services, and community development, Ana currently serves as a Business Liaison at Craft3, helping to drive equitable economic impact across the region. She has held key roles at Numerica Credit Union, Fiesta Foods, and New York Life, and served as Vice-Chair of the Washington State Commission on Hispanic Affairs, advising on issues affecting the Latino community. Ana's career began as a Spanish interpreter with Pacific Interpreters, where she spent over a decade bridging communication gaps. Her deep commitment to equity, economic opportunity, and public service defines her work and advocacy across Central Washington.

body:
The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

|
---
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/OEqug6x311lfNiv5Z7jXf_Carwf7DeP0hWNSUP80exIFN1oaN8PGeoxTqSpztucWMlEuzSPIme07BKM0KAFEngQTEOPeCRzWt5pOMy2-VCiQSfDT2UUyAmWpMve8LkzYCI15RFcc8xLhMn-w338KorwgLDFA83E5i7kz-rZt90USD1CbzH6JI6ywkhbYH4AZxUstTPC5_zONXPW-vDtkR6oem2Er6pJcLYETICaI61HcnCLjDmXjw9-LgL8BLx9pROi0CddVhJvPtlojFBZqHeeDc8Zo8b31Fr2UjZtr88YmRvdyTxpS18YpJiUxlm6oyQY3lsU995eMkdFZM3npZ_Wd1zPsmMM2G5gbisXwI3RyK07Zwi4iDS2TNJGGyHi0U5xNzC0xAVIF9k17tah8YRwd6IMjCj-gLFxlQpZjSsNf_3y7PEZKvfu9kxwhjriOMVGLxl5YYkpTVG-Ficb7GuiawyGWkJ4E2xq7P9hirwTHT6LDplpK/5VM71htcVivyw9gb-UFxb50PhhlkUVJY/9)

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

**[Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/YNJKtDzbLFKbBW1rEJZv2beUtQZuxgTBtjVzD8nW5qxEPW4W-wt4hDr8f9qVob-9sX3UZKS4KmR47ex4nbLEJWiAVn2m0cz1Z_r-bwcxC4ANdHKZ5fxNWRr7XTQbsgeaifERimEtVGHCpX6U-Mf71ORuzCAU_oRiPeD22lbhcJhBB3WnnCtw2vrEGzRrz-o8qadh3__5SynT94BVr2Sqlrc-pBLnIw5hFH4jNn31Wus-tPu2982o59BHMqHNfp0d_WvHaX-Jej6C_1nRrwVDnrXCKVkJTNy75HErebP5C-wgjmYU3cqeeuh1QUfr3fh3kVWOw0uEUmmGdqBH5rE8urQdHGwz19McnsJHhwZ48xfDl5Nv1xt8EUDeHXO4SBHPlApn7CNQP-jb2urmajb_wUFYHeSAZJZaQLLVyMSrLQ3mSmZCSD6k9atiNO357Sgv5NE67ODB4h5FEesBYOUqz4kLgcIS616F-2WT0g2kSeKg0-u6hIlA/TK5MXFSCtUP5fvDugXlIWhwUwUBvgR-l/9 "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.")**

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.
In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/1M4IEctFTYmKpyRpbqspLdqmO2UI5OWdplMU-s5QPr1diJjrvh6jiy70dEQIFRFy4OkV5tmHfvchc6raf2Lm7MhV9QTU07ONWmdhjGhhDxt6cTk13DynHBIuzDlzlNx9n36k-CBdGPTPIsKROBM03xBMQmkvEd84QNDCPU6p0xEcyEFHZhXxtcZXZQimQLol302q52fSf8-xTB20c_OAI9ZUJSmXNosFH_G6COOigJgqhWGM9MkOBG5WnRTD1y9_vY47wJaCTUa5-EOkMbyxaD0UwzHoXA7aMiRuSt_OExhouD8PHjn9hexcKeX2zT1cZSGemf09D0xeHRAq1PLBdYHNtJ-HJtmPQfeELW-CMkEZILp8DeShmp8YiPD-VuS7LK1KVpLaf26WJJtFwW99zqzbyjd_GHk3mDUUdBkwRlMJjlVIFWFsQMpbSR6mq07_wsg_SRaOu8OVG7V3Q8N4-ewTRZTTuhOdfxlnYDpjuaH-VwoSGJit/smTlqvusUHKJdWYX9Qnu2blpxfiT8oxz/9 "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.")**

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/6cab6a59-70ab-44f8-b24c-7838466d3181?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
photo c/o Gene Sharp
Catholics have their first American-born Pope but in Washington, DC, Congress can't decide who they want to be their next spiritual leader on Capitol Hill.
Among the frontrunners is a Baptist pastor named Brad Wells. In 2015, he moved from a multi-decade mission in Papau New Guinea to DC with his wife and seven kids.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cecb216b-4477-4c85-8db2-48ac0a2e5c75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
photo c/o Gene Sharp
When Brad arrived, he had no church and no notion of how exactly he would make it work. Barack Obama was President and Paul Ryan was the Speaker of the House. Over the subsequent ten years, it's safe to say that politics in DC have seen some change. And Pastor Wells' church has grown from eight people (his family) to hundreds that meet every Sunday at an Old Civil War Hospital on the east side of Capitol Hill.
Conservative Baptist Mike Johnson is now the Speaker of the House and Trump has returned as the 47th President of the United States. Aside from 160 years ago when the country was split by kinetic war, this is arguably the most divided political landscape America has seen.
And that division is not solely reserved for the political domain; it has spilled into the realm of divinity too.
The current Chaplain is named Rev. Margaret Kibben, a minister of the Presbyterian Church and a former Rear Admiral in the United States Navy. Kibben was the first female anointed to the position since its inception in 1789. The position carries a salary of $200k per year and the responsibilities include delivering a prayer before the House enters session, and ministering to the spiritual needs of the 435 members and their staff. She was elected by a Democratic Congress in 2021 under then-House Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Johnson recently demoted her to "acting Chaplain," which means that the search for a new spiritual representative is underway.
**[This has been framed as a purely partisan issue by the likes of news outlets like Bloomberg,](https://substack.com/redirect/9ddc54d7-8c6e-4f2f-87de-4f41b48ebc81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who edited brief quotes from Brad to make it look like he is one of Mike Johnson's henchmen. The article's graphic portrayed an indistinguishable figure standing in the shadow of one of the pillars in Statuary Hall, carrying what looks like the silhouette of a bible and glaring from the darkness with bright red eyes. Embedded in the article was a photo of Pastor Wells carrying a Bible in Statuary Hall, striding forward and wearing a dour look on his face. **[As someone who has been maligned by the media myself](https://substack.com/redirect/ec6edfe4-ff66-46cb-bce8-eeaf41eae043?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ,** I know how easy it is for photographers and editors to use a single momentary image in order to portray the narrative that fits their agenda. In this case, big surprise... Bloomberg portrayed Pastor Wells as a tall, menacing Bible toter bent on imposing his draconian views on the pillared halls. I've known Brad for three years, and have scarcely seen him not wearing a smile.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d5483c1b-6f7e-40a3-afef-823fee1789a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
photo c/o Johanna Wells
Full disclosure, I was saved by Brad and his ministry, baptized in front of the Civil War Hospital a week before my 34th birthday in 2023.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6798002a-f5c1-4aa3-8f4c-c9f4723d7c1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo c/o Johanna Wells
When I first showed up to Pastor Wells' church in 2022, I had peroxide-dyed hair and wore hungover bags under my eyes when I showed up for Sunday prayer.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/19826e02-5b2c-49f2-a904-62b7755c44c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Despite looking like some kind of David Bowie impersonating bum, Wells and his congregation welcomed me in with open arms. Meanwhile, my friends from DC and New York viewed my turn towards Christianity with skepticism because their agnostic worldview was rigid and dogmatic.
After hearing his sermon I was struck by how unapologetically he delivered his message, "The Bible does not say that women are beholden to men, it says they are beholden to one man: their husband." After the sermon I told the pastor, "Being a Baptist is punk rock!" While the media will have you believe that we live in a majority Christian nation, among the power centers that I grew up in--New York and DC--being a practicing Christian who believes the word of the Bible is counter cultural to say the least.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With Birch Gold Group](https://substack.com/redirect/6b118838-9251-43f7-bf32-d241c0f0f11e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
### **A Message from Donald Trump Jr...**
# **The Dollar's Greatest Threat Emerges at the "Rio Reset" this July**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6b118838-9251-43f7-bf32-d241c0f0f11e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
America's economic adversaries have been meticulously executing their **most ambitious plan yet**.
China, Russia, and their BRICS allies have spent years creating the infrastructure to **replace the U.S. dollar** as global reserve currency. It's all been happening quietly - under the radar of the mainstream news.
**But this July, everything changes.**
The BRICS nations are meeting in Rio de Janeiro for what insiders are calling the "**Rio Reset** " - the public unveiling of their plan to restructure the global monetary system _**away from dollar dominance**_.
**Here's What This Means For Your Retirement**
Without global demand, the value of every dollar you've saved - in cash, IRAs, 401(k)s, pension funds and more - would be permanently cut.
And this is why I highly recommend **diversifying into gold ASAP**.
Through every currency crisis in history, gold has preserved purchasing power.
My trusted friends at Birch Gold Group can help you **own gold in a tax-sheltered retirement account**.
**[Click here to get a FREE info kit on Gold IRAs.](https://substack.com/redirect/6b118838-9251-43f7-bf32-d241c0f0f11e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Get Free Info Kit](https://substack.com/redirect/6b118838-9251-43f7-bf32-d241c0f0f11e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This comprehensive guide explains exactly how to move your retirement savings into gold - legally and safely - _**before**_**the BRICS nations finalize their plans this July**.
Don't wait until the Rio Reset makes headlines and triggers a rush to gold. By then, prices could be significantly higher!
**[Act now and get your FREE info kit from Birch Gold Group today.](https://substack.com/redirect/6b118838-9251-43f7-bf32-d241c0f0f11e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
**(Continued)**
Knowing Brad personally and as a pastor, I sat down with him to get his version of the story rather than reducing it to two-word quotes.
Pastor Wells told me that when he arrived in Washington, the first members that he met were Nancy Pelosi with the late Civil Rights leaders Elijah Cummings and John Lewis. "This lady just walked right up to me and grabbed a hold of my arm and looked up at me and said, 'I just love what you're doing.' I recognized her, but to my shame I didn't know her name. I was brand new." That the Pastor did not recognize the most famous Congresswoman in history reveals how much his perspective differs from all of us political animals who live in DC.
While Bloomberg portrayed Brad walking through Congress ominously, the Pastor described it differently, "I always have the Bible in my hand. That is really a token symbol. I am a man of the book my life goal is... I wanna speak the word of God. Between the Republican and Democrat, once you put aside these political motives and goals of the day, we all really have the same problems... I primarily work with personal issues rather than political ones." The Pastor told me that he works with Democrats every week. He also told me that he has met with the acting Chaplain Rev. Margaret Kibben and there is, "no bad blood."
At a time when politics has seeped into nearly every aspect of our culture, Wells relies on that Bible he always carries rather than the flavor of the times. In my search for spiritual grounding after the chaos I endured during the civil unrest of 2020-2021, I personally shopped around multiple churches in DC. I was turned off by the fact that these churches cloaked Biblical story with the social and political dispositions of our present times. I wasn't a Christian yet, and in my spiritual yearning, I didn't want someone to apologize for what's in the Bible. I wanted them to tell me what it said and then let me decide for myself. That's why I ended up at Graceway with Pastor Wells. When I was working through my discipleship I asked him over lunch one day, "Pastor can I be a Christian if I believe Jesus existed, that he performed miracles, but I am still trying to wrap my head around whether or not he rose on the third day?" He replied simply, "absolutely not."
This anecdote demonstrates that Pastor Wells cares more about what the Bible says, and less about what other people think. That is becoming increasingly rare these days, as more organized sects of Christianity try to appease the increasingly secularized and modernized West.
While Catholics answer to the Diocese and the Pope in Rome, American Baptists are completely decentralized. Ironically, Pastor Wells' strict adherence to the words in the King James Bible also emphasizes the importance of an anti ecclesiastical approach to the world, one that focuses on the individual's free will rather than the dogma of the church or the culture war that's raging in the digital and political spheres.
We finished our conversation discussing the issue of religious freedom, "The choice is yours. There are some decisions we don't get to make, God made those decisions for us: our parents, our nation. But there are many other decisions we must make. These must flow from religious liberty. If we don't have religious liberty, individual decisions will be man-handled by somebody else. These decisions do not belong in our country--the freedom of the individual citizen must be maintained right from the top. So, what is the Baptist position on religious liberty? We are ultimately accountable to God and everyone must stand and give an answer to his Creator for what they do."
We are yet to see any white smoke emanate from the conclave of 10 Congressman that are searching for a new Chaplain on Capitol Hill. In 2025, it is plainly evident that the political gamesmanship in our alabaster city has creeped its way into our families, our communities, and yes, our churches too. At a time like this, it is important to remember that the Bible is not partial to Red or Blue. It remains unchanged by elections. Jesus focused more on guiding sinners to make their own choice towards God, rather than extolling the virtues of those who already found the Light.
We live in a fallen world and now more than ever it is important that we have religious leaders who stand up for what they believe to be the truth, rather than pandering their message to what they think the post-modern man wants to hear. God forbid our Congressmen and women decide to do the same. As we concluded our conversation, Pastor Wells told me, "The answer is not political, but Biblical, not in division but divinity."
