clean_body: There's a new Pope but a Congressional conclave still hasn't picked a Chaplain... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? There's a new Pope but a Congressional conclave still hasn't picked a Chaplain... | | | May 18| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- photo c/o Gene Sharp Catholics have their first American-born Pope but in Washington, DC, Congress can't decide who they want to be their next spiritual leader on Capitol Hill. Among the frontrunners is a Baptist pastor named Brad Wells. In 2015, he moved from a multi-decade mission in Papau New Guinea to DC with his wife and seven kids. | | ---|---|--- photo c/o Gene Sharp When Brad arrived, he had no church and no notion of how exactly he would make it work. Barack Obama was President and Paul Ryan was the Speaker of the House. Over the subsequent ten years, it's safe to say that politics in DC have seen some change. And Pastor Wells' church has grown from eight people (his family) to hundreds that meet every Sunday at an Old Civil War Hospital on the east side of Capitol Hill. Conservative Baptist Mike Johnson is now the Speaker of the House and Trump has returned as the 47th President of the United States. Aside from 160 years ago when the country was split by kinetic war, this is arguably the most divided political landscape America has seen. And that division is not solely reserved for the political domain; it has spilled into the realm of divinity too. The current Chaplain is named Rev. Margaret Kibben, a minister of the Presbyterian Church and a former Rear Admiral in the United States Navy. Kibben was the first female anointed to the position since its inception in 1789. The position carries a salary of $200k per year and the responsibilities include delivering a prayer before the House enters session, and ministering to the spiritual needs of the 435 members and their staff. She was elected by a Democratic Congress in 2021 under then-House Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Johnson recently demoted her to "acting Chaplain," which means that the search for a new spiritual representative is underway. who edited brief quotes from Brad to make it look like he is one of Mike Johnson's henchmen. The article's graphic portrayed an indistinguishable figure standing in the shadow of one of the pillars in Statuary Hall, carrying what looks like the silhouette of a bible and glaring from the darkness with bright red eyes. Embedded in the article was a photo of Pastor Wells carrying a Bible in Statuary Hall, striding forward and wearing a dour look on his face. , I know how easy it is for photographers and editors to use a single momentary image in order to portray the narrative that fits their agenda. In this case, big surprise... Bloomberg portrayed Pastor Wells as a tall, menacing Bible toter bent on imposing his draconian views on the pillared halls. I've known Brad for three years, and have scarcely seen him not wearing a smile. | | ---|---|--- photo c/o Johanna Wells Full disclosure, I was saved by Brad and his ministry, baptized in front of the Civil War Hospital a week before my 34th birthday in 2023. | | ---|---|--- Photo c/o Johanna Wells When I first showed up to Pastor Wells' church in 2022, I had peroxide-dyed hair and wore hungover bags under my eyes when I showed up for Sunday prayer. | | ---|---|--- Despite looking like some kind of David Bowie impersonating bum, Wells and his congregation welcomed me in with open arms. Meanwhile, my friends from DC and New York viewed my turn towards Christianity with skepticism because their agnostic worldview was rigid and dogmatic. After hearing his sermon I was struck by how unapologetically he delivered his message, "The Bible does not say that women are beholden to men, it says they are beholden to one man: their husband." After the sermon I told the pastor, "Being a Baptist is punk rock!" While the media will have you believe that we live in a majority Christian nation, among the power centers that I grew up in--New York and DC--being a practicing Christian who believes the word of the Bible is counter cultural to say the least. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) A Message from Donald Trump Jr... The Dollar's Greatest Threat Emerges at the "Rio Reset" this July | | ---|---|--- America's economic adversaries have been meticulously executing their most ambitious plan yet. China, Russia, and their BRICS allies have spent years creating the infrastructure to replace the U.S. dollar as global reserve currency. It's all been happening quietly - under the radar of the mainstream news. But this July, everything changes. The BRICS nations are meeting in Rio de Janeiro for what insiders are calling the "Rio Reset " - the public unveiling of their plan to restructure the global monetary system away from dollar dominance. Here's What This Means For Your Retirement Without global demand, the value of every dollar you've saved - in cash, IRAs, 401(k)s, pension funds and more - would be permanently cut. And this is why I highly recommend diversifying into gold ASAP. Through every currency crisis in history, gold has preserved purchasing power. My trusted friends at Birch Gold Group can help you own gold in a tax-sheltered retirement account. This comprehensive guide explains exactly how to move your retirement savings into gold - legally and safely - beforethe BRICS nations finalize their plans this July. Don't wait until the Rio Reset makes headlines and triggers a rush to gold. By then, prices could be significantly higher! (Continued) Knowing Brad personally and as a pastor, I sat down with him to get his version of the story rather than reducing it to two-word quotes. Pastor Wells told me that when he arrived in Washington, the first members that he met were Nancy Pelosi with the late Civil Rights leaders Elijah Cummings and John Lewis. "This lady just walked right up to me and grabbed a hold of my arm and looked up at me and said, 'I just love what you're doing.' I recognized her, but to my shame I didn't know her name. I was brand new." That the Pastor did not recognize the most famous Congresswoman in history reveals how much his perspective differs from all of us political animals who live in DC. While Bloomberg portrayed Brad walking through Congress ominously, the Pastor described it differently, "I always have the Bible in my hand. That is really a token symbol. I am a man of the book my life goal is... I wanna speak the word of God. Between the Republican and Democrat, once you put aside these political motives and goals of the day, we all really have the same problems... I primarily work with personal issues rather than political ones." The Pastor told me that he works with Democrats every week. He also told me that he has met with the acting Chaplain Rev. Margaret Kibben and there is, "no bad blood." At a time when politics has seeped into nearly every aspect of our culture, Wells relies on that Bible he always carries rather than the flavor of the times. In my search for spiritual grounding after the chaos I endured during the civil unrest of 2020-2021, I personally shopped around multiple churches in DC. I was turned off by the fact that these churches cloaked Biblical story with the social and political dispositions of our present times. I wasn't a Christian yet, and in my spiritual yearning, I didn't want someone to apologize for what's in the Bible. I wanted them to tell me what it said and then let me decide for myself. That's why I ended up at Graceway with Pastor Wells. When I was working through my discipleship I asked him over lunch one day, "Pastor can I be a Christian if I believe Jesus existed, that he performed miracles, but I am still trying to wrap my head around whether or not he rose on the third day?" He replied simply, "absolutely not." This anecdote demonstrates that Pastor Wells cares more about what the Bible says, and less about what other people think. That is becoming increasingly rare these days, as more organized sects of Christianity try to appease the increasingly secularized and modernized West. While Catholics answer to the Diocese and the Pope in Rome, American Baptists are completely decentralized. Ironically, Pastor Wells' strict adherence to the words in the King James Bible also emphasizes the importance of an anti ecclesiastical approach to the world, one that focuses on the individual's free will rather than the dogma of the church or the culture war that's raging in the digital and political spheres. We finished our conversation discussing the issue of religious freedom, "The choice is yours. There are some decisions we don't get to make, God made those decisions for us: our parents, our nation. But there are many other decisions we must make. These must flow from religious liberty. If we don't have religious liberty, individual decisions will be man-handled by somebody else. These decisions do not belong in our country--the freedom of the individual citizen must be maintained right from the top. So, what is the Baptist position on religious liberty? We are ultimately accountable to God and everyone must stand and give an answer to his Creator for what they do." We are yet to see any white smoke emanate from the conclave of 10 Congressman that are searching for a new Chaplain on Capitol Hill. In 2025, it is plainly evident that the political gamesmanship in our alabaster city has creeped its way into our families, our communities, and yes, our churches too. At a time like this, it is important to remember that the Bible is not partial to Red or Blue. It remains unchanged by elections. Jesus focused more on guiding sinners to make their own choice towards God, rather than extolling the virtues of those who already found the Light. We live in a fallen world and now more than ever it is important that we have religious leaders who stand up for what they believe to be the truth, rather than pandering their message to what they think the post-modern man wants to hear. God forbid our Congressmen and women decide to do the same. As we concluded our conversation, Pastor Wells told me, "The answer is not political, but Biblical, not in division but divinity." | | ---|---|--- photo c/o Johanna Wells * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with over 12 years of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. Erica was recently featured in the _Philadelphia Inquirer_ and has earned key endorsements from the local Democratic party, as well as the outgoing Mayor. She is a well-respected scientist, businesswoman, and advocate for marginalized communities. She believes in building a safe, sustainable, and strong community where everyone has a voice and every resident, regardless of age, race, gender, or background, feels welcome and protected.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107925420/546278506/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250518tuesday_N_CD_90DO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiYWQyOTI2LTAxMzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ih6lJshb__gCp0_Dtsc6Qxd8aubULcyrACyddmtixNk=)
---
Her Democratic opponent, Barry Cassidy, on the other hand, is running as a Democrat, but his words and actions tell a shocking story. **He is a proud white nationalist who routinely uses racist and anti-LGBTQ language. He openly aligns with MAGA extremism.**

But the work doesn’t stop there: If Erica wins the primary, she will be facing off against Republican Richard Bryant, **a far-right extremist and unapologetic Trump supporter.** He uses his online platform to spew misogyny, anti-trans rhetoric, and racist commentary. Additionally, he is known to mock women for their appearance, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and spread harmful lies about climate change and immigrants. He advocates for violence, promotes mass deportation, and supports banning books and suppressing votes. As Erica’s campaign has stated, **“This isn’t political disagreement—this is dangerous, dehumanizing extremism.”**

In Erica’s own words: _“I bring my whole self to this work—including my perspective as a trans woman who’s had to fight to be taken seriously in rooms where decisions get made. That makes me more determined to lead with purpose and to make sure every woman in Downingtown knows her voice matters, and her community has her back. Because when we take care of women, we’re taking care of the whole town.”_

**Her campaign must raise $17,000 to fully fund its voter outreach and mobilization programs ahead of her primary election on TUESDAY. Through our incredible community of grassroots supporters, we know we can help her get there.**

[**Rush support to Erica’s campaign and help her hit her goal ahead of Tuesday by pitching in a split $20.25 or more TODAY! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107925422/546278508/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250518tuesday_N_CD_90DO_9_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiYWQyOTI2LTAxMzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ih6lJshb__gCp0_Dtsc6Qxd8aubULcyrACyddmtixNk=)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager

body:
Donald Trump and Elon Musk want access to your Social Security records.

**Yes, you read that right.** While a federal judge has blocked this overreach, Trump is now urging the Supreme Court to reverse that ruling and grant DOGE full access to _your_ data.

This isn’t about “government efficiency.” It’s another case of Trump wielding his unchecked political power. This time, it’s putting your privacy, your future, and your Social Security at risk.

**We’re gathering urgent feedback from voters, and we’re counting on people like you to speak up for OH.** [**_This survey will only take a moment, but your voice will make a real difference in how we fight back._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107925760/546279639/-1579728258?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.05.18_Social-Security-Survey_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODVjMmU5MS0wMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFV2cLMnr_k-3716gk3CQcvtv5_4SFCOjU3EAvdj-Xw=&emci=b4b926dc-9832-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=485c2e91-0134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029) [PLEASE COMPLETE YOUR **2025 SOCIAL SECURITY SURVEY** BEFORE MIDNIGHT >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107925761/546279642/-1579728258?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.05.18_Social-Security-Survey_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODVjMmU5MS0wMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFV2cLMnr_k-3716gk3CQcvtv5_4SFCOjU3EAvdj-Xw=&emci=b4b926dc-9832-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=485c2e91-0134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029) | | [TAKE THE SURVEY ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107925764/546279643/-1579728258?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.05.18_Social-Security-Survey_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODVjMmU5MS0wMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFV2cLMnr_k-3716gk3CQcvtv5_4SFCOjU3EAvdj-Xw=&emci=b4b926dc-9832-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=485c2e91-0134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029)

Over 70 million Americans – including seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities – depend on Social Security. They’ve earned these benefits, and they _deserve_ to know their information is protected.

Instead of strengthening this vital resource, Trump and Musk are trying to seize power over our Social Security data – despite court findings that DOGE doesn’t even need this data to do its “job.”

**This fight is happening right now.** The Supreme Court could decide at any moment whether to hand over your personal information and the very resources so many have worked a lifetime to earn. We must stand together and send a clear message: our data must be protected, not exposed.
[**_Please take a moment to complete our survey to share your opinion on Trump and Musk’s attacks on Social Security — before it’s too late._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107925772/546279650/-1579728258?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.05.18_Social-Security-Survey_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODVjMmU5MS0wMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFV2cLMnr_k-3716gk3CQcvtv5_4SFCOjU3EAvdj-Xw=&emci=b4b926dc-9832-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=485c2e91-0134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029)

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: $400 Million from Qatar??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
You may have heard that the Trump Administration is planning to accept a free luxury jet from Qatar, valued at $400 million. The jet is planned to replace Air Force One, and this tenuous purchase was reportedly approved by U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi, a former lobbyist for Qatar.
As a member of the House Armed Services Committee – and frankly simply as an American – I am appalled by the White House’s blasé attitude and the willful ignorance to the very real national security risk this gift presents. The Constitution is also clear that federal officials cannot accept gifts from foreign governments without the consent of Congress. We must reassert our authority and serve as the check on the President’s power.
Even in the best case scenario, where this isn’t corruption, it certainly smells like it. A founding principle of our country is the belief that our elected officials should avoid even the appearance of impropriety. It should not be a question in the mind of any American citizen whether or not a $400 million gift has impacted our foreign policy.
This is a grassroots movement and I rely on contributions to keep it going. Will you help chip in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-18]
CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-18&amount=5.00]

CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-18&amount=50]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-18]
Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

Fellow American,

It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and **I need your immediate attention on something.**

Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026.

Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority.

**Fellow American, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy.**

Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time.

Fellow American, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, _this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left._

clean_body: Fellow American, it’s Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump’s former campaign manager, and I need your immediate attention on something. Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left’s #1 target to beat in 2026 | Fellow American, It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and I need your immediate attention on something. Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026. Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority. Fellow American, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy. Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time. Fellow American, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left. | Thank you, Kellyanne Conway In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107927799/546286929/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMzNjc3OS0wNTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8yZaHGWh1QoD1qnFvMWJTwI8fiMYGqAkUR4d3irqlT4=) For months, we’ve heard Donald Trump and Elon Musk claim that they’re going after “waste, fraud, and abuse” in the federal government. **But their budget doesn’t rein in waste. It doesn’t close corporate loopholes. And it doesn’t go after tax cheats.** Instead, they’re targeting the families and communities that need help the most: Parents who are already struggling to put food on the table. Rural hospitals on the brink of closure. New moms who can’t afford health insurance. [_**If you believe that tax breaks for billionaires and big corporations are the REAL government waste — not critical programs like SNAP and Medicaid — will you rush a donation right away to help me fight back against this devastating budget plan?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107927800/546286930/-945052836?refcode=email_051825_Waste&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMzNjc3OS0wNTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8yZaHGWh1QoD1qnFvMWJTwI8fiMYGqAkUR4d3irqlT4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107927801/546286931/-945052836?refcode=email_051825_Waste&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMzNjc3OS0wNTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8yZaHGWh1QoD1qnFvMWJTwI8fiMYGqAkUR4d3irqlT4=)

Listen, I’m all for an efficient government. But Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s budget is the total _opposite_ of efficiency. It calls for delivering trillions in handouts to the billionaires and big corporations that need it least, while footing the rest of us with the bill!
Trump’s budget will raise costs even further. It will balloon the national debt by trillions. And it will rip health care, food, and child care away from working-class families. **It’s a lose-lose budget plan — unless you’re one of Trump’s ultra-wealthy friends.**
Trump’s agenda is crystal clear: Leave communities hungrier, sicker, and worse off — all so billionaires like Elon Musk can stuff their bank accounts even further.
[_**Please, help me fight back against Trump’s budget scheme by rushing a donation today. With enough grassroots support, we can save these vital programs, put an end to Trump’s wasteful billionaire giveaways, and halt this plan in its tracks.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107927807/546286937/-945052836?refcode=email_051825_Waste&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMzNjc3OS0wNTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8yZaHGWh1QoD1qnFvMWJTwI8fiMYGqAkUR4d3irqlT4=)

name: Wes Moore
subject: What we’re doing in Maryland
body:
Together, we’re building a model for America
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=64%2E1086043%2EQgBcKq)
Service is at the core of my soul.
Whether it’s wearing an Army uniform or leading Maryland as Governor, every step of the way I’ve been guided by the principle of service to others. I know that we can build a better future.
In Maryland we’re delivering — a future without childhood poverty and with strong public schools, a future without gun violence and with a robust economy. **Because when we lift each other up, we all rise.**
We’re making historic investments in education, pioneering a first-in-the-nation public service program for high school graduates, and cutting taxes for the middle class to make it easier for Maryland families to get by.
Together, we’re building a model for America — _but there’s still so much more to accomplish._
**[Our work depends on supporters like you. When you donate to our campaign, you help build a better Maryland for everyone. I hope we can count on you to help us lift everyone up by chipping in $5 or whatever you can today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250518-1?refcode=em-20250518-1&refcode2=64_1086043_QgBcKq&akid=64%2E1086043%2EQgBcKq)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250518-1?refcode=em-20250518-1&refcode2=64_1086043_QgBcKq&akid=64%2E1086043%2EQgBcKq)**
Thank you for being part of this team.
Elevate,
Wes
[]()

body:

|
---
Peter,

I have an important announcement, and you're the first person I'm reaching out to with it.

**I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota again to take down the Radical Left! [**Can you chip in to give me the head start I need?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f97c1d4920b74833a4b8babbeab72188&_e=wdYiarkfEtaBkt3dWRUoEz5-J3U5tiKYj_rB9FffpB6CXCOC45Rn9crkv9wUaYO_4j6_65eDnTF0RWzpbdy71scuUk1tajz86efVUt1F0dK7u7o8FSPv0_Qgg8Zgzb8ajLv5uDCJHf2C8OhvHYbQfVW7exr_qQC_u4UNRgvwjn3kz-xg1GAHskZ-zyo6AkEthT0TOZiPDKjxmUj3O1RAJA37vHVWfsKj0ICR0llvaKRE6BqrxrGymTkMCzcFSGyG1HbVIb0SqFg-XeNDNd0zrZdAmoCt6Q3oYlBdKssUSlSCME68stWILOJefOTWDvSxi1qw8pmYM1X6sWXvkK7JhQ%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f97c1d4920b74833a4b8babbeab72188&_e=wdYiarkfEtaBkt3dWRUoEz5-J3U5tiKYj_rB9FffpB6CXCOC45Rn9crkv9wUaYO_4j6_65eDnTF0RWzpbdy71scuUk1tajz86efVUt1F0dK7u7o8FSPv0_Qgg8Zgzb8ajLv5uDCJHf2C8OhvHYbQfVW7exr_qQC_u4UNRgvwjn3kz-xg1GAHskZ-zyo6AkEtLW3wUX4Y0fX3R8ZvSu3zUtE0VIFqCLncFSZN672O4zxXnSg5AMRvQQVyThETS3T8nH2Y3Nxk2_Nj7UzZIoyEzFQigJJSpANAcgfiMlBJKP4zFJ-jY_BYFx6hBaEMfOMlT7N9AGtFcK5X4ma0Hgxzyw%3D%3D)
Now that I have two political campaigns under my belt, I understand what it takes to win. It's not easy for a Free-Thinking Black Republican to win in Minnesota. The Democrats control the media, schools, election integrity, and the areas with the most voter turnout.

_They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles._

For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters.

**This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat the crooked Left and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans.**

__The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose.

__[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f97c1d4920b74833a4b8babbeab72188&_e=wdYiarkfEtaBkt3dWRUoEz5-J3U5tiKYj_rB9FffpB6CXCOC45Rn9crkv9wUaYO_4j6_65eDnTF0RWzpbdy71scuUk1tajz86efVUt1F0dK7u7o8FSPv0_Qgg8Zgzb8ajLv5uDCJHf2C8OhvHYbQfVW7exr_qQC_u4UNRgvwjn3kz-xg1GAHskZ-zyo6AkEtM6JQCwX_D8cFxHa_axP54WAkzgbbhLImqD0IFB03NMWU1ymGSHFTjC40n1chz7AVGZR7UL1NtKuZ1U6z1Nq7LqFyOkvZkVSN1STEtoJdeCNL2EGaFkubeQcOI4P5_VVXsk0z0R4XYbw_WKecDpyRuQ%3D%3D)_
But I 'm warmed up now, and I'm ready to DUNK on the Radical Left once and for all._

**In the 2024 election, we gained 8 points of the 24 that we needed. No one outside of our movement expected my campaign to be competitive, yet I got 1.3 MILLION VOTES with ZERO HELP!**

[**THIS IS WHY I NEED TO START NOW! I 'M RELYING ON YOU TO CHIP IN AND GIVE ME THE HEAD START THAT I NEED TO WIN!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f97c1d4920b74833a4b8babbeab72188&_e=wdYiarkfEtaBkt3dWRUoEz5-J3U5tiKYj_rB9FffpB6CXCOC45Rn9crkv9wUaYO_4j6_65eDnTF0RWzpbdy71scuUk1tajz86efVUt1F0dK7u7o8FSPv0_Qgg8Zgzb8ajLv5uDCJHf2C8OhvHYbQfVW7exr_qQC_u4UNRgvwjn3kz-xg1GAHskZ-zyo6AkEtaYqNz7pPhiuIENXHnzrSh6gQdIpK5IPdxkx_8XXz93afTc9rGQCZkoZzaBucCEuSqJKVm8Xanmz8r-e6M5_5SulY7aE6iLnzpzUAG1hoFDj66OER2HXK0SD3x_5-cySlusG4ZZZGsvNys5Zemnzt_w%3D%3D)

I need your help by midnight to start amassing the resources to win.

[**Peter, I 'm humbly asking you to donate just $10 before midnight to defeat a Radical Leftist who's been anti-Trump since the beginning.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f97c1d4920b74833a4b8babbeab72188&_e=wdYiarkfEtaBkt3dWRUoEz5-J3U5tiKYj_rB9FffpB6CXCOC45Rn9crkv9wUaYO_4j6_65eDnTF0RWzpbdy71scuUk1tajz86efVUt1F0dK7u7o8FSPv0_Qgg8Zgzb8ajLv5uDCJHf2C8OhvHYbQfVW7exr_qQC_u4UNRgvwjn3kz-xg1GAHskZ-zyo6AkEtolfmzoLHCa2qWq_-70rbLTh9RHoXpDA8iLYqkrPmqmJs7z6LuDmy6GYqI6YBpYeUiZN8dPvw5DekzA_zMEGP_ilUopI43LwF0ld-6MBhk0T0FhZKa19t52-QjWRMEaVPJHJ7D-nIoNGStVaj22yn0A%3D%3D)

Here's to our Head Start,
Royce White for Senate

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f97c1d4920b74833a4b8babbeab72188&_e=wdYiarkfEtaBkt3dWRUoEz5-J3U5tiKYj_rB9FffpB6CXCOC45Rn9crkv9wUaYO_4j6_65eDnTF0RWzpbdy71scuUk1tajz86efVUt1F0dK7u7o8FSPv0_Qgg8Zgzb8ajLv5uDCJHf2C8OhvHYbQfVW7exr_qQC_u4UNRgvwjn3kz-xg1GAHskZ-zyo6AkEta-LhxgtMcgfCCYVyotJA2iYyxKnnS4N1B9cW5LN4PsKp13l3Bk6C4RMngTJ-a24hxYZA2Kfo-1N-O5dTzDO4eLBkKLsHAaqRPDSKCK8pqTNhhN9zBZD_QiMa-aN-0rYdNaIlRnI6Dk7_VQHRd954uQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is working tirelessly to FLIP Minnesota Red and give President Trump the MAGA reinforcements he needs. Can you help him by clicking the button below?

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f97c1d4920b74833a4b8babbeab72188&_e=wdYiarkfEtaBkt3dWRUoEz5-J3U5tiKYj_rB9FffpB6CXCOC45Rn9crkv9wUaYO_4j6_65eDnTF0RWzpbdy71scuUk1tajz86efVUt1F0dK7u7o8FSPv0_Qgg8Zgzb8ajLv5uDCJHf2C8OhvHYbQfVW7exr_qQC_u4UNRgvwjn3kz-xg1GAHskZ-zyo6AkEtSqt1TAyX83Fp53JeF3LcpSz4oY65xSKYOkRX91HBeGK2XxT75Rz-mTa3Q8AbdVv41l4rvRXAQMPUCuEvKqVqmfOiMf2xEK31zzPVzW4-G0-CKznQtcsrSe7MFEUTWxxG21CzkOWT1ThgLd_2gDDJxQ%3D%3D)

My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
| | [ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96537f88d7d1453683c4ce5bffe0f9b2&_e=LhR1cc4QMWA-XFuc9OMS0Te_IpBhJwgDPHk8ZmKqICy-wtcuRDvJVEObjQBoMxCt711SNgG2BPW-GJwvI6jYWn8khEVnNg1kDV1t5PWdp9P1M_TVnAeSj4MDDCHYY49wQc1LRbjcTIIQntKcvT1ZmxEubji3HekK5EMSsRD57hLMdbhqf-sDkqSYt921Xkn-WCNk1jUUz3QkwirfXXIX7A_fK06hifFVpWfqxZ3Z_fARBhZDx1Z5Cvgggh1s9bu_vaLFgyQGUErXCoAe-DvDBZCegEZ9NHu-5KjRJuGClmPmyAZtzvyL14SoFqPCj0DaCl5p1TItE4iOO4HecoCCfTphBXB-vBcCn4HS7kcnyJ7CRhFrZIpROhJDULM6F87GXdb1LB_ol2VPT7ZnicSmmIGu0Nl24Y3xf-1D2LnwH-A1wvd2-3cXp0y7Qv603FLL)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. **[I'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96537f88d7d1453683c4ce5bffe0f9b2&_e=LhR1cc4QMWA-XFuc9OMS0Te_IpBhJwgDPHk8ZmKqICy-wtcuRDvJVEObjQBoMxCt711SNgG2BPW-GJwvI6jYWn8khEVnNg1kDV1t5PWdp9P1M_TVnAeSj4MDDCHYY49wQc1LRbjcTIIQntKcvT1ZmxEubji3HekK5EMSsRD57hLMdbhqf-sDkqSYt921Xkn-WCNk1jUUz3QkwirfXXIX7A_fK06hifFVpWfqxZ3Z_fARBhZDx1Z5Cvgggh1s9bu_vaLFgyQGUErXCoAe-DvDBZCegEZ9NHu-5KjRJuGClmPZQiEJXFtBT7B3uVB-k74NG4_mPP-nFbB0J23n25kubKaWKYbLHxa6yW_12H9VU0D36U2nJaidz-AdZ-xMhsW4HZm9nCJbcqZrUi2tp1zbm7IPu9LSF9_ZNWX-BrfG8k3kcmfUlkTAcAIwWIk9yH3V)**

clean_body: Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don’t make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. | | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. subject: Take the House GOP’s Official D.O.G.E. Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
DOGE IS DELIVERING – Will you?
This will only take 2 minutes of your time.

|
---
| | | Friend,

I'm still fuming about the billions of dollars in wasteful spending that DOGE has exposed. It's a slap in the face to every hardworking American who's ever paid their taxes on time.

**As a mom, a small business owner, and a patriot, it's personal to me.** I know what it's like to balance a budget and make tough choices. But the swamp in Washington doesn't care about being responsible with our money - they just want to line their own pockets and push their radical agendas.

_**That's why I'm so grateful for DOGE's tireless work to root out corruption and make our government accountable to the people again. And I know you are too, Friend.**_

_**[But I still need to hear from you. Will you take a minute to complete our DOGE Survey and make your voice heard?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f11ecb6a72764acc9ca4c8839cf44ba3&_e=09rofbVGEkKSDivispZXwnxg3dj6nndw8xM8fPw_3gLlKRjG94ETHJuVMK48UIiGHYJ526Og6EcnOtAR9p3E-UaMKWlz0TK_ZPrDBK43wXz2Kkjv_nUlo_CkHAIYoJUT1eH218jNL_1FKfVAOHOwst5aH5L_zxGwR-yAXvLmoPQ-t7Lj4ujXM09W_0Q9IMnw5wxXDkhTtjP6r2LPS6FrWUL0QY-oMfEHWmjfETbq_ImeMrQdbFIaDroRAzHRadiC1TutZIpT1TOOaZoDQcmvuc0cuRPQHFz5WKph1OtjAlQAqPJ2QyuNHIWTT2vBMBps-w4rHiIqOYbqUx-KC4NgDiW5f_13KFKhoz18ew1jhIe95aEjIabR_LNJmnDQttxnUN26g420o2j4z5O9gdH1tsQ6aAH-3HFATc2Z0rMNZQ4%3D "But I still need to hear from you. clean_body: DOGE IS DELIVERING – Will you? This will only take 2 minutes of your time. | | | | Friend, I'm still fuming about the billions of dollars in wasteful spending that DOGE has exposed. It's a slap in the face to every hardworking American who's ever paid their taxes on time. As a mom, a small business owner, and a patriot, it's personal to me. I know what it's like to balance a budget and make tough choices. But the swamp in Washington doesn't care about being responsible with our money - they just want to line their own pockets and push their radical agendas. That's why I'm so grateful for DOGE's tireless work to root out corruption and make our government accountable to the people again. And I know you are too, Friend. "But I still need to hear from you. Will you take a minute to complete our DOGE Survey and make your voice heard?" | | | "SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS ON DOGE NOW" The left is going ballistic over DOGE's success, and we can't let them silence us. This is our chance to take a sledgehammer to the bloated, woke, and wasteful policies that are holding our country back. Will you stand with me and DOGE to fight for transparency, accountability, and a government that truly serves the people? | | | "COMPLETE YOUR DOGE SURVEY NOW" Thank you for being a part of this fight, Friend. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This is my story.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d686cc5ef91445f4a7e29a79157153bd&_e=IKox4v6yavdPBSr8aOr4M7kflyZ9KZOpHEqXaVRaycRe9nbIEBNbrV-_8W-nNj5YMW-SBY6Lb2ZvZnjMSJ5KypgeDEY_o4xLr1fiYLx7oZElpSQzfK74FTvvSL8jKwrXiebLrEzdvPiec9kZXfLrTsG534yKX2-5STsoRN64eu9dtPLUf6XoptJN8qjZtHtigTCnkNHHT3gbz-kTkSIDmotCG80WNn_oXRIn-XXfR2LwGbd56KKsvwSm6CgZpBWixSXC8SiGe1qbkAA5Z-dvXorMvYq0JwCLpO8sLLzUT-G2BA4g6gQJRbZfcXybRrMoic7ia3vVIHtpVqs1fZLzIE-ypYAU_oXjtvF5skLY0XzPsHPPsK2orr1HTq7C8ePl)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d686cc5ef91445f4a7e29a79157153bd&_e=IKox4v6yavdPBSr8aOr4M7kflyZ9KZOpHEqXaVRaycRe9nbIEBNbrV-_8W-nNj5YMW-SBY6Lb2ZvZnjMSJ5KypgeDEY_o4xLr1fiYLx7oZElpSQzfK74FTvvSL8jKwrXiebLrEzdvPiec9kZXfLrTsG534yKX2-5STsoRN64eu9dtPLUf6XoptJN8qjZtHtigTCnkNHHT3gbz-kTkSIDmotCG80WNn_oXRIn-XXfR2JBEgsw9Lqn1xjZUnZujGr1lzXI_mazUDzQ9waU-AT20xBzwhfEr7ffa4W52lL_mnOmT-ZBTH3c4DzKUzeev8l24nSaRKDZzQjq7Gk-rNTjkKgPF41SUsYyyaiZb8gY9H1LzmyYnRo5M82tSZUZyki-)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d686cc5ef91445f4a7e29a79157153bd&_e=IKox4v6yavdPBSr8aOr4M7kflyZ9KZOpHEqXaVRaycRe9nbIEBNbrV-_8W-nNj5YMW-SBY6Lb2ZvZnjMSJ5KypgeDEY_o4xLr1fiYLx7oZElpSQzfK74FTvvSL8jKwrXiebLrEzdvPiec9kZXfLrTsG534yKX2-5STsoRN64eu9dtPLUf6XoptJN8qjZtHtigTCnkNHHT3gbz-kTkSIDmotCG80WNn_oXRIn-XXfR2IaroBLV-8tMXa8lrcQ3UxabDebWucA7MVxnJjhYTdTKU0MV-81ZGVCHO5yrSfgiBdpCW9PUT1ctSHec08knWPBK5tCP9KiVTMnNl5FK532Dt0Fp-9VTpindW7rRu_DFZr5NcYT-HDBmvyQ1mNeperG)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d686cc5ef91445f4a7e29a79157153bd&_e=IKox4v6yavdPBSr8aOr4M7kflyZ9KZOpHEqXaVRaycRe9nbIEBNbrV-_8W-nNj5YMW-SBY6Lb2ZvZnjMSJ5KypgeDEY_o4xLr1fiYLx7oZElpSQzfK74FTvvSL8jKwrXiebLrEzdvPiec9kZXfLrTsG534yKX2-5STsoRN64eu9dtPLUf6XoptJN8qjZtHtigTCnkNHHT3gbz-kTkSIDmotCG80WNn_oXRIn-XXfR2L6dlDTsXelxS71dnTjocKQHXEiegsQaYurwaAUDb9ntufOeh3sBK3hADF7WmG_Td_s21v51TRKpsSJj5hEqj4sDlIWkdk8nScJaIRXbvJcuapbnZxAQpKVBnEAM4ARbVhPGcYk_0Rx2PeDoH7LeTmx)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d686cc5ef91445f4a7e29a79157153bd&_e=IKox4v6yavdPBSr8aOr4MxR4ZoPCH5j3US3YdHFO2DAk24OwF4Dw2hcDV7jtJ3ISNH7wnn0XBl7BHka0l0Wd6X23g6x7cqg1mr_rpAioMto5u0VWLMCbqWezpuYPVia58eJZ0LGU3XIk7CtbotNLoJYGBa5-HMtZ4uVAzTSIFFJbnzQyzscje--OkaoJk13KG8hadZPKxGGia-qzEKFde2-0954Zywcl54wzYQU1ZAo%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d686cc5ef91445f4a7e29a79157153bd&_e=IKox4v6yavdPBSr8aOr4M7kflyZ9KZOpHEqXaVRaycRe9nbIEBNbrV-_8W-nNj5YMW-SBY6Lb2ZvZnjMSJ5KypgeDEY_o4xLr1fiYLx7oZElpSQzfK74FTvvSL8jKwrXiebLrEzdvPiec9kZXfLrTsG534yKX2-5STsoRN64eu9dtPLUf6XoptJN8qjZtHtigTCnkNHHT3gbz-kTkSIDmotCG80WNn_oXRIn-XXfR2J3c1L2trf49SrOzEDSmuxIp38Y84-_qi8Skv_yHxnGmKsEiSd7lcqdclB6rja9Ie515sjdS--gRrTklyoCTXWkQUeZbYn4t6GUCQPmp-kn3X-SKuD1sV2QrmjrWosR_4BIqV-_QokDvxVviy8EDQih)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** SUPPORT SENATOR GRAHAM **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d686cc5ef91445f4a7e29a79157153bd&_e=IKox4v6yavdPBSr8aOr4M7kflyZ9KZOpHEqXaVRaycRe9nbIEBNbrV-_8W-nNj5YMW-SBY6Lb2ZvZnjMSJ5KypgeDEY_o4xLr1fiYLx7oZElpSQzfK74FTvvSL8jKwrXiebLrEzdvPiec9kZXfLrTsG534yKX2-5STsoRN64eu9dtPLUf6XoptJN8qjZtHtigTCnkNHHT3gbz-kTkSIDmotCG80WNn_oXRIn-XXfR2LdzZMEjTO-jhBXtj_TI_i3VWSUWcRUl-YOLDyhZKqw3QwDF3bK0uCDzYrBJT_yl_rkaKsAqxg78r2iuTTVPtq66WHBD3mPDO83LMtxvcShw_2BDcoqgK-AuBICB5zzvDIpTaiW2RK8t2rnHIa_3KVq)
---

[** BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d686cc5ef91445f4a7e29a79157153bd&_e=IKox4v6yavdPBSr8aOr4M7kflyZ9KZOpHEqXaVRaycRe9nbIEBNbrV-_8W-nNj5YMW-SBY6Lb2ZvZnjMSJ5KypgeDEY_o4xLr1fiYLx7oZElpSQzfK74FTvvSL8jKwrXiebLrEzdvPiec9kZXfLrTsG534yKX2-5STsoRN64eu9dtPLUf6XoptJN8qjZtHtigTCnkNHHT3gbz-kTkSIDms0nKLQvgW8jOz6DifQk7uOiYoKYoAsRxo0p50BwqHfWEC80MIVNO5aivQKsGIPHcpY72GK-2us5bgcRJaRAYu_vnTRzRIgy-r8c-gqjQGRqFrBBxQp8kZSbLiD9Rdx0AJBIX33y1S70j1rohuohFLoqQ1rFIXHwoHebaGKd85zRzPviXFqv0oiIy5R8I1eOpQ%3D%3D)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

name: George Whitesides
subject: Walmart
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107930933/546296319/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTJlYzMwZi0wZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsGeyjz67l1oeYVD6qMaBgXKoRIHEXugQ2dFU-9_7N8=)
Peter, I’m deeply concerned with the fallout from this administration’s rash decisions – particularly with the needless tariffs and trade wars.

**Large corporations, including Walmart, are now warning that price hikes are coming due to Trump’s tariffs.**

It's no secret that mega-corporations like Walmart have their own host of problems. But the reality is if Walmart's prices go up, the small businesses driving our economy will also take a massive hit with these tariffs, too.

**Under Trump, the middle class stands to lose while billionaires and special interests are poised to benefit.**

What we should be focusing on is lowering costs and making life easier for Americans across the country. Thousands in my district and beyond are facing an upended and unreliable economy – directly impacting their ability to get by.

To better equip myself in Congress, I want to hear from you:

**[How have you been personally impacted by Trump’s tariff policies? Please take a moment to fill out our survey on the impact of the Trump tariffs here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107930934/546296320/-538190618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTJlYzMwZi0wZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsGeyjz67l1oeYVD6qMaBgXKoRIHEXugQ2dFU-9_7N8=&emci=cc2ec30f-0e34-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ce2ec30f-0e34-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=36198509)**

clean_body: | = Peter, I’m deeply concerned with the fallout from this administration’s rash decisions – particularly with the needless tariffs and trade wars. Large corporations, including Walmart, are now warning that price hikes are coming due to Trump’s tariffs. It's no secret that mega-corporations like Walmart have their own host of problems. But the reality is if Walmart's prices go up, the small businesses driving our economy will also take a massive hit with these tariffs, too. Under Trump, the middle class stands to lose while billionaires and special interests are poised to benefit. What we should be focusing on is lowering costs and making life easier for Americans across the country. Thousands in my district and beyond are facing an upended and unreliable economy – directly impacting their ability to get by. To better equip myself in Congress, I want to hear from you: | ** Thanks, George =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: On my 18th birthday, I joined the Marines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7FmiOUwY_B-d8v3YiTmOQPte-ySIcHEvWkQmoeuPre6cuHQzAy6B4rbcNUvqXZnfoDJAVbGd1cv4FucBTLG2GSlyQgU6Zz63gcVE8ObGb5M1uG517b9pRGuTpTk3cTHDovaXUPcXKZSlPGyrZg3y_l7iY%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7FmqMe6NSCo2dpyKdHpeeFJ8okAY7_XHVPsIceFymiU9_AFBJrWT8sq9YMlQdcvptoRoHNo0Gr4hJ5vCTMtHS1udHNJ4qeLkVFhwIc17kPPysX1vQidUpwZbVd8PjLO1zVoVhSV7bnqiLq8ObvfDn5uRs%3D)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7FmqpcSdBScJ6zJUrqBX_DApwCbTckVLKJgcP6U0Q314ngHrtGgJLYZnzNwPMcA1kPEdZKrhUsOQcwt6i4Rdi-5m4x0CNoh7L-OJuwdQLtG_4dg5D4ZYUhs_CqJOTw5GXRJIlsu2PWLc-sGkwvess91jc%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7FmpgK-ltybexFzWN4hbbenfh8KV27Mr1824qPhbitm7PU3KF0oUhhzeIwg9s_0ldONG2SJQrljJa5hfK7SrOUwgEkYPsWeL7KUQ8QN589YOtEr7Ct1os00HkTE455iNrI5xn_KAwZDgnElzG0rR7RWXw%3D)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7Fmud6lssvHOMuhMobSB4qB9yNd9xCRZVUjhU9uFRYhXLRENBk8yRMsUBoS_JpTJH3evFGTARCl5i9zpYa6HBBYXdZh-kHB3l6dq4msXRMRBBMPaQr1CRcppcIDCXupcoTT-aATrPZij_zylWrO5JSsAg%3D)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7FmqBWDBfq4rqjSedDpnu23kf87Zlt68xHQd_zoEu8Pm2QrcMeLE9Ny6YZ65TWolf3aZJAzZFfjav1EaixQ8Ik8BhfwQvNIi4Fj5-fsfBN2Sm7OhFX3h3fMNu5D7i_iQ5yQPJN2XiSt2Ukjmfs-0ucXRM%3D)
So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod.

The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and _**[I’m hopeful that if you don’t donate today, you’ll allow me to earn your support in the coming months.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7Fmj2d1flnHCi0ERgnqIo0WI5H5kEE89YdAqTdWTTd9EEssEsKlwSv_L8wYbQQp77xPKYfSSTkzYMdnIOKNic5FeSQzAGjarX_MyvPD3Pevmk8y6qjrQyW_95ZuUSvAiqjeReKN3gDsopGDfLItvRl8n0%3D) **_

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7Fmh9GxGU4SDh6oITkzBpA8eaLBAY1Vj8VFhfB0rDN-ruIPUgo-eoMjxFQMIVWJIk0HHFzi0maC6isH-ogduArCGViLo397XWHoLHydxwJB8vH8OuDvu_LmYJaM77zAT5WsCWxgEzMWf5Hz0OgFt42On8%3D)

I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet.

_**[I'd be so grateful if you could chip in $5, $10, or even $50 right now.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=56e090f87fef4fc198bb736ba2361672&_e=fegPZvnC4LRzAIz_peBEhMrkxXDCRskSJuNsz7P0Txg7V1Au4ZE7TZsr_qZec6WjYAgCOklWNByaFust4dKInaekLGcYCAuOR2skVj5dH995iXDm7H8CAHIAAxaf_0VNdz0YJodAL6laUeqnoC4Q7uq4DMMVcP6TPDfgqaamMrypfGsDpDiauJSsLIOeLpu58mr5draL7lDSC9AIurtnNfo79oCyFil9TgA-a0Zfr426sp9ZpKQQhAZ2ZvMRZ75lloZCmBbSuHbx4bmQcr7FmgjpaJIoC0E9Zhr6vGBcYOQZ8p8rkh6J8wLqcHNZ4kfeTkt4VdryodxaHEtSLVIVR5nLZk_FTzuqzjSV3MlUxynoqkFOWjcqVs-baEnGOFgCuVCaTKHnysJMdHLcNNDsqvsjkzZ0EoHVGxiyf5neiUQ%3D)**_

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

clean_body: I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan. I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, is politically more radical than the former VP nominee. People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020.While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination. The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home. As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life. I never imagined that I would run for high office, but everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies. I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate. Something had to be done. With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state. This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

subject: When We Fight, We Win
body:

# **When We Fight, We Win**
_Senator Hughes brought together lawmakers and leaders at Enon Tabernacle Baptist Church to discuss how Republican health insurance cuts could impact Black Pennsylvanians_ __ This week, Senator Vincent Hughes held a roundtable at Enon Tabernacle Baptist Church with lawmakers and healthcare leaders to discuss how Black Pennsylvanians could be impacted by proposed health insurance cuts to Medicaid, CHIP, and the Affordable Care Act that were [proposed by Congressional Republicans earlier this week](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170018.172679.497&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14420). **" We need to be informed, we need to be educated, and we need to be brutally honest about what these federal cuts could mean for the Black community."** **Senator Vincent Hughes** The group of roundtable participants represented the health insurance sector, hospital systems, mental health services, the clergy, doctors, and unions. [This was the second roundtable Senator Hughes has hosted in the past month](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170018.172679.497&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14421), to bring decision makers and stakeholders together to determine how federal health insurance cuts could impact Pennsylvania's health ecosystem and residents. In Pennsylvania, about 3 million people- almost 1 in 4 Pennsylvanians- are covered by Medicaid and CHIP. Almost 20% of those Pennsylvanians on Medicaid are Black. And all Americans have benefited from provisions in the Affordable Care Act that make health insurance accessible and less expensive. News broke this week that Republicans were moving forward with their plan to cut Medicaid by implementing work requirements and a more complicated process for recipients to verify their eligibility. The [nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office estimates](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170018.172679.497&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14422) the Republican Medicaid cuts would lead to 10.3 million people losing coverage under Medicaid and 7.6 million people going uninsured. [As of Friday, House Republicans failed to push their big package of tax breaks and spending cuts through the Budget Committee](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170018.172679.497&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14423). We need to keep raising our voices. **" We must have a voice in this conversation. We are the principals and founders of the expansion in health insurance- it was President Obama who made the Affordable Care Act happened. And I, along with Senators Haywood and Street and our Democratic colleagues, led the effort in Harrisburg to fully expand Medicaid in Pennsylvania. Millions of people across the country and in Pennsylvania have benefited from having health insurance that is affordable, accessible, and high quality because of our work."** **\- enator Vincent Hughes** [A full video of the roundtable is available online.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170018.172679.497&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14424) Now more than ever, it's important to call your US Senators and Representative and tell them- Fight for our healthcare, Fight for our communities! **Senator Fetterman: 215-241-1090** **Senator McCormick: 215-405-9660** **US House of Representatives: 202-225-3121**
* * *

| | Team, On Election Day this November 2025, I don’t just want to win — **_I want to win big._** Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we’ll send about the 2026 midterms. People in Virginia and across the country are looking at our race as a bellwether for Democrats. In every zip code and every community, Democrats are understandably frightened and angry about the chaos coming out of Washington. And to them, our race is a beacon of hope. It’s an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation’s history. And can I be honest for a minute? That’s a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I’m ready to seize the moment and win big. I feel honored that people have put so much hope into our campaign, and it’s a big reason why I’ve worked to stay above the fray and focus on what matters: **winning big and delivering real, meaningful change when we do.** And I hope that as you read this email, you’ll buy into that vision too. Because there is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going. So let’s win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond. [**_But we can’t do it without you! name: Byron Donalds
subject: Democrats defend the indefensible
body:
I just went on Primetime to expose the TRUTH.
| | | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4d9222bb416452ba1943394fe0a934b&_e=R8PG1Yv2xHLA3F2GdczCgGdBOo79AbOeqW2mNT2HcjeWWgx8gjYip8O6FpypahbkCHzP6boq08pG1ql0K14qK7BSQxVKM6j_IVhLWtJmxwEq2XiRatWga6BXWgTnP9Bg55cZUSWXdiSK3U0JV6eVT36l2Z8F9xdPhI8FDFfNr3_TaDcMEVKoTX6PLOFkLv3Q02YLIK6Ypo9xZ1Wj2NBUFOIRgqHj_rToGXQZiLBpHkg0Oqrvp-GyWfJt_GyzyFjO2fvxRSVdewx7POpKHQuyFBMmSr-2gQEBI1WxU3PRoGXYUCSkaYCnIgnf-kdMg-ClUfMn_CH8BOkbLYg0HqnlfvfS2-AWQnXsCX9h1ZNq6vt70NdgmLIc6aFF-GkIy2wutrkP5jIkQY08H-GwX_6a_g%3D%3D)
---
|
---
_**Democrats defend the indefensible.**_
Whether they are imposing men in women’s bathrooms, raising taxes on working families, or defending criminal illegals over American citizens, the Democrats have lost their minds.
That’s why I went on Primetime TV to expose their _RADICAL_ and _DESPERATE_ agenda.
Fellow American, this is MAGA Patriot _Byron Donalds_.
I fight for President Trump’s agenda every day on the House floor, and today I’m fighting to be the Governor of Florida, where I’ll be _**[President Trump’s strongest ally](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4d9222bb416452ba1943394fe0a934b&_e=R8PG1Yv2xHLA3F2GdczCgGdBOo79AbOeqW2mNT2HcjeWWgx8gjYip8O6FpypahbkCHzP6boq08pG1ql0K14qK7BSQxVKM6j_IVhLWtJmxwEq2XiRatWga6BXWgTnP9Bg55cZUSWXdiSK3U0JV6eVT36l2Z8F9xdPhI8FDFfNr3_TaDcMEVKoTX6PLOFkLv3Q02YLIK6Ypo9xZ1Wj2NBUFOIRgqHj_rToGXQZiLBpHkg0Oqrvp-GyWfJt_GyzyFjOsRIs-mawIMiR2EzAGd3CGYAGcrovkiALon9hmuBRFaLgSGfOrowvkZ1bqxQ75pfwE6gF0D0gggtcdbQ-rE0G-hx2bNQmijgL3nyMh6PdZm8CCaqIWO5qFyycHZ6uQKtYov_fgsIDubieUIft78VP9Q%3D%3D)**_ in the country.
The Radical Left doesn’t want that to happen. So they're raising **millions** to bring their agenda to Florida.
But with MAGA Patriots like you on my side, the Democrats will never win.
I’ve _**[NEVER backed down](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4d9222bb416452ba1943394fe0a934b&_e=R8PG1Yv2xHLA3F2GdczCgGdBOo79AbOeqW2mNT2HcjeWWgx8gjYip8O6FpypahbkCHzP6boq08pG1ql0K14qK7BSQxVKM6j_IVhLWtJmxwEq2XiRatWga6BXWgTnP9Bg55cZUSWXdiSK3U0JV6eVT36l2Z8F9xdPhI8FDFfNr3_TaDcMEVKoTX6PLOFkLv3Q02YLIK6Ypo9xZ1Wj2NBUFOIRgqHj_rToGXQZiLBpHkg0Oqrvp-GyWfJt_GyzyFjOsdk7YaZgbkbkYUiuYUGt71BdQb5OIVee8K5QpWGx1tN0UAxx5GfpCauzxhDiD3Zx878B4bfdYtVJ1uc_WyA3dYd4d2gsViqYx8L54TZieQl58C628yBK5AzKmRBVn0HtfvAxsHPtMtQCWYK0Ai932w%3D%3D)**_ from a fight, and I won’t start now. The future of our state and our country is ON THE LINE.

|
---
[SUPPORT MY RACE](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4d9222bb416452ba1943394fe0a934b&_e=R8PG1Yv2xHLA3F2GdczCgGdBOo79AbOeqW2mNT2HcjeWWgx8gjYip8O6FpypahbkCHzP6boq08pG1ql0K14qK7BSQxVKM6j_IVhLWtJmxwEq2XiRatWga6BXWgTnP9Bg55cZUSWXdiSK3U0JV6eVT36l2Z8F9xdPhI8FDFfNr3_TaDcMEVKoTX6PLOFkLv3Q02YLIK6Ypo9xZ1Wj2NBUFOIRgqHj_rToGXQZiLBpHkg0Oqrvp-GyWfJt_GyzyFjOTDKlC9jvMAOhhVrlhvXXPgGdoqdLMMkg880ssIBL4bbiQ55GEfgiuh5y0NKLKpBytK9syRztdqs2S5hOoXTixGb3T05AgkLbgzga9QaLvs82w1yG-cnyzRFJooghr0UcLgWjyiQ289KaV2x31UHh9A%3D%3D)

_I love each and every one of you for supporting the MAGA Movement._
You’re the reason I **wake up** each and every morning.
We can’t let the Democrats outraise us. We must act now to fight back.
So, will you step up now and support my race and keep the Dems’ radical agenda _**[OUT of Florida?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4d9222bb416452ba1943394fe0a934b&_e=R8PG1Yv2xHLA3F2GdczCgGdBOo79AbOeqW2mNT2HcjeWWgx8gjYip8O6FpypahbkCHzP6boq08pG1ql0K14qK7BSQxVKM6j_IVhLWtJmxwEq2XiRatWga6BXWgTnP9Bg55cZUSWXdiSK3U0JV6eVT36l2Z8F9xdPhI8FDFfNr3_TaDcMEVKoTX6PLOFkLv3Q02YLIK6Ypo9xZ1Wj2NBUFOIRgqHj_rToGXQZiLBpHkg0Oqrvp-GyWfJt_GyzyFjOJudXuWdP1mQ930jOCLyFwenoLJTOAuNRkZLcyVjVJZP-9_vqazpMMZeGWwTdm5ZuiYyAyiHPZU0gBLr5QNYmXMbxnGtpq5sbewBlE44aQKpeK1B-Mi4KPMair-ahJ8cDAsvUtyqW5QPhPEh33OdqFw%3D%3D)**_

name: Nellie Pou
subject: A favor to ask you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress
body:
We're behind for May
Friend, I just got off the phone with my campaign team, and they told me that we're behind our May goal by about 40%. So I wanted to reach out to our supporters to see if there's anything you can do to help close this gap and get us caught up.
Because the NRCC has a target on this district, we have to start building out our campaign infrastructure early to mount a good defense for all the attacks we have incoming.
They have mega donors. We have everyday folks who make up our beautiful, vibrant community, and can chip in what they can.
If you're in a position to give, here's a link: **[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107931426/546297759/-200729754?amp;refcode=250518_np_mm2_l1&ms=250518_np_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDI1MWNhNjMtMTAzNC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G-Inm3skNA-dYQCoz0sN9JJ4vK3jeFToYBzSaQGT18k=)**

name: Letitia James
subject: I want to make one thing clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026

We will not give up.

Peter, I want to make one thing clear: This is not the time to give in to fear.

This is the time to stand up, fight back, and resist any temptation for the Trump administration to divide us and destroy our Constitution.
Because the rule of law is on our side. The one institution that has stood by us is the courts. And we will not give in.

_We will not give up.

We will not capitulate.

We will not bow.

We will not bend.

We will survive._
No matter how hard Trump and his allies come for us and our rights, I will always stand up and fight for what's right. **But I can’t do this alone.[Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more toward my campaign today so that I can keep holding Trump accountable and stop his chaos MAGA agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107931453/546297817/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1873-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2I0OWE4My0xMDM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc-6PhGAwImMiC7lfp6LVWcon47E4QsfbbUSAXVsEBE=)**
