name: David Hogg
subject: I don't take the criticism personally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This isn’t personal – it’s a strategic disagreement.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250518-1&t=1&akid=2141%2E587540%2EfaC3n3)
Peter, I went on CBS News to discuss our huge new effort to replace ineffective, out-of-touch Democrats with young progressive champions in the 2026 primaries.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250518_1_disagreement?refcode=em20250518-2141&amount=5&refcode2=2141_587540_faC3n3&akid=2141%2E587540%2EfaC3n3)
I responded directly to some of the criticism we’ve been hearing about our plans.
Old guard Democrats have been speaking out, saying that we’re wasting our time challenging Democrats and that we should only focus on unseating Republicans.
First of all, just take a look at the results of the last election. Many of these same establishment figures are the same ones who brought us to where we are today.
This isn’t personal – it’s a strategic disagreement. We believe that every Democrat should be standing up and fighting Trump and the MAGA agenda with everything they’ve got, but too many of them are simply failing to meet the moment right now.
This isn’t “out with the old and in with the new.” It’s about replacing the ineffective politicians with leaders who will fight like hell for our democracy against Trumpism.
I also want to be very clear about something: **Not every older politician needs to be replaced.** There are plenty of examples of leaders who have been fighting on the front lines for years, like Rep. Nancy Pelosi, who aren’t afraid to take on Trump.
But there are just as many older Democrats who are too comfortable in their safe blue seats, who aren’t standing up to fight at this pivotal moment for our country.
Right now, the Democratic Party has a _27% approval rating._ **We have to change.** And the establishment figures criticizing our plan do not have one of their own.
**[If you’re with me and you’re ready to see the next generation of progressive leaders take the reins from ineffective, out-of-touch politicians on both sides of the aisle, please make a $5 contribution now to stand with us in this fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250518_1_disagreement?refcode=em20250518-2141&amount=5&refcode2=2141_587540_faC3n3&akid=2141%2E587540%2EfaC3n3)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250518_1_disagreement?amount=5&refcode=em20250518-2141&refcode2=2141_587540_faC3n3&akid=2141%2E587540%2EfaC3n3)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250518-1&t=2&refcode2=2141_587540_faC3n3&akid=2141%2E587540%2EfaC3n3)**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Everyone should have a safe, affordable place to call home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
America has an affordable housing crisis, and if we don’t take action, it’s going to get worse.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107931627/546298473/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTVkOTE3ZS0xMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1Yu3NL8rkJP2jdBl2UJGX295aJHnpmyzxkTn0UOqPc=&emci=d5cd9269-9e32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=795d917e-1134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)
---

| | America has an affordable housing crisis, and if we don't take action, it's going to get even worse under the Trump administration. Housing prices are expected to increase by at least 4% in 2025, and Trump's reckless, on-again, off-again tariffs mean construction costs will jump. Private equity is fueling America's housing crisis. Across the country, including right here in Oregon, hedge funds are wielding their financial muscle to gobble up available housing, outbid hard-working Americans who have sacrificed to save up down payments, drive up prices and rents, and turn neighborhoods into Wall Street profit centers at the expense of folks struggling to find a place to call home. **We need to put keys into the hands of first-time homeowners, not Wall Street profiteers and corporate interests.** Here's what I'm doing to end these practices:
* I introduced the **HOPE (Humans Over Private Equity) for Homeownership Act** to kick hedge funds out of the housing market and increase access to affordable housing.
* I'll never stop pushing to find ways to build more housing across the country to ensure there's a strong supply of affordable, accessible housing for all.

Before I ever held public office, I led the Portland chapter of Habitat for Humanity, working side by side with families fighting to keep a roof over their heads. It was seeing everyday Americans struggle to find affordable housing that motivated me to run for the Oregon legislature. In my role with Habitat, I was in a meeting with a local elected official, talking about the housing problem in Portland, and I realized it was time for me to be on the other side of the table to make a difference on housing. **Now, I'm in the Senate fighting for affordable housing for all.** Everyone should have a safe, affordable place to call home, and we're working to get it done. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: America has an affordable housing crisis, and if we don’t take action, it’s going to get worse. | | | | America has an affordable housing crisis, and if we don't take action, it's going to get even worse under the Trump administration. Housing prices are expected to increase by at least 4% in 2025, and Trump's reckless, on-again, off-again tariffs mean construction costs will jump. Private equity is fueling America's housing crisis. Across the country, including right here in Oregon, hedge funds are wielding their financial muscle to gobble up available housing, outbid hard-working Americans who have sacrificed to save up down payments, drive up prices and rents, and turn neighborhoods into Wall Street profit centers at the expense of folks struggling to find a place to call home. We need to put keys into the hands of first-time homeowners, not Wall Street profiteers and corporate interests. Here's what I'm doing to end these practices: I introduced the HOPE (Humans Over Private Equity) for Homeownership Act to kick hedge funds out of the housing market and increase access to affordable housing. I'll never stop pushing to find ways to build more housing across the country to ensure there's a strong supply of affordable, accessible housing for all. Before I ever held public office, I led the Portland chapter of Habitat for Humanity, working side by side with families fighting to keep a roof over their heads. It was seeing everyday Americans struggle to find affordable housing that motivated me to run for the Oregon legislature. In my role with Habitat, I was in a meeting with a local elected official, talking about the housing problem in Portland, and I realized it was time for me to be on the other side of the table to make a difference on housing. Now, I'm in the Senate fighting for affordable housing for all. Everyone should have a safe, affordable place to call home, and we're working to get it done. Onward! | [****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
Dear Patriot,

I’m James O’Keefe, and O’Keefe Media Group (OMG) is the only news outlet fearless enough to **expose Jeffrey Epstein’s darkest secrets**.

Our latest exclusive footage takes you inside his eerie library on Little St. James Island.

[**WATCH TO SEE INSIDE THE LIBRARY AND DONATE TO HELP US KEEP GOING.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
You’ll see books like _Satanic Verses_ , statues of plague-masked figures and a semi-nude woman on a bidet, a leather-and-bone horse whip, and a chalkboard with cryptic words—“**power** ,” “**deception** ,” “**dank brain** ”—possibly penned by Epstein himself.

[**We need the public’s support to decrypt the imagery in this video and your donation to help keep us going.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Mainstream media has suppressed the Epstein story for years, and our government still hides the “Epstein List” of powerful figures who visited his island, likely tied to his blackmail scheme through depraved acts.

**OMG alone is fighting for the truth** , [**and we need your help**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.).

Our Prince Andrew exposé, praised as “fantastic work” on X, sparked a whistleblower to send us this footage, [**but decoding it requires Patriots like you who demand accountability**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.).

[**Your donation will sustain OMG’s citizen journalism, fund our investigations, and help us expose the Epstein List**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.). Unlike elite-funded media, **we rely on Americans passionate about justice.**

[**Donate today to support OMG’s mission.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[**Watch the video**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.), send clues via Signal at 914-491-9395, [**and donate now to help us unravel Epstein’s secrets.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. **The corrupt are shielding the Epstein List**. [**Donate now to support OMG and demand justice.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

I’m a mom. I’m a wife. I’m a fighter. And I want to tell you why my husband, John, is running for Congress — and why our entire family is in this fight with him, shoulder to shoulder. **[But before I do, can I ask you to make a quick donation to John’s campaign?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/IrnOnfhMXNrJbVZTtW4euzmRiuUYrjdJ0T6GYTbQIDx-Es31hIYJWFIAJoCNBR0eU4Qe4d-w7Zpd3sUCMLlX2OAeGb-OW8AhAdtz0yJ4TA9eBnuFraTjV5qN7gvOiQYTCSQZJ5sKNu0VLe00i-VuZzP_V9tuDyLTBbZWpM1ZGdlgWjs3E-6OiBhG1J5WxVMTNAh-yEX99CFqTwL134_5ktS6V3VF8ZC6lU2T-ulHj0eUs2UzAXOOD-P7ca2ug8ONI2FPS3eVqWJ8zE81eKEnb1wj3Qf3eDt9LUczMsIyK75Z3Te1XBDejhQiUociJSOTT_vhW5ZAdNUsIRofb7hq2nMPT1zoTmZQWhstLc3Nnvj76YGYq5777Aici5lVnCb7UUP0lJLrNcPJqN2hL4nyaiEVX-0ZFUZIu0SxoIwkd5zBBOtJ7OttkobSb2BTgh_MmbVyu0UsHropWx1g7eo/eeb9P9w2ELSB7yVpcVDu9kvW98EdKgfD/9)** John and I don’t come from money or connections. We’ve built everything we have with our own hands, just like millions of other working families across Colorado. And we’ve spent too many nights — after the kids are in bed, the dishes are done, and the bills are stacked on the counter — looking at each other and asking the same question: _**“How much worse does it have to get before someone does something?"**_ Well, we’re doing something. We’re running a campaign built from the ground up — traveling this district, meeting with teachers, nurses, line workers, ranchers, small business owners, and parents who’ve been left behind by the people who are supposed to represent us. We’ve stood on street corners with protestors holding signs. We’ve listened to folks who’ve lost their jobs, their healthcare, or their hope. And everywhere we go, we’re told the same thing: _**“No one’s fighting for us.”**_ But we are. John isn’t just running for office — he’s running for our future. For our kids. For yours. For a Colorado where healthcare, housing, and education aren’t luxury items — they’re basic human rights. Where no parent has to work 60 hours a week and still come up short at the grocery store. Where dignity doesn’t depend on your zip code or your last name. Meanwhile, Lauren Boebert is out here playing celebrity while women across this country fight just to be heard. She’s voted against reproductive rights, against childcare, against healthcare, and against nearly every measure that would help mothers and working families survive — let alone succeed. **She’s a slap in the face to every woman who has ever had to fight for fairness. For equal pay. For control over her own body. For a place at the table.** The MAGA Republicans don’t care about our kids’ future. They’re too busy fighting culture wars and cutting taxes for billionaires. They’re not building anything. They’re tearing it all down — and leaving us to clean up the mess. But I’ll tell you this: John and I? We’re not backing down. We’re not waiting for someone else to fix it. We’re raising our voices, standing our ground, and teaching our children that fighting for what’s right is always worth it. **[So if you’re ready to stand with us — if you believe in your bones that working people deserve better — then I’m asking you to join our fight. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us take this fight all the way to name: AG Holder Alert
subject: What A.G. Holder said on a federal court ordering Alabama to maintain a VRA-compliant map:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
How we keep up the fight to ensure fair representation for all
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107931934/546299568/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzY1NGVhLTExMzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=72d0niXFJYb_K91iuH1QXxghjNlJctkc1sGM2XtgS2Q=&emci=528ca3f3-6f32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d5c654ea-1134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, a recent federal court decision against Alabama’s efforts to impose an unfair congressional map is an undeniable win for the fair maps movement. And it sends a clear message to anti-democracy extremists: You will not succeed in taking this nation backwards. The court reaffirmed that Alabama’s congressional map must have two Black opportunity districts, and ensures Black voters in Alabama will vote under a fair map for the rest of the decade. It helps to put that into perspective: | “The generations of Black Alabamians who fought to achieve equal representation had their sacrifice and commitment recognized...Because of their tenacity and hard work, Black Alabamians will continue to vote on a fair congressional map that gives them their legally mandated voting power and allows them to elect a candidate of their choice in two districts.” **—Eric H. Holder, Jr.**
82nd Attorney General of the United States
---
The fair maps movement played a crucial role in securing a landmark victory on behalf of Black voters in _Allen v. Milligan_ in front of the Supreme Court, and this trial court ruling reaffirms it. But we must remember that Republicans are launching efforts that threaten the fundamental right to vote in states across the country. They’ve shown us they’ll stop at nothing in the pursuit of power, even silencing voters. In A.G. Holder’s words:
“The relentless efforts of some in Alabama to deny Black state citizens the rights they deserve and force them to vote on a racially discriminatory map are truly shameful.”
---
The NDRC is fighting back against attempts to erode our democracy’s most basic functions, and we depend on grassroots support to drive that work forward.
[**Will you make a donation to power our fight for fair maps and fair representation in Alabama and across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107931935/546299569/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGALStatement_email_20250518-NDRC-Tier1-AGALStatement_ctrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250518-NDRC-Tier1-AGALStatement_ctrl&utm_campaign=AGALStatement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzY1NGVhLTExMzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=72d0niXFJYb_K91iuH1QXxghjNlJctkc1sGM2XtgS2Q=)

clean_body: How we keep up the fight to ensure fair representation for all | Peter, a recent federal court decision against Alabama’s efforts to impose an unfair congressional map is an undeniable win for the fair maps movement. And it sends a clear message to anti-democracy extremists: You will not succeed in taking this nation backwards. The court reaffirmed that Alabama’s congressional map must have two Black opportunity districts, and ensures Black voters in Alabama will vote under a fair map for the rest of the decade. It helps to put that into perspective: | “The generations of Black Alabamians who fought to achieve equal representation had their sacrifice and commitment recognized...Because of their tenacity and hard work, Black Alabamians will continue to vote on a fair congressional map that gives them their legally mandated voting power and allows them to elect a candidate of their choice in two districts.” —Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States The fair maps movement played a crucial role in securing a landmark victory on behalf of Black voters in Allen v. Milligan in front of the Supreme Court, and this trial court ruling reaffirms it. But we must remember that Republicans are launching efforts that threaten the fundamental right to vote in states across the country. They’ve shown us they’ll stop at nothing in the pursuit of power, even silencing voters. In A.G. Holder’s words: “The relentless efforts of some in Alabama to deny Black state citizens the rights they deserve and force them to vote on a racially discriminatory map are truly shameful.” The NDRC is fighting back against attempts to erode our democracy’s most basic functions, and we depend on grassroots support to drive that work forward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Ted Cruz
subject: I’m proud of what we just achieved
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
This is a history victory in the fight to stop revenge porn and deepfake abuse.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TaHV0dGluZy1Eb3duLURlZXBmYWtlc18yMDI1MDUxNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVNodXR0aW5nLURvd24tRGVlcGZha2VzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/jPEgsrP4r_Mvodgk66KlTw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,

I'm so proud of what we just achieved. **The Take It Down Act has been SIGNED INTO LAW.**

We worked closely with victims and their loved ones, dozens of advocacy organizations, and lawmakers on both sides of the aisle to get this passed and sent to President Trump. **This is a historic victory in the fight to stop revenge porn and deepfake abuse.** The good news doesn't stop there. This is what happens when Congress is focused on tackling tough issues and taking the gloves off to hit perpetrators hard.

_We changed federal law AND sent a strong message._

---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TaHV0dGluZy1Eb3duLURlZXBmYWtlc18yMDI1MDUxNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVNodXR0aW5nLURvd24tRGVlcGZha2VzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/DwYX1uSGTYvZTiwUoh3kKg)
---
Mr. Deepfakes is a despicable website that served as a free-for-all open market for nonconsensual AI-generated deepfake pornography - and they **CLOSED THEIR DOORS PERMANENTLY and WIPED OUT THEIR ONLINE PRESENCE** just days after we passed the Take It Down Act.

We're forcing online platforms to remove nonconsensual intimate imagery within 48 hours of a request from a victim, and we've made the distribution of such images a crime punishable by fines or jail time.

I'm proud to have led the charge to get the Take It Down Act across the finish line.

**But as I 've said before, victory in this fight belongs first and foremost to the victims who have bravely shared their stories.**

It's vital that we [**sustain our fight for the Trump-Republican agenda**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TaHV0dGluZy1Eb3duLURlZXBmYWtlc18yMDI1MDUxNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVNodXR0aW5nLURvd24tRGVlcGZha2VzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/Ngf0RMOsi8JxLvDURm3bcA) - I'm grateful beyond words for everyone reading this who supported our push to get the Take It Down Act on the books, and for every bit of financial help we receive to fund our efforts.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---

clean_body: This is a history victory in the fight to stop revenge porn and deepfake abuse. | | | | | Fellow Conservative, I'm so proud of what we just achieved. The Take It Down Act has been SIGNED INTO LAW. We worked closely with victims and their loved ones, dozens of advocacy organizations, and lawmakers on both sides of the aisle to get this passed and sent to President Trump. This is a historic victory in the fight to stop revenge porn and deepfake abuse. The good news doesn't stop there. This is what happens when Congress is focused on tackling tough issues and taking the gloves off to hit perpetrators hard. We changed federal law AND sent a strong message. Mr. Deepfakes is a despicable website that served as a free-for-all open market for nonconsensual AI-generated deepfake pornography - and they CLOSED THEIR DOORS PERMANENTLY and WIPED OUT THEIR ONLINE PRESENCE just days after we passed the Take It Down Act. We're forcing online platforms to remove nonconsensual intimate imagery within 48 hours of a request from a victim, and we've made the distribution of such images a crime punishable by fines or jail time. I'm proud to have led the charge to get the Take It Down Act across the finish line. But as I 've said before, victory in this fight belongs first and foremost to the victims who have bravely shared their stories. It's vital that we - I'm grateful beyond words for everyone reading this who supported our push to get the Take It Down Act on the books, and for every bit of financial help we receive to fund our efforts. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. | id: 2024-08-16-13:01:43:512t

#

**— SURVEY FOR TOP DEMOCRATS —** Donald Trump has caused endless amounts of chaos and disruption during his first 100 days in office — attempting to stretch the limits of his presidential authority as far and wide as he can. So we want to know: **Do you think Donald Trump is abusing his power?** **[YES](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-trump-202505?t=1&akid=8957%2E614464%2Ekh9BUo)** **[NO](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-trump-202505?t=2&akid=8957%2E614464%2Ekh9BUo)** **[I'M NOT SURE](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-trump-202505?t=3&akid=8957%2E614464%2Ekh9BUo)**

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1011&refcode=email-20250518_v&akid=8489%2E5885482%2EoMUjpu ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump is finally getting his dream: a massive taxpayer-funded
military parade...on his own birthday.

It’s official: on June 14th, Trump will spend a staggering $45 million in
public money to showcase 6,000 troops, 50 fighter jets and bombers, and
150 military vehicles – including tanks rolling through the streets of DC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/27104?source=email-20250518&t=1061&akid=8489%2E5885482%2EoMUjpu ]Headline: Trump's 'big, beautiful' military parade perfectly distills
his presidency

But we have a chance – and a responsibility – to say NO to Trump's
dangerous ego trip. Our Revolution's Citizen Action Team is mobilizing
thousands of activists to stage massive, peaceful counter-protests, loudly
and unapologetically standing up against this reckless display.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250518nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8489%2E5885482%2EoMUjpu ]But to pull it off, we need your help right now to power our organizing,
outreach, and logistics efforts. Chip in now – $5, $10, or whatever you
can – to fuel Our Revolution's counter-demonstrations and show Trump loud
and clear that democracy won't bow down to tanks.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250518nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8489%2E5885482%2EoMUjpu ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25458?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250518nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8489%2E5885482%2EoMUjpu ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

It would almost be funny if it wasn't so outrageous and scary. At a time
when millions still lack adequate healthcare, housing, and decent wages,
Trump's big priority is a spectacle glorifying himself.

But make no mistake: Trump's authoritarian fantasy has a clear motive:
sending a chilling message, reminiscent of dictators who flex military
strength on the streets to assert power and silence dissent.

That’s precisely why massive counter-protests of resistance are so
critical. Our message to the nation and the world must drown out Trump's
self-aggrandizing parade by standing strong for peace, democracy, and
community – not vanity and militarism.

Trump wants the cameras trained on his tanks, troops, and bombers. But
together, we can shift the lens to thousands of peaceful protesters making
it clear we don't endorse his parade, his waste, or his dangerous agenda.

infrastructure — powering our campaigns team, mobilizing volunteers, and
covering event logistics — to effectively respond to Trump's dangerous
spectacle. Are you in?

When we organize, we win.

name: Joseph Bentivegna from Dr. Joe Bentivegna's Views
subject: Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) is Too Confusing.
body:
Voters Will Not Trust the Results in a Close Election

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..p0pDAmadHHunUo7TKXUjgLztu-99Pa2WMBmhBty1kv4?) for more
---
# [Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) is Too Confusing.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=163864825&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzODY0ODI1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1OTIzNDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDE4NDM0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.DAKzshbiVdwlJrUad1l882DD7DMGMGdHeete7mmIIBE)
### Voters Will Not Trust the Results in a Close Election
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| May 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=163864825&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzODY0ODI1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NzU5MjM0NywiZXhwIjoxNzUwMTg0MzQ3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.CAT3pawN3Ul0FwICk4UQfEFOITJClxTifunjEh22mNA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=163864825&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzODY0ODI1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1OTIzNDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDE4NDM0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.DAKzshbiVdwlJrUad1l882DD7DMGMGdHeete7mmIIBE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=163864825&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzODY0ODI1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1OTIzNDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDE4NDM0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.DAKzshbiVdwlJrUad1l882DD7DMGMGdHeete7mmIIBE)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvamZiZW50aXZlZ25hL3AvcmFua2VkLWNob2ljZS12b3RpbmctcmN2LWlzLXRvby1jb25mdXNpbmc_.2aoBOonpSnPEhayJT2BqFz7cGiEc2gXDeD0rQozh8kw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/ranked-choice-voting-rcv-is-too-confusing?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

May 18, 2025
Canada just had an election. [Nineteen million people](https://substack.com/redirect/dce9b83d-ba87-4597-b515-f0aad36ad1ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) voted. Everyone presented voter ID. There were no computers. There were few mail-in ballots. There were no drop boxes. There was no ballot harvesting. The paper ballots were all counted by hand and the results sent to the appropriate agencies. The results were totaled. The same evening as the day of the election, it was announced that the Liberals won and the Conservatives lost. Neither side questioned the result. And life went on.
How quaint.
But not in the United States. Policy leaders have allowed mail-in ballots, voting without voter ID, early voting for as much as six weeks and incomprehensible computer software to count the ballots. California's election encompassed over a two-month period in 2024!

The latest voting "reform" being promoted is [Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). ](https://substack.com/redirect/c1b6ee2e-a7bb-4144-9feb-bf997e8cd110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)In Connecticut, _The Governor 's Commission on RCV_ recommended this be permitted as an option in local and primary elections.
There are many arguments against RCV, my favorites being written by the former Republican nominee for the Secretary of the State in Connecticut, Dominic Rapini. I will not repeat his [lucid arguments](https://substack.com/redirect/fa827d9a-f587-4e1a-94d8-1a5dc89cad0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Rather, I will simply give an example of how RCV works and let the reader decide whether we want to gamble our democracy on this system.

With RCV, voters do not only vote for one candidate. They have the option of voting for their first choice, second choice, third choice etc. If no candidate receives over 50% of the vote, then the last candidate is disqualified and the second-choice candidate of his or her voters' is added to the totals of the other candidates. This process continues until one candidate receives over 50%.

So let's look at a theoretical Republican Primary for the State Senate in my hometown of Fairfield. The results are as follows:
* John Smith 3,500 - 35%
* Mary Jones 3,300 - 33%
* Peter Doe 2,500 - 25%
* Joe Bentivegna 700 - 7%
* Total 10,000

Notice that the total vote is 10,000 meaning that no one has achieved a majority of at least 5001 votes. Also notice to no surprise of anyone aware of my political skills, I have come in dead last, with a few of my paisans expressing their tribal loyalty.
What happens next? I would be disqualified and the ballots of those who voted for me would be examined for their second choice. Let's say this is as follows:
* John Smith - 150
* Mary Jones - 300
* Peter Doe - 100
* Total - 550

Notice that even though I received 700 votes, there are only 550 votes on the second round, possibly because 150 of my paisans refused to vote for a non-Italian.

Now, my second-choice votes are added to the initial tallies and yield the following results:
* John Smith - 3,650
* Mary Jones - 3,600
* Peter Doe - 2,600

No one has achieved the requisite 5,001 votes. So now Peter Doe is disqualified. The second choice of Peter Doe voters is:
* Joe Bentivegna - 2,000
* Mary Jones - 300
* John Smith - 200
* Left Blank - 100

Now the total of the two remaining candidates are:
* John Smith - 3,850
* Mary Jones - 3,900

So, what happens next since neither candidate has received a majority? The vote counters return to those who voted for me and see what their third choice was. The same is done with Peter Doe. If neither of the top two candidates receives a majority, then the fourth choice of my voters and Peter Doe's are tabulated. If neither Smith or Jones, receives a majority, the candidate with the plurality - let's say Mary Jones at 4800 votes - wins.

There are many reasons why RCV is impractical and threatens trust in our elections:
1\. In the above scenario, note that it is easily possible for the winning candidate to still win with less than 50% and furthermore, that candidate may have been behind initially. This defeats the whole purpose of RCV.
2\. Notice that voters for Joe Bentivegna have more power even though they have voted for the least popular candidate. Why? Because their vote can be counted up to four times. This is a violation of "One Vote, One Person," the bedrock of our democracy.
3\. Notice that Joe Bentivegna was shafted by the second round of vote counting because I received a huge amount of Peter Doe's supporters. The skeptical reader may say that this is statistically unlikely, but this is not true. If Peter Doe and I are the two conservatives and our opponents are the two moderates, this scenario is easily possible. But because I was disqualified after the first ballot, I will never receive these 2000 votes that made me theoretically competitive.
4\. It is very time consuming to hand count these ballots. Separate piles of ballots must be created for each candidate. If no candidate receives a majority, each pile must be recounted. Thus, RCV must be done with by computers. And with such a complex system, software glitches will occasionally occur like night follows day.
5\. Every ballot must be present unless the first count is an obvious landslide. This means results cannot be finalized until mail-in ballots and those from overseas (military, ex-pats etc.) arrive. This can take weeks.
6\. If a recount is required, such as in Connecticut, when there is a less than a 0.5% difference between the leading candidates, it could take weeks if not months to determine the winner.
7\. Voters will be skeptical of the results if the leading candidate in the first round ends up losing, and so will the candidate himself. Notice in my example, John Smith was ahead on the first count, but Mary Jones won but did not even receive a majority of the vote.
But the main problem with RCV is that it is too complicated. I spent hours trying to figure it out and I am not even sure I understand it. And I am a political junkie. If our political leaders want to ensure trust in our elections when neither candidate receives a majority vote, then we should adopt the same system as the state of Georgia. Have a run-off election between the two top candidates.
Democracy does not work when voters can't comprehend or fail to trust the system. We should combine the Canadian and Georgia model if most voters in Connecticut want reform.
Comments: [jfbentivegna@gmail.com](https://substack.com/redirect/6328e978-e579-4b2a-a472-85d0c6b45604?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Follow Dr. Bentivegna on Twitter (X) @joebentivegnamd
This article is not copyrighted, and I give my consent for anyone to republish it.

clean_body: Voters Will Not Trust the Results in a Close Election | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Voters Will Not Trust the Results in a Close Election | | | May 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | May 18, 2025 Canada just had an election. voted. Everyone presented voter ID. There were no computers. There were few mail-in ballots. There were no drop boxes. There was no ballot harvesting. The paper ballots were all counted by hand and the results sent to the appropriate agencies. The results were totaled. The same evening as the day of the election, it was announced that the Liberals won and the Conservatives lost. Neither side questioned the result. And life went on. How quaint. But not in the United States. Policy leaders have allowed mail-in ballots, voting without voter ID, early voting for as much as six weeks and incomprehensible computer software to count the ballots. California's election encompassed over a two-month period in 2024! The latest voting "reform" being promoted is Connecticut, The Governor 's Commission on RCV recommended this be permitted as an option in local and primary elections. There are many arguments against RCV, my favorites being written by the former Republican nominee for the Secretary of the State in Connecticut, Dominic Rapini. I will not repeat his . Rather, I will simply give an example of how RCV works and let the reader decide whether we want to gamble our democracy on this system. With RCV, voters do not only vote for one candidate. They have the option of voting for their first choice, second choice, third choice etc. If no candidate receives over 50% of the vote, then the last candidate is disqualified and the second-choice candidate of his or her voters' is added to the totals of the other candidates. This process continues until one candidate receives over 50%. So let's look at a theoretical Republican Primary for the State Senate in my hometown of Fairfield. The results are as follows: John Smith 3,500 - 35% Mary Jones 3,300 - 33% Peter Doe 2,500 - 25% Joe Bentivegna 700 - 7% Total 10,000 Notice that the total vote is 10,000 meaning that no one has achieved a majority of at least 5001 votes. Also notice to no surprise of anyone aware of my political skills, I have come in dead last, with a few of my paisans expressing their tribal loyalty. What happens next? I would be disqualified and the ballots of those who voted for me would be examined for their second choice. Let's say this is as follows: John Smith - 150 Mary Jones - 300 Peter Doe - 100 Total - 550 Notice that even though I received 700 votes, there are only 550 votes on the second round, possibly because 150 of my paisans refused to vote for a non-Italian. Now, my second-choice votes are added to the initial tallies and yield the following results: John Smith - 3,650 Mary Jones - 3,600 Peter Doe - 2,600 No one has achieved the requisite 5,001 votes. So now Peter Doe is disqualified. The second choice of Peter Doe voters is: Joe Bentivegna - 2,000 Mary Jones - 300 John Smith - 200 Left Blank - 100 Now the total of the two remaining candidates are: John Smith - 3,850 Mary Jones - 3,900 So, what happens next since neither candidate has received a majority? The vote counters return to those who voted for me and see what their third choice was. The same is done with Peter Doe. If neither of the top two candidates receives a majority, then the fourth choice of my voters and Peter Doe's are tabulated. If neither Smith or Jones, receives a majority, the candidate with the plurality - let's say Mary Jones at 4800 votes - wins. There are many reasons why RCV is impractical and threatens trust in our elections: 1\. In the above scenario, note that it is easily possible for the winning candidate to still win with less than 50% and furthermore, that candidate may have been behind initially. This defeats the whole purpose of RCV. 2\. Notice that voters for Joe Bentivegna have more power even though they have voted for the least popular candidate. Why? Because their vote can be counted up to four times. This is a violation of "One Vote, One Person," the bedrock of our democracy. 3\. Notice that Joe Bentivegna was shafted by the second round of vote counting because I received a huge amount of Peter Doe's supporters. The skeptical reader may say that this is statistically unlikely, but this is not true. If Peter Doe and I are the two conservatives and our opponents are the two moderates, this scenario is easily possible. But because I was disqualified after the first ballot, I will never receive these 2000 votes that made me theoretically competitive. 4\. It is very time consuming to hand count these ballots. Separate piles of ballots must be created for each candidate. If no candidate receives a majority, each pile must be recounted. Thus, RCV must be done with by computers. And with such a complex system, software glitches will occasionally occur like night follows day. 5\. Every ballot must be present unless the first count is an obvious landslide. This means results cannot be finalized until mail-in ballots and those from overseas (military, ex-pats etc.) arrive. This can take weeks. 6\. If a recount is required, such as in Connecticut, when there is a less than a 0.5% difference between the leading candidates, it could take weeks if not months to determine the winner. 7\. Voters will be skeptical of the results if the leading candidate in the first round ends up losing, and so will the candidate himself. Notice in my example, John Smith was ahead on the first count, but Mary Jones won but did not even receive a majority of the vote. But the main problem with RCV is that it is too complicated. I spent hours trying to figure it out and I am not even sure I understand it. And I am a political junkie. If our political leaders want to ensure trust in our elections when neither candidate receives a majority vote, then we should adopt the same system as the state of Georgia. Have a run-off election between the two top candidates. Democracy does not work when voters can't comprehend or fail to trust the system. We should combine the Canadian and Georgia model if most voters in Connecticut want reform. name: Steve Hilton
subject: She’s back…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
No Kamalifornia| | |
---

---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d7717e9c6ecb4198be986587bd184644&_e=qHo4FKZCSjYsP9DqLb1fkRwS3z0Nzt_oX-P99VLVx-0g7iB6LYt49sNDxA-APEg4SrP9VEIw0O3aYo7U7qhPwK8v4yrEq7hS04-eXKVgxvl7DmAbC-ggRzjjI__h_wObsbInCw39nUM5YUN23eUrsHQbkR47jJFtH3Yq4CpKMVBSIRqgndSMyd2qwRB2lVDOLIC8KFw5e-XyL5p6G7etXF7M6TkWnjMe1CO2bMXji4acXfIvj75O5R0vN8ggsuabqsOU2x7BgXlaNE_QtNACKQwi-wl-6vj1jBZEQCOMKAhzVGyWL2mV08uMtKgYheNvxkMQ48uoxWhYHGOEEeouRvgCf2TMe1zK_Ukm71PvUTUR48cslaMGgupXynZCWhnszCio6HRdMxkO4wgbIw2gsduOH0myhLRj-s6qqXDuKhA%3D)
---
| | Dear Peter, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d7717e9c6ecb4198be986587bd184644&_e=qHo4FKZCSjYsP9DqLb1fkRwS3z0Nzt_oX-P99VLVx-0g7iB6LYt49sNDxA-APEg4SrP9VEIw0O3aYo7U7qhPwK8v4yrEq7hS04-eXKVgxvl7DmAbC-ggRzjjI__h_wObsbInCw39nUM5YUN23eUrsHQbkR47jJFtH3Yq4CpKMVBSIRqgndSMyd2qwRB2lVDOLIC8KFw5e-XyL5p6G7etXF7M6TkWnjMe1CO2bMXji4acXfIvj75O5R0vN8ggsuabqsOU2x7BgXlaNE_QtNACKQPNnzVOMc-4UCMilxPFsLwO5azmCuaPaS83uvT2byhVhX9c7i1a8msX-ZQiMnJ84tzHSVey6EItOkiFTvrSXXDeyKB45E2QhaQ6QZa8ZdznzkzjXrwTT8PKTh_DIZvVBss5F5M05ryiciBjSetuwaY%3D) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d7717e9c6ecb4198be986587bd184644&_e=qHo4FKZCSjYsP9DqLb1fkRwS3z0Nzt_oX-P99VLVx-0g7iB6LYt49sNDxA-APEg4SrP9VEIw0O3aYo7U7qhPwK8v4yrEq7hS04-eXKVgxvl7DmAbC-ggRzjjI__h_wObsbInCw39nUM5YUN23eUrsHQbkR47jJFtH3Yq4CpKMVBSIRqgndSMyd2qwRB2lVDOLIC8KFw5e-XyL5p6G7etXF7M6TkWnjMe1CO2bMXji4acXfIvj75O5R0vN8ggsuabqsOU2x7BgXlaNE_QtNACKT-VJhwTsMcwNmWuvmbyD-IVo-atkbohB9Gha2p4Se3x-iuLH2y9sapJ7NHX0CSV5AnVCuK0DNoZrEV1kbDbxCflXvsx3AKovvswApMkDlMPnOkMmXnX5jH3g1TLFWKo8BDj1XZmqcgI-H3EnvjDVE4%3D)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d7717e9c6ecb4198be986587bd184644&_e=qHo4FKZCSjYsP9DqLb1fkRwS3z0Nzt_oX-P99VLVx-0g7iB6LYt49sNDxA-APEg4SrP9VEIw0O3aYo7U7qhPwK8v4yrEq7hS04-eXKVgxvl7DmAbC-ggRzjjI__h_wObsbInCw39nUM5YUN23eUrsHQbkR47jJFtH3Yq4CpKMVBSIRqgndSMyd2qwRB2lVDOLIC8KFw5e-XyL5p6G7etXF7M6TkWnjMe1CO2bMXji4acXfIvj75O5R0vN8ggsuabqsOU2x7BgXlaNE_QtNACKZfFcpxJ_s9Lj46wdWGIfJw-Fu7xO05MOjIrw8eKn_e9qExhUrj-SmT240g6uNm_EZvxqHYYOHiDpX7zZu4p8kF7iFLTLgvk2nwFoUuuTis-cls4QbSmQFhr9eZEYGLpj-B-7jXdaEbrWuzqLOsbXbM%3D) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d7717e9c6ecb4198be986587bd184644&_e=qHo4FKZCSjYsP9DqLb1fkRwS3z0Nzt_oX-P99VLVx-0g7iB6LYt49sNDxA-APEg4SrP9VEIw0O3aYo7U7qhPwK8v4yrEq7hS04-eXKVgxvl7DmAbC-ggRzjjI__h_wObsbInCw39nUM5YUN23eUrsHQbkR47jJFtH3Yq4CpKMVBSIRqgndSMyd2qwRB2lVDOLIC8KFw5e-XyL5p6G7etXF7M6TkWnjMe1CO2bMXji4acXfIvj75O5R0vN8ggsuabC2FzDxBCXY2tvTpDy6zscGGztre_Bw8s_Dhexu7zPBh0TDexRQmQyqks53oVxt5-7cW17d12wRHzDsdvzeJbUvblZXNCloacKStfXsNWpbLHJHpP5Nm7m0s2GdardWRJZ58BELluGunJ4Be3zDjVX6z73YmPX5fApb6-ZQEG3EjJSCDVBLXU3dkssXWKRUxX)
---
P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. **[Chip in today and let’s end the one-party rule that’s destroying our beautiful Golden State.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d7717e9c6ecb4198be986587bd184644&_e=qHo4FKZCSjYsP9DqLb1fkRwS3z0Nzt_oX-P99VLVx-0g7iB6LYt49sNDxA-APEg4SrP9VEIw0O3aYo7U7qhPwK8v4yrEq7hS04-eXKVgxvl7DmAbC-ggRzjjI__h_wObsbInCw39nUM5YUN23eUrsHQbkR47jJFtH3Yq4CpKMVBSIRqgndSMyd2qwRB2lVDOLIC8KFw5e-XyL5p6G7etXF7M6TkWnjMe1CO2bMXji4acXfIvj75O5R0vN8ggsuabqsOU2x7BgXlaNE_QtNACKaFbra-JJDtbX8Gc7Bizy2iO4yhFCtksjELM5Fy4pzdlKTfovPW62xE8t2dBdlMhbfVRu0Y-ceyyuZLGbZSpdtftQbDi_NTqG8ZAPprGf_41mZ_tj-6jCfOMwuysSS_TR8CHyM45Rz0nf2vk1uV0EY8%3D)**
---
|
---

name: DrKimSchrier.com
subject: Republicans keep using their power to dismantle healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Republicans have taken the “service” out of being a public servant, and it’s time we call them out for it. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107933445/546304568/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTRjM2NmNS0xNTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwKiyAgdmGQK2Wqhmliw8rUS4YR2Za7t0DzzYa9CZ1o=&emci=c9bfb217-6632-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7e4c3cf5-1534-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

As a Member of the House Energy and Commerce Committee—the committee in charge of marking up Trump’s “big, beautiful bill”—Kim spent 26 hours fighting Republicans who wanted to cut Medicaid to give massive tax breaks to Trump’s billionaire buddies.

Republicans didn’t listen to the concerns of Democrats. And they sure didn’t listen to the stories of real-life American people who will be devastated by Medicaid cuts. Kim herself told the story of a young girl in Washington’s 8th District who relies on Medicaid for life-saving care; care that would be in jeopardy should these cuts go into effect.

**Republicans allowed these stories to go in one ear and out the other, and then proceeded to slash Medicaid funding and more.**

**[Republicans have taken the “service” out of being a public servant, and it’s time we call them out for it. Will you chip in right now to stand with Kim against these Medicaid cuts? Let’s show the GOP the power of this grassroots movement right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107933446/546304569/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250518_medica_fndd_gq_act___dkscom_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250518_medica_fndd_gq_act___dkscom_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=7e4c3cf5-1534-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode2=7e4c3cf5-1534-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTRjM2NmNS0xNTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwKiyAgdmGQK2Wqhmliw8rUS4YR2Za7t0DzzYa9CZ1o=)**

Peter—healthcare cuts are the reason Kim ran for office in the first place. In 2016, Republicans tried to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, which would have left 13 MILLION Americans uninsured. Kim called on her representative to stand against it, but he voted to rob people of their healthcare anyway.

Now, despite the concerns of all Americans, Republicans are once again using their power to destroy healthcare—this time leading to 7 MILLION Americans losing the life-saving care they need.

Kim won her seat because our government stopped working for the people. Now, she’s ready to hold her seat and flip the House blue, too, to stop Republicans from gutting our healthcare once again.

**[Will you help Kim hold the line against Republicans who want to destroy our healthcare system and leave Americans left to cover the cost? clean_body: Republicans have taken the “service” out of being a public servant, and it’s time we call them out for it. Peter, As a Member of the House Energy and Commerce Committee—the committee in charge of marking up Trump’s “big, beautiful bill”—Kim spent 26 hours fighting Republicans who wanted to cut Medicaid to give massive tax breaks to Trump’s billionaire buddies. Republicans didn’t listen to the concerns of Democrats. And they sure didn’t listen to the stories of real-life American people who will be devastated by Medicaid cuts. Kim herself told the story of a young girl in Washington’s 8th District who relies on Medicaid for life-saving care; care that would be in jeopardy should these cuts go into effect. Republicans allowed these stories to go in one ear and out the other, and then proceeded to slash Medicaid funding and more. = Peter—healthcare cuts are the reason Kim ran for office in the first place. In 2016, Republicans tried to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, which would have left 13 MILLION Americans uninsured. Kim called on her representative to stand against it, but he voted to rob people of their healthcare anyway. Now, despite the concerns of all Americans, Republicans are once again using their power to destroy healthcare—this time leading to 7 MILLION Americans losing the life-saving care they need. Kim won her seat because our government stopped working for the people. Now, she’s ready to hold her seat and flip the House blue, too, to stop Republicans from gutting our healthcare once again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- – DrKimSchrier.com Rep. name: Lee Johnson
subject: South Carolina Has Been Left Behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107933595/546304979/2109746102?refcode=250518_MFC_Johnson_SCLeftBehind&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzBiYjMzYi0xNjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ivhZtWuhKIaQnIF0PCqaxYvUlA4Gtom6Y8wYeRvArKQ=) Friends, I wasn’t born into politics. I was born into a welding helmet, to a family that built roads and bridges for a living. For years, I have been building companies, fixing broken systems, and working on energy projects across the world. I believe that we need more builders in Washington. And as your Senator, I promise to build an economy that works for everyone. Because right now, South Carolinians are being left behind by their leadership. I believe in creating more well paying jobs, expanding access to healthcare, and bringing civility back to our politics. We aren’t going to make progress on the important issues by continuing to send the same representatives back on our behalf year after year. For years, Lindsey Graham and his political allies have failed to deliver for our state on the issues that count.**[If you agree with me that it’s time South Carolina has a fresh voice, then donate to our campaign today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107933596/546304980/2036686014?refcode=250518_MFC_Johnson_SCLeftBehind&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzBiYjMzYi0xNjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ivhZtWuhKIaQnIF0PCqaxYvUlA4Gtom6Y8wYeRvArKQ=)** **By becoming a Founding Donor to our campaign, you are making an investment in a grassroots operation that will reach people all across this state with our message. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Organizing for change with Stacey Abrams
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
On Stacey Abrams’ Assembly Required podcast this week, I got to talk about something I care deeply about.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250518-5059-footer&t=1&akid=5059%2E420207%2EcV_bfS)
Peter,
On Stacey Abrams’ _Assembly Required_ podcast this week, I got to talk about something I care deeply about: how we organize both inside and outside of Congress to build our progressive movement.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250518-1?refcode=em20250518-5059&amount=3&refcode2=5059_420207_cV_bfS&akid=5059%2E420207%2EcV_bfS)
From my start as an immigrant rights activist in Seattle to now serving in Congress, **I’ve always believed that change doesn’t come from the top down — it comes from the bottom up.** That’s the driving force behind everything I do.
As of right now, thousands of people, from activists and students to parents and retirees, have joined our grassroots movement to fight back against authoritarianism, organize in their communities, and build lasting power for working people.
So I know there’s a lot of fear out there right now. **But it’s important to remember that we’re not alone, and we’re not powerless.** When millions of working people across the country come together to stand up and demand change, we _can_ make it happen.
I’m going to keep organizing for change both inside and outside of Congress, and I hope I can count on you to stand with me, Peter.
[**If you believe in the work we’re doing to organize our communities and fight back against Trump’s authoritarianism, will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can today to help us keep going?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250518-1?refcode=em20250518-5059&amount=3&refcode2=5059_420207_cV_bfS&akid=5059%2E420207%2EcV_bfS)
I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, and I don’t chase after billionaires to use as ATMs. Everything we’re doing is powered by grassroots supporters like you.
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250518-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250518-5059&refcode2=5059_420207_cV_bfS&akid=5059%2E420207%2EcV_bfS)**
Thank you, Peter, for your support.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250518-5059-footer&t=2&refcode2=5059_420207_cV_bfS&akid=5059%2E420207%2EcV_bfS)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter, it’s Ritchie Torres. We’re closing in on tonight’s weekly fundraising deadline, and I’m left with no choice but to reach out one last time:

**I need you to know that I don’t rely on call time, which is political jargon for spending hours on the phone begging donors for big checks.**

That’s because I want to be funded by those who I’m fighting for in Congress — people like you, Peter. **I’d rather focus on doing the work I was _elected_ to do, which means this is a campaign fueled by supporters like you!**

But team, we’re still $1,828 short of tonight’s $10,000 weekly goal, with just a few hours to go. [Can I count on you to chip in $3 to help us reach it and boost this people-powered movement and protect our common-sense, progressive agenda? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107934383/546307703/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250518_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEyOGU0Yy0xYTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eq01qCsM5G8RbaI_9I7DYSJagEAZquJYt16kq3B-tuI=) | **[$1,828 LEFT TO GOAL: RUSH $3 TO SUPPORT RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107934384/546307704/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250518_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEyOGU0Yy0xYTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eq01qCsM5G8RbaI_9I7DYSJagEAZquJYt16kq3B-tuI=)**

Thank you for your support,
_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Michael, Team Harder
subject: If we lose this seat, we lose the House
body:
We can’t let that happen!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107934835/546309168/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFlOWNkZmQtMWEzNC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OarS5IuntysUV37TXPa59IaKUtPCbLhxFVEjkUlhWS8=) | Hey Peter, It’s Michael – Josh’s finance director. As Josh mentioned yesterday, we’re seriously behind on our fundraising goals for the quarter. We need this grassroots team to step up — because if we don’t, we risk giving Republicans a dangerous advantage. **Let me be clear about what’s at stake right now: If we lose this seat, Democrats will lose the House again in 2026. That would give Donald Trump unchecked power to continue his attacks on our democracy for two more years. We simply can’t let that happen!** [_**Will you please rush in a donation to help us make progress towards our goal and do everything it takes to keep this seat blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107934841/546309175/-1759382976?&refcode=E13329-20250518-FinanceUpdate-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFlOWNkZmQtMWEzNC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OarS5IuntysUV37TXPa59IaKUtPCbLhxFVEjkUlhWS8=) [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107934845/546309180/760502853?refcode=E13329-20250518-FinanceUpdate-SB-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFlOWNkZmQtMWEzNC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OarS5IuntysUV37TXPa59IaKUtPCbLhxFVEjkUlhWS8=) I don’t want to sound overly dramatic, but the stakes are real. We’re not on track right now, and this seat is in serious jeopardy. **Josh is already facing relentless attacks, especially after clashing with RFK Jr. during a high-profile hearing this week. That kind of courage draws fire, and now more than ever, he needs backup from this team.** I’ve seen the strength of this incredible grassroots team. When we show up, we’re unstoppable. clean_body: We can’t let that happen! | = | Hey Peter, It’s Michael – Josh’s finance director. As Josh mentioned yesterday, we’re seriously behind on our fundraising goals for the quarter. We need this grassroots team to step up — because if we don’t, we risk giving Republicans a dangerous advantage. Let me be clear about what’s at stake right now: If we lose this seat, Democrats will lose the House again in 2026. That would give Donald Trump unchecked power to continue his attacks on our democracy for two more years. We simply can’t let that happen! = = I don’t want to sound overly dramatic, but the stakes are real. We’re not on track right now, and this seat is in serious jeopardy. Josh is already facing relentless attacks, especially after clashing with RFK Jr. during a high-profile hearing this week. That kind of courage draws fire, and now more than ever, he needs backup from this team. I’ve seen the strength of this incredible grassroots team. When we show up, we’re unstoppable. But Donald Trump and Elon Musk are betting that we’ll give up. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for understanding, \- Michael Hammer Finance Director, Harder for Congress *

If you want to be one of the FIRST Patriots to get the latest updates on efforts directly from the Republican Party, please make sure to follow us on **[Facebook](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a2b490aa72dc4b86a78625714c0079df&_e=qj1nSs1dl2JH8FAVo8y8J9N0zcs426Y8de47_ShBcw90HS-tQLDNt1lqQPUk5v2yCuzlN6QYUHG495mrS9PIjffePcIPhX8LCVqH42LKDQT7SJMkB6VYuOPLEl8_tVwHBU2Y_QIpST-pZ06hsMmqZ-QZG2Vm7cOoeno-v6w-L5UhlaK0Ardvo7NG4o18amCn03WanO2j1gIisVH6OZP0kacspColTkf1Iu1YAyj47d2_hO4uqEZ275NOHZ0a445I)** and **[Twitter,](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a2b490aa72dc4b86a78625714c0079df&_e=qj1nSs1dl2JH8FAVo8y8J7HWVNsobMMRV-8ei_iT6UlGEMGRo7w82R6NCSkFC4_GO0NImPbpGvH7E_WlHSoe2KPKFNj_uKqIj_HlnPHQR8Yc7uGuXdGy1ySSwwjAqbOwKdCzqOFwD9-lXioCjJQOUqlfnIDuuNUmlC3N9NH-MMBQb45aL-WcNrSg1vvJXhO3WvXbitN5jNbKwdqLHHNZHg%3D%3D)** and **TEXT WIN to 80810.**

clean_body: Fellow American, This is Tim Sheehy. I don't usually ask folks to "join a board" -- but this one's different. It's mission-driven. It matters. And I signed up myself. President Trump and the GOP are building a select Republican Advisory Board made up of grassroots leaders from across the country. People who love this nation and want to shape its future -- not sit on the sidelines. ** **** Spots are being hand-selected in every state - and when they're gone, they're gone. No second wave. No expanded roster. Your first assignment is already waiting: the Official GOP Strategy Survey. It's short. It's sharp. And it's how you'll help guide our direction before the next major push. **** Gratefully, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL U.S. Senator, Montana Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hickenlooper-may25.wFmgxs&refcode=em250518-1-b&t=1&akid=10442%2E3935704%2E0pAHOG)
---
Hey folks, it's John Hickenlooper. I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.
[**Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and GIFFORDS PAC to help build this campaign from the ground up?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hickenlooper-may25.wFmgxs&refcode=em250518-1-b&t=2&akid=10442%2E3935704%2E0pAHOG)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hickenlooper-may25.wFmgxs&refcode=em250518-1-b&t=3&akid=10442%2E3935704%2E0pAHOG)**
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint -- _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hickenlooper-may25.wFmgxs&refcode=em250518-1-b&t=4&akid=10442%2E3935704%2E0pAHOG)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service -- first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
[**That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5 -- about the cost of two Wynkoop pints -- to help us build a winning campaign?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hickenlooper-may25.wFmgxs&refcode=em250518-1-b%3Frefcode%3Dem250518-1-b&amount=5&t=5&akid=10442%2E3935704%2E0pAHOG)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between GIFFORDS PAC and John Hickenlooper instantly:_
**[DONATE $5 →](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hickenlooper-may25.wFmgxs&refcode=em250518-1-b%3Frefcode%3Dem250518-1-b&amount=5&t=6&akid=10442%2E3935704%2E0pAHOG)**
**[OTHER AMOUNT](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hickenlooper-may25.wFmgxs&refcode=em250518-1-b&t=7&akid=10442%2E3935704%2E0pAHOG)**
I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=10442%2E3935704%2E0pAHOG) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Troy Downing
subject: I want to hear from YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I don’t need Washington swamp creatures' opinions. I want YOURS!

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
| | Hi there, Peter. Troy Downing here. As one of my top supporters, I want to ensure that your voice is heard when carrying out my agenda for Congress. That’s why I’ve created a fiscal responsibility survey and would love your answers to help shape my platform in Congress. [**Take a minute to take the survey now:**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
| | [ ANSWER NOW ](https://trk.emails.troydowning._qpNXQoT_0e8zAzDJA)
---
| | I need your opinion on this—not the input of Washington swamp creatures who helped create this mess. I promise to be a common-sense voice for getting our fiscal house in order.

Thank you for your answers,
Troy Downing

|

name: Katie Porter
subject: House GOP budget update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39730%2E3422442%2EDiEEwQ)
Dear Derek,
The House budget bill is the GOP’s vehicle for slashing Medicaid, food assistance, and clean energy investments to pay for tax giveaways to billionaires.
Last Friday, this budget bill failed to advance out of the Budget Committee, the first step to becoming law. While that’s good news, the handful of Republicans who joined Democrats to oppose the bill actually think the budget doesn’t go far enough to take help away from families.
Tonight, the Budget Committee is meeting again to try to move Republicans’ harmful budget out of committee. We have to stay vigilant. They might negotiate even bigger cuts to the programs that families rely on, in order to get those hardline conservative votes.
Here’s what this means for us. We need to keep up the pressure and send a clear message to Congress that we oppose slashing programs that keep our families healthy and combat pollution.
If House Republicans want to follow extremists’ lead on gutting the federal government, they need to hear from the American people that we are going to fight them every step of the way.
I’m running for governor to defend the programs that families rely on and to bring down costs for working people. I’m going to loudly and forcefully call out attempts to give tax breaks to billionaires at the expense of our families.
**[Will you chip in $5 to support my campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250518_1_ak?refcode=em20250518-39730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39730_3422442_DiEEwQ&akid=39730%2E3422442%2EDiEEwQ)**

—Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250518-39730&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39730_3422442_DiEEwQ&akid=39730%2E3422442%2EDiEEwQ)**

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: October 2001
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2a22d51614b4a5e87e83e41ca949a9e&_e=AmOiBafzvzVy4ZKZNLusF_3oDfymRhVgFtxG2eUIytICm2tiUhYOGlnry3XLl-kH4AVxcnuzrKWnetKvgNPe3l1RNBrDEC5Aus9bJn99y03lp93NU-uAneoB9tySYBwV_JrVxK576DA51kLBGfaHey1GSBcAoiTv28AXX94z8K5jw1Rl-kYkv7AOvm2BPWtmnqQMK_8_y1xY7YSp8zsdPrcd6ri2bsiG4I8-dnUSFToi3Lwz9MRlTZQJGOJi9IZr2mcyBP-iKcfH7Sr-OIf6yLib0PSrjpb4YMAt-km9dH0tsxoQTVXOqy_qzi64akzxzPhS6Hn0W06P8rFtfIR6-2cc21nIAL0dS1HuiX3r1SJL3-cGaIU1oePaOxTHnb8wG-8SPWBaexVeYLDugqLRPnXfwiVEB2Ife5zcb_VUgkQ%3D)

---

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2a22d51614b4a5e87e83e41ca949a9e&_e=AmOiBafzvzVy4ZKZNLusF_3oDfymRhVgFtxG2eUIytICm2tiUhYOGlnry3XLl-kH4AVxcnuzrKWnetKvgNPe3l1RNBrDEC5Aus9bJn99y03lp93NU-uAneoB9tySYBwV_JrVxK576DA51kLBGfaHey1GSBcAoiTv28AXX94z8K5jw1Rl-kYkv7AOvm2BPWtmnqQMK_8_y1xY7YSp8zsdPrcd6ri2bsiG4I8-dnUSFToi3Lwz9MRlTZQJGOJi9IZr2mcyBP-iKcfH7Sr-OIf6yFuQsNT1SGMwt07msjBzxOhd8bK_eW5y_9NM22fHtV9YA1QreeDOcMzdYexQJhOmWUHcj1w9BmQ_3WaqB1fln5AvLYLYHeSNEUlya5_H7K7G-c0GM9eyGGrJU7bfTGqpvIhlA71QxEnq98YP1AizhNE%3D)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2a22d51614b4a5e87e83e41ca949a9e&_e=AmOiBafzvzVy4ZKZNLusF_3oDfymRhVgFtxG2eUIytICm2tiUhYOGlnry3XLl-kH4AVxcnuzrKWnetKvgNPe3l1RNBrDEC5Aus9bJn99y03lp93NU-uAneoB9tySYBwV_JrVxK576DA51kLBGfaHey1GSBcAoiTv28AXX94z8K5jw1Rl-kYkv7AOvm2BPWtmnqQMK_8_y1xY7YSp8zsdPrcd6ri2bsiG4I8-dnUSFToi3Lwz9MRlTZQJGOJi9IZr2mcyBP-iKcfH7Sr-OIf6yEpDIoGr73UdLALeelakNebnG0WXSMcjhaOHTGApSySp9Wzd7kkHWIeoJCwgd_6shUfw_0iUgYj09zynj7aCP_-pFVeB7iCM9W9Gxwcz9MB0bXCFpOAjQMwBdBrjpWwVbZJInpTwYmEyYuCrBEiajIg%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2a22d51614b4a5e87e83e41ca949a9e&_e=AmOiBafzvzVy4ZKZNLusF_3oDfymRhVgFtxG2eUIytICm2tiUhYOGlnry3XLl-kH4AVxcnuzrKWnetKvgNPe3l1RNBrDEC5Aus9bJn99y03lp93NU-uAneoB9tySYBwV_JrVxK576DA51kLBGfaHey1GSBcAoiTv28AXX94z8K5jw1Rl-kYkv7AOvm2BPWtmnqQMK_8_y1xY7YSp8zsdPrcd6ri2bsiG4I8-dnUSFToi3Lwz9MRlTZQJGOJi9IZr2mcyBP-iKcfH7Sr-OIf6yFkwKGKxvUc8eQNaRJEc6COXvNmA4rwaUXV4taFFfOoQS41fYU50mnIGQNkfK091C8NxvYayjvPri-NR8oe49uEBzzdTwWgYlgf6VK01TK1OYhIbBzTluvkXl1bVqeyvsG7hT99e6k9Sm3LQApU3dVI%3D)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2a22d51614b4a5e87e83e41ca949a9e&_e=AmOiBafzvzVy4ZKZNLusF_3oDfymRhVgFtxG2eUIytICm2tiUhYOGlnry3XLl-kH4AVxcnuzrKWnetKvgNPe3l1RNBrDEC5Aus9bJn99y03lp93NU-uAneoB9tySYBwV_JrVxK576DA51kLBGfaHey1GSBcAoiTv28AXX94z8K5jw1Rl-kYkv7AOvm2BPWtmnqQMK_8_y1xY7YSp8zsdPrcd6ri2bsiG4I8-dnUSFToi3Lwz9MRlTZQJGOJi9IZr2mcyBP-iKcfH7Sr-OIf6yJX_gxOh2EEmnQq8viwahFy88HqwAQphSB_S4fhYVtx_db4GKGnPzjTqg5V457z5Xd9jUJebhpD_RGxma6yD6OtrMi41Ay4dhq2UfICPPKKtRQeZ-Ezl914F85lFBTmS6L8EtcgG7LYVt7rfDHFVFVY%3D)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.
