name: Steve Hilton
subject: Save California from Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
She’s back...| | |
---

---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4c3a90da00564a72bd4f49cfc9a15daa&_e=gcQ-yK9n4QzLYRjypH_lu3e3usa-Z-q0EZ290Wovjzu9VvxBGSH_e9ku5ufrC9T_M5SKP0eH0SoGvZ4pGvixnRcXqH_pZV1I0ECHX3IJyKKc8CifoKFMF0QB4AP-PdCdr7RqQ-hcB89Fjn9EX0-ytf3TlY8DYv9YsOAxiEJS6bEcsgdWOSOC8XCaT9TMgUU2K3EgH8li32CDC-MEN_x_Gkq1hlLMKNacxyQ7GX-QzqeZlfzYO4vAnCY8w2Mi0H2NXgz7omXmv75VDbUEVKIe1wiXzcDpo154XBgcnI6Re6gZvHiJITrjAfogN-8nA_oEBpBkdNtMGXLZy-pJeBvZvECMaqcFAAWEcCcueyuBKubU_3efb4nNsygJ4fj2pa8ne64NloZIw6RxBT8MTRi1rvBZ3uhqwnfpLuBMxLef4zQ%3D)
---
| | Dear Peter, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4c3a90da00564a72bd4f49cfc9a15daa&_e=gcQ-yK9n4QzLYRjypH_lu3e3usa-Z-q0EZ290Wovjzu9VvxBGSH_e9ku5ufrC9T_M5SKP0eH0SoGvZ4pGvixnRcXqH_pZV1I0ECHX3IJyKKc8CifoKFMF0QB4AP-PdCdr7RqQ-hcB89Fjn9EX0-ytf3TlY8DYv9YsOAxiEJS6bEcsgdWOSOC8XCaT9TMgUU2K3EgH8li32CDC-MEN_x_Gkq1hlLMKNacxyQ7GX-QzqeZlfzYO4vAnCY8w2Mi0H2NXgz7omXmv75VDbUEVKIe12wwE89uI5fEqCiYqfcXnov_aMhHFCrDZRG1027AUtINvexhcEZRUSfOt9BCr1kaS_1-vxH68hsPoi6dhyWwLk40FBnY3eVblbrjySJOEguL38lYWh6hyNjpKYlcZDjceEjhRN6kM4XXfYXr37JUZcE%3D) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4c3a90da00564a72bd4f49cfc9a15daa&_e=gcQ-yK9n4QzLYRjypH_lu3e3usa-Z-q0EZ290Wovjzu9VvxBGSH_e9ku5ufrC9T_M5SKP0eH0SoGvZ4pGvixnRcXqH_pZV1I0ECHX3IJyKKc8CifoKFMF0QB4AP-PdCdr7RqQ-hcB89Fjn9EX0-ytf3TlY8DYv9YsOAxiEJS6bEcsgdWOSOC8XCaT9TMgUU2K3EgH8li32CDC-MEN_x_Gkq1hlLMKNacxyQ7GX-QzqeZlfzYO4vAnCY8w2Mi0H2NXgz7omXmv75VDbUEVKIe136hrWZrOz2eRAJ4OhR_9tdZlcqMRyDxQwtMpaJZiLswkL5uC6ucxGblLg58LPwdrTJ9f_Rc4DTwACYgCHC9ksZTJuL79NvlVI84Ey8u2Ubshcd0vpaPJYLIRhfmJWeoI0toDLYMdA55bal1PGlMrIY%3D)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4c3a90da00564a72bd4f49cfc9a15daa&_e=gcQ-yK9n4QzLYRjypH_lu3e3usa-Z-q0EZ290Wovjzu9VvxBGSH_e9ku5ufrC9T_M5SKP0eH0SoGvZ4pGvixnRcXqH_pZV1I0ECHX3IJyKKc8CifoKFMF0QB4AP-PdCdr7RqQ-hcB89Fjn9EX0-ytf3TlY8DYv9YsOAxiEJS6bEcsgdWOSOC8XCaT9TMgUU2K3EgH8li32CDC-MEN_x_Gkq1hlLMKNacxyQ7GX-QzqeZlfzYO4vAnCY8w2Mi0H2NXgz7omXmv75VDbUEVKIe1816REfmM_2JgAjOpGBtGDhOjXU6_Nk_BN6dZhqlymcHk4DZ88Tqr2wC6BCchwonWxGjnEosjRDpu8xqWVXKzCf2ErJS7Qjo6Ozm5syojP4ByzWfURTDJNLOXgK1e8mBiOhqxv-a4nvIcwm0pLEEtQc%3D) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4c3a90da00564a72bd4f49cfc9a15daa&_e=gcQ-yK9n4QzLYRjypH_lu3e3usa-Z-q0EZ290Wovjzu9VvxBGSH_e9ku5ufrC9T_M5SKP0eH0SoGvZ4pGvixnRcXqH_pZV1I0ECHX3IJyKKc8CifoKFMF0QB4AP-PdCdr7RqQ-hcB89Fjn9EX0-ytf3TlY8DYv9YsOAxiEJS6bEcsgdWOSOC8XCaT9TMgUU2K3EgH8li32CDC-MEN_x_Gkq1hlLMKNacxyQ7GX-QzqeZlfzYO4vAnCY8w2Mi0H2NePNwwFPr75U3oH2r-FQqI-72qIhv7hftIbdvCu63t4AJXnrK7kijbb8ftMOEbWuQoy55-nCKWw7dAeRfVoILawu9XX-nwjFn-5MF4aU4l6n1jN97qEEVbj18NLMkkBecuUS6Fm6ce-K5QxjHcDpRIK925KaA7d57xVNAPMZGKnmh1A_Ddbi4Gp3_FL0Vd57A)

P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. **[Chip in today and let’s end the one-party rule that’s destroying our beautiful Golden State.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4c3a90da00564a72bd4f49cfc9a15daa&_e=gcQ-yK9n4QzLYRjypH_lu3e3usa-Z-q0EZ290Wovjzu9VvxBGSH_e9ku5ufrC9T_M5SKP0eH0SoGvZ4pGvixnRcXqH_pZV1I0ECHX3IJyKKc8CifoKFMF0QB4AP-PdCdr7RqQ-hcB89Fjn9EX0-ytf3TlY8DYv9YsOAxiEJS6bEcsgdWOSOC8XCaT9TMgUU2K3EgH8li32CDC-MEN_x_Gkq1hlLMKNacxyQ7GX-QzqeZlfzYO4vAnCY8w2Mi0H2NXgz7omXmv75VDbUEVKIe1-NaHjkx_-PWD6hMd-mGY_bxJdjNpAqcF6gCv5k0pJ87J5o_XhSEVNPai_rgrPx0_FoLz9zVFnWVfK3ewg3tXXmA8GVUrTMJ5l9TpczwrvlbclqQqGJrbDzfSyDPqwAomMvqfeeKHQegXwWhoLbTGt8%3D)**

clean_body: She’s back...| | | | | | | Dear Peter, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—food, rent, medicine. Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families... Not one plan to fix the mess her party created... And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.Not on my watch. I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense —to Make California Golden Again. It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America. Crime is up. Homelessness is exploding. Public schools are failing. Housing is unaffordable. Businesses and families are fleeing. And Kamala? She wants more of the same. Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor. But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine. This race is going to come down to a clear choice: Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state OR A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again. So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work. Steve Hilton Candidate for Governor of California P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. ** | | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. PO Box 730,HILMAR, CA 95324

name: DOGE Alerts
subject: NPR & PBS
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204oj0z5pqbgwlftwfwpws2fu772hsncsrtkxy70z5ifkb707rri3vs6lqbixbx5gfka807izu80hnxlepk&__stmp=swhaih&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swhaih&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja5wn3kfnrbjhrsg56hychahszipikrpyqal01kspvdj6k3a5anicz8gob4nwtkl6740c5stkz0wzlvdvgdohebl16m5cleb9emqfq4rsecw0b5xcelltfavdtnoy07vk6drtf354ygnc6bkqxbw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swhaih&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swhaih&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swhaih&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swhaih&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja5wn3kfnrbjhrsg56hychb7gvebixa5lfti3tltm8gey7j92lgxz5778cye50w5rrokr4x64dbykduxtzlcaicuvnu0x2ro3mrvu1r4kqanwtdikwifv31u18nxskxrbzx426ybdx4nba7d6996&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swhaih&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swhaih&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250518&t=2&akid=348%2E5691347%2EhdXc3o)
As a United States Senator...
Long before I ran for the Senate, I was an investigative journalist exposing war crimes, crooked judges, sexual slavery by ISIS, contract killers, and human traffickers.
When I decided to run, my goal was to mount a ruthless assault on corruption in our political system — corruption we see everywhere from high prescription drug prices to stock profiteering in Congress.
I was going up against an entrenched Republican incumbent from a political dynasty.
I knew that if we were going to win this Senate seat, it would take a grassroots army unlike anything Georgia had ever seen.
With your help, we shocked the nation and we WON, alongside Rev. Warnock, to secure the Senate majority in 2021.
_Now we have to do it again, in what will be one of the closest elections in the country and one of the most expensive campaigns of all time._
I need you with me, Peter.
[**Can I count on you to make a $10 contribution to my re-election campaign today? I cannot do this without the support of people who know how important it is to keep this seat, and how meaningful your donations are to our chances.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250518&t=3&akid=348%2E5691347%2EhdXc3o)**

name: Tobias Read
subject: President Trump doesn’t know if he’s supposed to uphold the Constitution
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250518em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250518em]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
FIRST: President Trump issued an executive order aimed at taking control of our electoral system, including stripping states of their authority to run elections safely and fairly. It was a total abuse of power.
THEN: President Trump told a reporter he “didn’t know” if he was supposed to uphold the Constitution as President. It’s right there in the Oath of Office!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250518em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250518em]
SO NOW: We’re fighting back. President Trump won’t protect the Constitution – in fact, he’s more likely to attack it. So Secretaries of State like me need to stand up to Trump to defend it.
But I need your help.
Will you rush a donation of any amount to my team right now? Your support will help us stand up to Trump and fight back against his attacks on our democracy. And it will help me support candidates who are committed to our Constitution. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250518em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250518em]
We can’t afford to let anyone sit this out. We need all hands on deck to defend democracy from Donald Trump.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

Portland, OR 97242

It was a total abuse of power. THEN: President Trump told a reporter he “didn’t know” if he was supposed to uphold the Constitution as President. It’s right there in the Oath of Office! [] SO NOW: We’re fighting back. President Trump won’t protect the Constitution – in fact, he’s more likely to attack it. So Secretaries of State like me need to stand up to Trump to defend it. But I need your help. Will you rush a donation of any amount to my team right now? Your support will help us stand up to Trump and fight back against his attacks on our democracy. And it will help me support candidates who are committed to our Constitution. [] DONATE NOW [] We can’t afford to let anyone sit this out. We need all hands on deck to defend democracy from Donald Trump. Thank you, Tobias Read Oregon Secretary of State P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. Navigating uncertainty through action and rapid adjustment.

# [Ready, Fire, Aim!](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=163873318&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzODczMzE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc2MDkzMjQsImV4cCI6MTc1MDIwMTMyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.M4DTtufBxC367ovfOKcMRVtFIsFtNjPYU5ktNYheFKw)
### Navigating uncertainty through action and rapid adjustment.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/071a7719-c8cc-4ef0-9b43-f40fbe0ec0a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I recently started [a frozen pizza manufacturer in New Hampshire](https://substack.com/redirect/e9d2fbb6-f5f2-4d11-8902-2d8dcac51e4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). When I launched the company by purchasing the distressed assets of a company that had recently failed, the new business had to go from "zero to sixty" in a matter of days. Literally overnight, I went from owning a bunch of equipment to hiring dozens of employees and churning out tens of thousands of pizzas a day.
I often invoked a familiar entrepreneurial mantra during the early days: **Ready. Fire. Aim.** Rather than becoming paralyzed by over-analysis and discussion, I encouraged my team to act and then make rapid adjustments (_fire, see where the shot landed, and then make adjustments to improve the aim_). At what speed should we run the line? How many people should be in packaging? Which payroll provider should we use? Who should take on the unexpected tasks?
* * *
## [Practicing What I Preach](https://substack.com/redirect/e9d2fbb6-f5f2-4d11-8902-2d8dcac51e4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Mar 17
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e9d2fbb6-f5f2-4d11-8902-2d8dcac51e4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[For years, I've suggested that the best way to navigate uncertainty is to integrate thinking by crossing silos and connecting dots. I've often described this method as the "generalist approach" becau...](https://substack.com/redirect/e9d2fbb6-f5f2-4d11-8902-2d8dcac51e4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/e9d2fbb6-f5f2-4d11-8902-2d8dcac51e4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
My decades of working in academic, corporate, and government organizations exposed me to a fair share of analysis paralysis. I was determined to avoid the overthinking trap and so, in each case, I urged my team to act quickly. By trying something out first, I believed we would learn more than we could by mere thinking. "_Act and Adjust_ " became my mantra. This approach speeds up decision-making and encourages constant adjustment and improvement and aligns with sage advice from the late, great Yogi Berra, who once famously said, "When you come to a fork in the road, take it!"
These moments came back to me recently as I watched President Donald Trump's [Middle East trip](https://substack.com/redirect/d733942d-5ade-4cba-b447-00c468976ec9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Might it be possible to make sense of his approach through an entrepreneurial lens? After all, he is first and foremost a businessman, and he has approached politics the same way he approached business over the course of his professional life. He makes decisions the way an entrepreneur might, not as a bureaucrat. There are no taskforces or lengthy interagency processes; no never-ending debates or dueling policy papers. There is just action; quick decisions and sometimes equally as quick pivots. _Act and adjust_.
* * *
## [What We Can Learn from Yogi Berra](https://substack.com/redirect/f763c11d-7f80-4c4b-8dac-9eb6afc47de6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| September 23, 2015
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f763c11d-7f80-4c4b-8dac-9eb6afc47de6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[On September 22, we lost Yogi Berra, a titanic figure in American sports and culture. He played in 18 All Star games and was on the winning side of 13 World Series in his capacities as coach, manager...](https://substack.com/redirect/f763c11d-7f80-4c4b-8dac-9eb6afc47de6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/f763c11d-7f80-4c4b-8dac-9eb6afc47de6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
This was on display as Trump's Middle East trip played out, most notably when he announced he was lifting sanctions on Syria, a dramatic policy shift. So dramatic, in fact, that apparently his own Treasury Department--responsible for enforcing sanctions--was taken by [surprise](https://substack.com/redirect/df5e57fa-3fb0-4bc1-9edd-9457c63ce2d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And his State Department, like that of Biden's before, was still in the process of mulling over the idea that sanctions relief might, under certain scenarios and subject to various criteria, be possible if several critical developments transpired. Trump cut through all of that in an instant, and the speed with which he acted has drawn begrudging [admiration](https://substack.com/redirect/2d1f1d0c-80c3-4374-9a99-27eaa217b92d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from even his harshest critics; one former Biden official even [remarked](https://substack.com/redirect/8c640f0e-e5fd-4034-8e91-95469e7f817b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "Gosh, I wish I could work for an administration that could move that quickly." _Act_.
But those expecting a finality to this policymaking may be disappointed; if developments transpire in a direction he doesn't like, Trump might reverse course with equal rapidity. _Adjust_. As he has with Ukraine, tariffs, and, well, pretty much everything else, Trump will see how things play out and then make adjustments as needed - no different than an entrepreneur setting up a frozen pizza production line.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fQiJ-IOuporkl5cWJf7TkMhFNi8EnQ8jpBfwX8eF33c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163873318)
And that's really the message I want to reiterate here. Uncertainty is, by its very nature, a situation in which we don't know enough to analyze our options and choose the ideal course of action. We have to triangulate multiple perspectives, thinking in scenarios rather than in terms of a likely future. We have to use ranges, rather than point estimates. And ultimately, when it comes to making decisions in face of uncertainty, we need to accept there is no "correct" or ideal answer.
So stop thinking and start acting. You'll learn as you do, and while it may not be a straight line, I suspect you'll find yourself moving forward the more you act and adjust... Ready, Aim, Fire!

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/cba53793-c197-4dac-87a7-162a95fd2f49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/e0fd05bf-b7da-426b-aa0c-db2a9dd56207?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/6dafd6ee-c12a-43b1-ad5d-dda1727d80f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/c6456952-8985-4e26-a702-37e00ebd0148?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). name: Tim Hogan (via Democrats.org)
subject: Introduction →
body:
It’s Tim Hogan, the new War Room Director at the DNC.
---
Hi Derek, It’s Tim Hogan, the new War Room director at the DNC. The War Room is the DNC’s new rapid response operation to innovate in how Democrats communicate and hold the Trump administration accountable. In leading this work, my job is to make sure we effectively share Democratic wins online, strengthen our opposition to Trump, and implement an expansive research operation to put Republicans on defense in their districts. To do all of this, we’ll need resources to hire talented and diverse staff and build long-lasting Democratic infrastructure. That’s why I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. $3, that's the ask. $3 to drive a cohesive daily message emphasizing the harm that Trump and his allies are doing to millions of people. $3 to leverage a deep bench of surrogates to reach beyond Democrats’ traditional audiences and make sure our message is reaching people all over the country, online, in Republican spaces, and beyond. $3 to expand our media monitoring and research operation to ensure that we’re countering Trump and his allies’ consequential lies in every appearance, interview or social media post. No donation is too small. I’ve spent the last 15 years working at the intersection of politics and media on campaigns to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, especially in the Midwest. I know better than anyone that it’s time for the Democrats to step up our social media presence and to build online infrastructure that lasts for years to come. Any amount will help us build the foundation we’ll need. The number of donations we'll receive from Democrats like you will take care of the rest. [Can you please use this link to contribute $3 (or whatever you can afford) directly to the Democratic National Committee to help us build the strongest possible Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250517_3481_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3481_22930333_bUlCBG&akid=3481%2E22930333%2EbUlCBG) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250517_3481_fr&refcode2=3481_22930333_bUlCBG&akid=3481%2E22930333%2EbUlCBG)**

name: America First Alert
subject: Your input could shape America’s defense policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump and Senate Republicans need your input to help shape the future of U.S. defense. | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=5fad146d0e0b4aefab11115672c9073a&_e=sT3fOdIB5n9AtBoTUkU3vIB1YV6MrMo7wEtynjWCGOB2KXLdDnG-ArmSCehsnA6m_w30JSjxjE-W1aSgeZCbm4lV3BND-WURmGh1ST264DlgQHsA7VFs4eeiGd3sSRdkkIpOP-YvehEGDjO3a5skhkryjwoYjaIXdGrtHdbPMXozUNTMh219GQi_zpcZ8zkaHbZ6GaslHrD9FsYUqeHSzgygxd_jqDzOs3xOHJn8EKVM0LuM53-Lpfo7ye5EynZgOLX6ACqyQyAdZBIkohyxZQ_nYIZvUpgjyXSDOiUXjiIhpUfaOF_8AClqDM8ZoOiTemdVO-QiWC90Jo3zNWus0wYsJYu2YwPd0vbDIBUe0IWrwWpOPZasXUYHbfCBwHaSToY9ddESjmEkd1Wz74mb7r2LFzvgDzsBYjWFQoTBSUEkeH2zuYBqqegbkGr7vmIu_76EdhAeyOl0xjf-Mba_BZAlta4QQj3lI9PcITs-YTD9jycxtBfbLJWuB-vFH06F)
President Trump is leading a **powerful America First comeback** --and on June 14th, he's taking it to the streets with a**historic military parade** honoring his 79th birthday and the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army.

But this isn't just about honoring our military--it's about reclaiming national strength and putting _American security, veterans, and defense back at the TOP of the agenda._

That's why President Trump and Senate Republicans are launching a [**National Security Survey**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=5fad146d0e0b4aefab11115672c9073a&_e=sT3fOdIB5n9AtBoTUkU3vIB1YV6MrMo7wEtynjWCGOB2KXLdDnG-ArmSCehsnA6m_w30JSjxjE-W1aSgeZCbm4lV3BND-WURmGh1ST264DlgQHsA7VFs4eeiGd3sSRdkkIpOP-YvehEGDjO3a5skhkryjwoYjaIXdGrtHdbPMXozUNTMh219GQi_zpcZ8zkaHbZ6GaslHrD9FsYUqeHSzgygxd_jqDzOs3xOHJn8EKVM0LuM53-Lpfo7ye5EynZgOLX6ACqyQyAdZBIkohyxZQ_nYIZvUpgjyXSDOiUXjiIhpUfaOF_8AClqDM8ZoOiTemdVO-QiWC90Jo3zNWus06pWcs40d8cp4AMkeSSeMtAUTtSyWrWsm_d3v7NeASHgn7Xt19jrFhzBm6rjM0t82VBJHs65QzDy6yP_GkzcGxEUl7V_rwb1mJdQh4uL9GNWNfYFfp267yNRo5LXYkMmsmOo0ls5oUZLw2xa92WQp0z0V7ePZZghax2k-uwmeesz)--and we need YOU to be part of it.

**🇺🇸 DO YOU BELIEVE IN AMERICA FIRST SECURITY?🇺🇸**
This survey will help shape the next wave of America First policy:

✅ Military readiness and modernization
✅ Veterans' care and respect
✅ Border security and law enforcement
✅ Standing up to global threats like China and Iran
✅ Defending peace through strength - not weakness

clean_body: President Trump and Senate Republicans need your input to help shape the future of U.S. defense. | President Trump is leading a powerful America First comeback --and on June 14th, he's taking it to the streets with ahistoric military parade honoring his 79th birthday and the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army. But this isn't just about honoring our military--it's about reclaiming national strength and putting American security, veterans, and defense back at the TOP of the agenda. That's why President Trump and Senate Republicans are launching a we need YOU to be part of it. 🇺🇸 DO YOU BELIEVE IN AMERICA FIRST SECURITY?🇺🇸 This survey will help shape the next wave of America First policy: ✅ Military readiness and modernization ✅ Veterans' care and respect ✅ Border security and law enforcement ✅ Standing up to global threats like China and Iran ✅ Defending peace through strength - not weakness If you believe in President Trump's vision for American strength, take the today to support this critical effort.
